Three streaks of light tore through the air. However, turbulent waves surged through the domain, striking the three streams of light. The arrows managed to pierce through the waves at the cost of greatly decreased power. After piercing through the waves, the arrows moved slower than Blackrock.

“It’s here.” Liu Qiyue’s expression changed. “This domain is moving. It’s centered around this greater demon monarch.”

Meng Chuan also noticed the Dragonwater Domain moving as Blackrock rushed towards them. Wherever Blackrock moved, the Dragonwater Domain would follow; thus, destroying the city wall, buildings, and mortals.

“Also, we’re even further away from the domain boundary now. We’re roughly 2.5 kilometers away.” Liu Qiyue looked down at the destroyed county city. Without holding back, she unleashed the power of her phoenix bloodline with a single thought. Instantly, flames erupted from her body. The power of her flames left Meng Chuan extremely alarmed.

His wife’s eyes glowed red as flames wreathed around her body. Her strength was now not inferior to the fourth Firmament demon monarch.

“Qiyue.” Meng Chuan understood that his wife had cast Phoenix’s Nirvana.

The cost of casting Phoenix’s Nirvana was her lifespan.

“Ah Chuan, it has to be used eventually. I’ll give it a try first.” Liu Qiyue smiled as she looked at her husband. The terrifying flames spread 1000 feet around her as she protected Meng Chuan from the Dragonwater Domain’s waves.

On one side were flames, and on the other side-waves of water.

The two clashed loudly.

Fourth Firmament demon monarch. Liu Qiyue held her divine bow as she strung an arrow.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 237 - Epiphany
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Liu Qiyue could sense how powerful she was at this moment. Casting Phoenix’s Nirvana would reveal the true power of her phoenix bloodline that had become purer as she cultivated.

As a Phoenix Divine Body expert, she could sense the invincible and terrifying power in her phoenix bloodline. She was only a Great Solar Godfiend and could only unleash the tip of the iceberg of power contained within her phoenix bloodline. Even so, Liu Qiyue found her current strength unbelievable.

Chi! Chi! Chi! Liu Qiyue felt her body transform under the eruption of her phoenix bloodline. Her soul was transforming as well.

Yes, she clearly hadn’t condensed an Essence Soul, but under her Nirvana state, she could clearly sense that her soul was rapidly strengthening. Clearly, the longer she remained in her Phoenix Nirvana state, the more astounding her soul’s transformation would be.

The Dao of Fire that belongs to a phoenix? Liu Qiyue felt that every movement of hers could stir terrifying flames. Her insights towards flames constantly surged. While in her Phoenix’s Nirvana state, she felt like she had constant epiphanies.

These effects had all been recorded. When Phoenix Divine Body experts cast Phoenix’s Nirvana, their Essence Soul, technique realm, and body would become stronger in every aspect. This was also the reason why they were bound to become Marquis Godfiends. The only price was that their lifespans would be constantly shortened if they continued casting Phoenix’s Nirvana.

The longer one underwent Nirvana, the more their lifespan would shorten-leading to death.

“Kill!” Liu Qiyue shot out an arrow without hesitation.

This arrow was dazzling!

Meng Chuan was shocked by the arrow.

Liu Qiyue was even more confident than before. She could sense how much she had improved. This was a profound qualitative change in her combat prowess.

As Blackrock was too close to the couple, the arrow flew out of the flames and pierced a few hundred feet into the turbulent waters before arriving in front of Blackrock.

Bang! Blackrock struck out with a one-handed hammer, smashing it against the arrow.

The arrow exploded.

Flames scattered everywhere.

Blackrock easily blocked the arrow, but he was rather alarmed. This Liu Qiyue is clearly a Great Solar Godfiend. She has the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiend after casting Phoenix’s Nirvana. However, both of them will die today.

Blackrock was the leader of all demon monarchs in the Great Zhou Dynasty. He was a true peak fourth Firmament demon monarch. His strength was close to that of a Regis Godfiend. With the Dragonwater Domain, he was like a tiger with wings.

“Dragonwater Domain, turn the world upside down!” As they neared, Blackrock finally utilized the Dragonwater Domain’s full strength to deal with the duo.

Rumble...

All the waves surged towards Meng Chuan and his wife, causing the flames around Liu Qiyue to shrink backward constantly. The flames were pushed back until they were just 100 feet away from them.

No matter how the waves attacked the flames, the hundred-foot area remained completely unscathed.

“Ah Chuan, he’s too strong. Even my arrows can’t threaten him. What should I do?” Liu Qiyue was a little anxious. She took out three arrows at once. As the other party was rapidly charging at her, she only had one chance to shoot her arrows.

“Continue shooting,” said Meng Chuan via voice transmission. He had finished preparing

“Die.” Blackrock was less than 1000 feet away from the duo.

800 feet, 600 feet...

Liu Qiyue’s three arrows pierced through the air, bringing with them dazzling flames and terrifying might. Blackrock was still confident in blocking them. But at that moment

Go, Soul-Vanquishing Spike! With a thought, Meng Chuan’s Soul-Vanquishing Spike – which had been nurtured by his Essence Soul for a long time-shot out from his body.

The Soul-Vanquishing Spike was an Essence Soul weapon. One couldn’t detect it with the naked eye or typical sensory techniques. Only those with Essence Souls could detect it.

Demonic powers, Quintessential Essence, and physical bodies could not defend against it either.

Its speed was beyond imagination. It was even faster than lightning. It instantly entered Blackrock’s body and found his Essence Soul sitting in his sea of consciousness. It was a black, stone golem-shaped Essence Soul. It was rather powerful.

This is? Blackrock’s Essence Soul discovered the Soul-Vanquishing Spike entering his sea of consciousness. He could not help but be alarmed.

It has a second-level Essence Soul? Meng Chuan’s heart sank when he saw the other party’s Essence Soul. Although the other party’s Essence Soul was inferior to his, it was still a second-level Essence Soul.

Pfft.

The Soul-Vanquishing Spike stabbed straight into Blackrock’s Essence Soul.

“Ah.” Blackrock felt a sharp pain in his head. At that moment, the three arrows were already in front of him. He could only swing his hammer with his left hand and barely blocked two arrows.

The last arrow struck his chest and exploded. Phoenix flames burned all over his body. Blackrock randomly threw the hammer in his right hand. The hammer transformed into a black beam of light that shot towards Liu Qiyue. It was too close.

The hammer was too fast. Liu Qiyue didn’t have time to shoot another arrow.

Thankfully, Meng Chuan was by her side. He had long used a forbidden Godfiend spell. At that moment, he didn’t hesitate to use the Power of Essence Soul to accelerate.

Boom!

He executed Red Lotus Stance with Demon Slayer and took on the attack. He felt a deep and unfathomable force come from the hammer. It pressed down on Demon Slayer and struck Meng Chuan. With a deep thud, Meng Chuan’s ribs cracked. His back arched, and blood instantly dyed his clothes red.

Clang!

He was sent flying backward like a ragdoll.

Tears welled up in Liu Qiyue’s eyes when she saw this. She was afraid that Meng Chuan would be smashed to death by the hammer strike!

“Demon Monarch, die.” Liu Qiyue’s eyes turned red as she went crazy. She shot three arrows at the same time.

The surface of Blackrock’s body burned with phoenix flames. However, he took a deep breath and directly sucked the phoenix flames into his body. He nodded in approval. “This flame tastes good.”

This made Liu Qiyue’s pupils contract.

She immediately retreated! She retreated in the direction in which Meng Chuan had flown backward while shooting.

Her flame domain maintained its 100 feet radius, completely blocking the Dragonwater Domain’s waves. Liu Qiyue now had the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiend. Her flying speed with her flame wings had reached a whole new level.

“It’s useless. You won’t be able to escape.” Blackrock received his hammer that flew back and continued attacking Liu Qiyue. He wasn’t in a hurry to deal with Meng Chuan. He felt like that hammer strike was enough to kill Meng Chuan. Killing the threatening Liu Qiyue was more important.

When Meng Chuan was sent flying like a ragdoll, the terrifying impact swept through his entire body, causing him to lose consciousness. However, his third-level Essence Soul instantly woke him up. He could sense the Dragonwater Domain’s turbulent waves enveloping him as it tried to suffocate

him.

At the Divine Power realm, my body is strong, but this greater demon monarch is much stronger than me.He heavily injured me with a single strike. If Qiyue hadn’t held him back, I probably would have been killed in two or three strikes. Meng Chuan felt the severity of his injuries. His chest had caved in completely, and his heart and lungs suffered severe damage. However, they rapidly recovered at that moment. His bones rapidly healed, and his organs recovered back to normal.

He just needed a few seconds to recover from such severe injuries.

When his body recovered, Meng Chuan saw Qiyue being pursued.

What should I do? I can’t withstand a single strike from the enemy. Inside the water domain, my speed is inferior to the enemy’s. Meng Chuan was extremely anxious. As he rapidly pondered with his Essence Soul, time seemed to slow down. Many thoughts surfaced in his mind every moment.

Liu Qiyue fled in Meng Chuan’s direction. “Ah Chuan, Ah Chuan.”

She was worried about her husband. Having seen the hammer sending him flying like a ragdoll, she was really worried about Meng Chuan.

“Qiyue.” Meng Chuan saw his wife being chased down.

Blazing flames rose from Liu Qiyue’s body. The flames spread out and remained 100 feet within her, blocking the Dragonwater Domain’s waves. Phoenix flames were extreme Yang, but they were also extreme Yin. They were flames of life.

A flash of inspiration hit Meng Chuan as he watched the phoenix flames resisting the Dragonwater Domain.

He suddenly thought of the saber move he had accidentally executed when he was practicing his saber art.

Extreme Yin transforms into Yang. Extreme Yang transforms into Yin? No, extreme Yin is also extreme Yang. It’s just two sides of the same coin. Meng Chuan was completely enlightened. He felt like his understanding of the Heart Intent Saber Art-a Black Metal Sutra—had reached a new level.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 238 - Realm of Dao
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

The core of Heart Intent Saber Art was the Heart Saber Stance. The other moves were derived from the Heart Saber Stance and developed in different directions.

After comprehending the profundity of Heart Saber Stance’s Yin-Yang Transformation and reaching the Realm of Dao, Meng Chuan’s understanding of Red Lotus Stance, Tiger Roar Stance, Dragon Roar Stance, Extreme Yin Stance, and Flying Swallow Stance had reached a whole new level.

Meng Chuan didn’t have time to reflect on his new insights because he saw his wife being sent flying by Blackrock’s hammer.

This couple is even more powerful than what’s stated in the intelligence we have on them! Blackrock flew through the surging waves and approached Liu Qiyue. Liu Qiyue has a Phoenix Divine Body, and she has the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiend after casting Phoenix’s Nirvana. That Meng Chuan is even more impressive. He actually used a Soul-Vanquishing Spike! He’s a 38-year-old Great Solar Godfiend, but his Essence Soul has actually reached the third level. Such Essence Soul cultivation talent can be ranked among the top few in human history. As for us demons, we didn’t even know about this before.

Blackrock chased after Liu Qiyue.

The flames on Liu Qiyue’s body seemed to have taken corporeal form. She had already transformed into a phoenix. A burning phoenix flew through the endless waves with great difficulty, constantly withstanding the terrifying impacts. The Dragonwater Domain could weaken even Regis Godfiends! Liu Qiyue’s Phoenix’s Nirvana-powered flames could barely resist it.

Meng Chuan’s baneful aura domain was on the verge of collapse. “Ah Chuan, Ah Chuan.” Liu Qiyue was filled with unease. She wanted to reach her husband as soon as possible. The strike just now had filled her with unease. At the same time, she had requested for help repeatedly through her Patroller token as a way to indicate the urgency of her situation.

The moment they met the greater demon monarch, the couple had requested for help.

Now, all she could do was repeatedly request for help. The fastest reinforcements is a Regis Godfiend at Luo Tang Pass. However, it will take them five minutes to arrive. Liu Qiyue was extremely anxious. Five minutes is too slow!

“Liu Qiyue, why are you so concerned about your husband? Why don’t you accompany your husband? That way, the two of you won’t be lonely on the way to the netherworld.” Blackrock attacked Liu Qiyue as he approached.

Liu Qiyue flapped her flame wings, wanting to dodge. However, they were too close to one another.

Blackrock’s ferocious hammer tore through the layers of protective flames. The flames seemed corporeal since they could withstand the Dragonwater Domain’s waves. At that moment, the hammer had been weakened by 70 to 80 percent by the flames. In the end, Liu Qiyue also used her divine bow to block the hammer.

Bam!!!

The divine bow was extraordinary; the attack didn’t damage the bow at all. However, the impact spread to Liu Qiyue’s body, causing her flames to scatter. Liu Qiyue’s organs were severely injured, but her body rapidly healed because of her burning phoenix flames. In fact, as Liu Qiyue maintained Phoenix’s Nirvana, her body constantly metamorphosed, causing her injuries to heal rapidly.

Even though my strength has greatly increased, I almost lost my life. Liu Qiyue was sent flying by the blast, but she was still worried about her husband. What happened to Ah Chuan? He doesn’t have the phoenix flames to protect himself. He took the blow head-on.

Liu Qiyue then saw the figure in the distance —that had been enveloped by the wavessuddenly move. This made her relieved.

Your Phoenix’s Nirvana can help you recover from your injuries very quickly. In that case, I’ll pound you into minced meat and see if you will die. Just as Blackrock was about to pursue Liu Qiyue, his expression suddenly changed.

A lightning-clad figure shuttled through the waves, withstanding the wave impacts as he rapidly approached Blackrock.

Meng Chuan? Blackrock couldn’t believe it.

A saber beam arced through the air, attacking Blackrock’s flank. It was fast and unpredictable, and it still possessed terrifying speed though obstructed by the churning water.

Black Metal Sutra-Heart Intent Saber’s Dragon Roar Stance!

Blackrock felt that his opponent’s saber strike was too strange. He wasn’t even fully confident that he could withstand the saber beam. He held two hammers in front of him to block the attack.

Chi!

Demon Slayer and the two hammers recoiled immediately upon impact. Meng Chuan executed Swallow Stance to redirect the remnant impact into his next attack back at Blackrock!

Meng Chuan slashed out saber beam after saber beam! Even though he was affected by the Dragonwater Domain, Meng Chuan was still faster than Blackrock. He constantly attacked. However, he didn’t dare to clash head-on with the greater demon monarch. Meng Chuan knew very well how terrifying the greater demon monarch’s strength was.

“Qiyue, I’ll hold it back first. Leave quickly and escape the Dragonwater Domain,” said Meng Chuan via voice transmission.

“Okay.” Liu Qiyue watched as her husband’s speed in the Dragonwater Domain exceeded Blackrock. She couldn’t help but feel a lot more relaxed. Now that he held the advantage in speed, Blackrock wouldn’t be able to catch up if Meng Chuan wanted to escape.

Whoosh.

Liu Qiyue’s flames formed the shape of a phoenix. She flew through layers of waves in the Dragonwater Domain with great difficulty. She had to fly 2.5 kilometers quickly and get away from Blackrock. Under the suppression of the Dragonwater Domain, he’s even faster than me? How fast is he if the Dragonwater Domain doesn’t suppress him? Blackrock was genuinely shocked. Now that Meng Chuan held the advantage in speed, saber beams came one after another. As long as Blackrock parried an attack, Meng Chuan would immediately retreat. Meng didn’t clash with Blackrock head-on. This made it difficult for Blackrock to unleash his strength fully.

Too agile.

The Dragonwater Domain’s suppressive powers were terrifying, but Meng Chuan’s movements were too agile and graceful. Most of the wave impacts were dispelled while Meng Chuan borrowed some of the waves’ force. This was why Swallow Stance was an ingenious movement technique. After comprehending the unique rhythm of Yin-Yang Transformations, his Swallow Stance had become much stronger. Even when suppressed by the Dragonwater Domain, he could still unleash up to 30% of his maximum speed.

After reaching the Realm of Dao, Meng Chuan’s maximum speed increased once again! Even at 30 percent of his maximum speed, he was still as fast as a Regis Godfiend!

This Meng Chuan is too mysterious. He attained a third-level Essence Soul at such a young age. His body is also monstrous! The pressure the Dragonwater Domain can exert is immense. Even Liu Qiyue has to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana and protect herself with phoenix flames. Great Solar Godfiends should be reduced to meat paste instantly. Marquis Godfiends have to use their Darkstar Domains and Darkstar Quintessential to withstand the immense pressure. Only fourth Firmament demon monarchs with powerful bodies can withstand the Dragonwater Domain’s pressure, yet he can actually resist the pressure with his body alone?

Blackrock felt like he had discovered many of Meng Chuan’s secrets. Secrets like his Essence Soul and his strong physical body.

I have to get rid of him. Otherwise, if he develops his strength further, he will be too great a threat in the future. Blackrock immediately saw Liu Qiyue fleeing into the distance.

This Meng Chuan is clearly faster than me and can escape directly. Yet, he wants to pester me... He wants to save his wife.

Can you save her? Blackrock’s body phased away.

What? Meng Chuan saw a mountain appear in front of him.

A towering mountain demon—that was 1000 feet tall-appeared in front of him. Blackrock was still in human form as his stone arms held a sledgehammer. The sledgehammer was now extremely huge.

Mountain demon? Meng Chuan was alarmed. This greater demon monarch is actually a mountain demon?

Mountain demons were famous for their terrifying strength and tenacious bodies.

It’s a mountain demon? Liu Qiyue looked a little anxious. No wonder it could resist my arrows with just its body.

A mountain demon’s body was ridiculously tough when they were in miniature form. After gigantification, their body’s toughness would decrease slightly, but their strength would increase greatly.

“Haha, Meng Chuan, you want to save your wife?” Blackrock roared with laughter that sounded like rumbling thunder. It resounded through the entire Dragonwater Domain. He casually swung his hammer, stirring up endless waves. The strength behind the hammer shocked Meng Chuan, causing him to dodge quickly. As for Blackrock, he took large strides towards Liu Qiyue. The Dragonwater Domain moved with him. He didn’t seem to be fast, but he covered 1000 feet with every step. His speed was astounding; he was much faster than before.

Originally, he was 1.5 kilometers away from Liu Qiyue. However, the distance between them rapidly shortened as he ran towards her.

Swoosh.

Clad in lightning, Meng Chuan sped past Blackrock in an arcing manner. Although he took a long detour, he still reached Liu Qiyue before Blackrock.

They are gone? When the city suffered such destruction, a small number of people still looked outside. The people who dared to look at the battle were those from either Earth Net, the Skydemon Sect, or bold mortals.

They saw surging waves sweep through the vast city.

Within the vast water domain, a giant mountain demon appeared. The giant mountain demon towered over buildings, and he wielded two sledgehammers in his hands as he flew off into the distance-far away from the county city and toward the wilderness.

“Qiyue.” Meng Chuan used his speed to rendezvous with Liu Qiyue.

“Ah Chuan, your injuries?” Liu Qiyue was a little worried.

“It’s nothing.” Meng Chuan held her arm. “Let’s go.I’ll help you escape.”

Swoosh.

The couple traversed the Dragonwater Domain together. However, Meng Chuan’s expression changed.

When alone, he could break through the Dragonwater Domain by borrowing the domain’s powers. However, Liu Qiyue’s body was fairly weak. There was no way she could withstand the Dragonwater Domain’s immense pressure with her body alone. Thus, she had to rely on her phoenix flames to protect herself. Her phoenix flames were actually able to withstand the Dragonwater Domain’s immense pressure. However, his speed was greatly affected since he was carrying another person. He could only maintain 20% of his maximum speed when carrying Liu Qiyue. At this speed, he was only as fast as a Marquis Godfiend.

After Blackrock revealed his true form, his speed was greater than Meng Chuan’s. Blackrock soon appeared behind the duo.

“Hahaha, you won’t be able to escape with your wife.” The towering 1000-foot-tall Blackrock strode forward and laughed loudly. “Will you stand behind and die with your wife, or will you escape alone?”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 239 - The Only Way
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Ah Chuan, run. Don’t bother about me.” Liu Qiyue looked at her husband and persuaded him via voice transmission.

She looked at Meng Chuan’s side profile. She wanted to remember his appearance. She was reluctant to part with him. She couldn’t bear to part with her husband or her children, but she knew that choices had to be made on a battlefield. It would be better if at least one of them survived instead of dying together.

“Don’t worry, Qiyue,” Meng Chuan reassured Liu Qiyue via voice transmission. “Let’s hold on for a while longer. The Godfiend that Archean Mountain sent will arrive soon.”

“Ah Chuan, the fastest reinforcement will be a Regis Godfiend from Luo Tang Pass,” said Liu Qiyue via voice transmission. “They will take five minutes to arrive. That’s too long. They won’t arrive in time. Don’t implicate yourself because of me. Ah Chuan, our children are still young. They need someone to take care of them.”

“Don’t worry. I have a solution,” said Meng Chuan.

Meng Chuan knew that if Supremacy Luo Tang rescued them personally, she would arrive very quickly. However, Luo Tang Pass couldn’t be lost! Once Supremacy Luo Tang appeared, Blackrock would tell the demons that a Creation-level threat had appeared with his token before dying. The demons would then realize that Supremacy Qin Wu was still guarding Archean Mountain. Thus, they could infer that Supremacy Luo Tang had likely been the one to act. Then, the demons might immediately attack Luo Tang Pass.

w

As the Great Zhou Dynasty’s only super-large city pass, the Godfiends wouldn’t be able to hold the demons back without a Creation Supremacy. If they lost Luo Tang Pass, it would be disastrous.

Just as Meng Chuan and his wife had expected, Archean Mountain had indeed sent a Regis Godfiend-King Luyue of Luo Tang Pass—to rescue them.

When Meng Chuan had fought Fu Jiao, it had been King Luyue who had arrived to act as reinforcements. It was the same this time. Luo Tang Pass only had two Regis Godfiends guarding it. King Luyue was the faster of the two, so he was naturally sent to aid Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue.

Swoosh.

In the clouds, King Luyue traveled as a black light beam. His eyes were filled with anxiety.

Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue have repeatedly requested for help? It looks like it’s very dangerous. The two of them must hold on. I still have another 250 kilometers to go! King Luyue rushed to save them.

Charge. Meng Chuan suddenly fused the Power of Essence Soul with his body and rushed forward with his wife. His speed increased by nearly 30 percent, but Blackrock snorted coldly.

Blackrock’s body glowed red, and his speed increased by 20 to 30 percent. He was still faster than Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue.

He actually forced me to use a forbidden spell. Blackrock’s eyes turned even more ferocious as he pursued Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue.

The gap is narrowing. I can’t shake it off. Meng Chuan’s mind raced. What should I do? Qiyue must be saved! But how? By using the Power of Essence Soul, I will only have the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiendl. It’s impossible for me to stop a fourth Firmament mountain demon monarch.

There’s no other way...

Meng Chuan glanced at his wife. “Qiyue, I’ll hold him back. Take the opportunity to escape this domain.”

“How?” Liu Qiyue immediately sent a voice transmission. “Ah Chuan, don’t be rash.”

“I have a way.” Meng Chuan released his wife and took the initiative to rush towards Blackrock.

Blackrock was not alarmed. Instead, he was overjoyed. “Nice!” He was most afraid that Meng Chuan would abandon his wife and escape alone. He couldn’t do anything if he did do that. To him, Meng Chuan was much more important than Liu Qiyue. Liu Qiyue’s survival only meant an additional human expert in the future. If Meng Chuan stayed alive, he would continue to protect a vast area with his speed. His Essence Soul cultivation talent represented his terrifying potential. “Die!” Blackrock suddenly exerted his strength and took a step forward. The ground quaked as he brandished his sledgehammer.

The huge hammer—that was 20 to 30 feet in diameter—was like a small hill. It contained terrifying might. Wherever it passed, space distorted.

The hammer’s terrifying might made Meng Chuan’s heart skip a beat. He immediately executed Swallow Stance, avoiding the terrifying sledgehammer. But another sledgehammer followed the previous one.

Boom!

Their surroundings were affected by these two sledgehammers. The sky darkened as waves surged forward.

Meng Chuan vaguely realized that the two sledgehammers had formed a formation. Once he was embroiled in Blackrock’s attacks, it would be difficult to escape.

Run! He didn’t continue rushing toward Blackrock. Instead, he used his movement technique to flee into the distance. “Escaping? Then, I’ll kill your wife,” roared Blackrock. His voice resounded through his surroundings. He didn’t chase after Meng Chuan. Instead, he rushed towards Liu Qiyue. He wanted to force Meng Chuan to save his wife.

Liu Qiyue watched as Meng Chuan fled into the distance. Her knitted brows eased as she completely relaxed.

Meng Chuan had made his choice. This was a wise choice on the battlefield—at least one person could survive.

Ah Chuan, take good care of our children.

Meng Chuan’s eyes filled with determination as he fled into the distance.

There’s only one way to save Qiyue. I must break through to the Darkstar realm!

Meng Chuan’s eyes were filled with madness.

In the Godfiend cultivation system, each major breakthrough had to be handled with extreme care. The further one progressed in the cultivation system, the more dangerous the breakthrough became. One mistake could result in one’s body exploding into pieces.

It was extremely difficult to break through from the Great Solar realm to the Darkstar realm! One had to reach the Realm of Dao and have an Essence Soul before they could condense a Darkstar. One had to control every wisp of their Quintessential Essence carefully with their Essence Soul. A Great Solar Godfiend also had to be young enough. Otherwise, one’s dantian space wouldn’t be young and resilient enough to withstand the breakthrough impact. After reaching 60 years of age, the probability of a Great Solar Godfiend becoming a Marquis Godfiend would gradually drop.

If he wanted to break through to the Darkstar realm, then he needed to meditate! A slight disturbance during one’s breakthrough would cause them to fail.

Meng Chuan was currently unable to meditate. He couldn’t even slowly adjust his state of mind and focus on making a breakthrough. He had to make a sudden breakthrough. The danger of doing this was insanely great.

My body’s lifeforce is extremely vigorous. My dantian space is far tougher than that of my peers. I have a third-level Essence Soul. My control over Quintessential Essence with the Power of Essence Soul is more exquisite than that of my peers. Even if I make a sudden breakthrough, I have more than 80 percent chance of success.

Though an 80 percent chance of successfully breaking through was high, Archean Mountain only allowed their disciples to break through if they had a 100 percent chance of success. This required one to enter seclusion and begin their breakthrough.

After all, if he failed, everything would be for naught. He was basically insane to attempt to break through to the Darkstar realm during a battle. However, Meng Chuan knew that he might die during this chance. Since he had an 80 percent chance of breaking through, he naturally chose to do so if he could save his wife.

And this was the only way to save his wife. He had no other choice since he was up against a peak fourth Firmament demon monarch that controlled the Dragonwater Domain.

Come on! Meng Chuan didn’t have time to waste. It wouldn’t take long for Blackrock to catch up to Liu Qiyue. He had to become a Marquis Godfiend quickly.

Instantly, the Power of Essence Soul fused with his Great Solar Quintessential Essence and his dantian space. A dazzling ‘Great Sun’ floated in the middle of his vast dantian space, emitting a golden glow. Every wisp of golden light was a wisp of Great Solar Quintessential Essence.

Since Meng Chuan was accomplished in the physical body cultivation system, his body was very powerful. His foundation was robust, and his dantian space was extremely vast. The ‘Great Sun’ in his dantian space had also reached its size limit. Compared to all of history’s Great Solar Godfiends, Meng Chuan’s Quintessential Essence was the purest and most refined. If he improved his Quintessential Essence any further, the ‘Great Sun’ would implode.

Break through. He didn’t have time to think about it. The Power of Essence Soul fused with the ‘Great Sun’ and controlled countless golden rays, instantly triggering their power.

Boom!

With his Saber Dao, the Yin-Yang Transformation caused his accumulated Great Solar Quintessential Essence to erupt completely. The ‘Great Sun’s’ glow became a thousand-fold more dazzling, filling the entire dantian space.

Meng Chuan’s Quintessential Essence continued exploding under his guidance. When it reached its limit, the ‘Great Sun’ produced an attractive force.

Extreme Yang gave rise to Yin! Converge. The Power of Essence Soul caused his Quintessential Essence to gather like a vortex. The pressure on the gathered Quintessential Essence caused it to liquefy and even solidify.

Although it took a long time to describe, the ‘Great Sun’ exploded and shrunk extremely quickly. Finally, it shrank into an extremely tiny dim sphere. It was many times smaller than the previous ‘Great Sun’. The entire dantian space turned dark.

The dark red sphere emitted a dark red gas; it contained a terrifying might. This was a Darkstar.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 240 - Marquis
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Many Archean Mountain Godfiends longed to reach the Darkstar realm, but it was difficult. If one had insufficient control over their Quintessential Essence, they would not be able to converge their Quintessential to a single point after the explosion! If the explosion wasn’t handled properly, one’s body would explode into pieces.

If one’s technique realm wasn’t high enough, they wouldn’t be able to form a perfect, stable Darkstar. An imperfect Darkstar would collapse and explode. This explosion was even more terrifying; it could reduce one’s body to dust.

This breakthrough was extremely difficult! However, Meng Chuan didn’t make any preparations. He made a sudden breakthrough and even succeeded in one fell swoop! It was rare for this to happen. However, his third-level Essence Soul was the main reason he succeeded. His control over Quintessential Essence was much greater.

I succeeded. Meng Chuan was overjoyed.

He hadn’t died. He had successfully made a breakthrough and survived!

Qiyue. Meng Chuan looked over and saw the towering Blackrock about half a kilometer away from Qiyue. This made Meng Chuan secretly heave a sigh of relief.

Although it took a long time to describe, Meng Chuan’s breakthrough took an extremely short period of time.

Swoosh. Meng Chuan instantly moved.

This is the Darkstar Domain and Darkstar Quintessential Essence? Meng Chuan rushed towards his wife at full speed. At the same time, he felt the changes in his body.

Once the Darkstar was formed, one would gain all sorts of magical powers. For example, the Darkstar naturally formed the Darkstar domain. The Darkstar domain spanned a 1000 feet radius. The Darkstar domain granted a Godfiend all sorts of special abilities that surpassed a demon’s divine power. It was what granted Marquis Godfiends such terrifying combat prowess.

The Darkstar domain was very special. It could be used for concealment, disguise, flying, defense, attacks, and as a domain.

If he wanted to protect himself, he could form a 1000-feet-wide domain that had a repulsive force. The closer one moved to Meng Chuan, the stronger the repulsion. It was like two large magnets with the same pole facing each other. The closer the magnets were, the stronger the

repulsive forces.

This made Meng Chuan somewhat unapproachable.

Boom!

The Darkstar domain suppressed the Dragonwater Domain’s surging waves. However, the waves still pushed past the Darkstar domain’s repulsive forces and reached Meng Chuan. After all, it was a treasure that even fifth Firmament demon monarchs valued.

However, by the time they reached Meng Chuan, the waves had weakened drastically.

Meng Chuan’s Darkstar Quintessential Essence covered his body—the dark-red gases his Darkstar emitted. A total of 300 Darkstar Quintessential Essence layers combined with Meng Chuan’s Darkstar domain. The Darkstar domain could use the void to repel enemies, and it could also act as protection after combining with Darkstar Quintessential Essence. After Meng Chuan’s Darkstar Quintessential Essence merged with his Darkstar domain, his Quintessential Essence gained the Darkstar domain’s unique characteristics.

His Quintessential Essence now had a powerful repulsive force. The repulsive force was even stronger than the one generated by his Darkstar Domain, so his Quintessential Essence’s defensive capability was greatly enhanced.

Marquis Godfiends had ridiculously strong Quintessential Essence defenses. In a fight between a Marquis Godfiend and a fourth Firmament demon monarch, the demon monarch would be injured or even killed, even if greater demon monarch bodies are powerful. It would be difficult for a fourth Firmament demon monarch to pierce through a Marquis Godfiend’s Quintessential Essence defenses.

Defeating a Marquis Godfiend was easy, but killing a Marquis Godfiend was just too difficult.

Demons were envious of Marquis Godfiends because they had Darkstar domains. It was the reason why the Godfiend cultivation system was stronger than the demon monarch cultivation system.

Now that I have a Darkstar domain, even the void allows me to fly when I use my movement technique. Meng Chuan found it wonderful. With the Darkstar domain protecting him at all times, it was naturally much safer.

He became even faster as Darkstar Quintessential Essence circulated around his body. With the help of his Darkstar domain, his movement techniques would also be faster.

Countless dark-red nebulae surrounded Meng Chuan, blocking the Dragonwater Domain’s wave and immense pressure. Despite being suppressed by the Dragonwater domain, Meng Chuan remained unbelievably fast in his lightning form as he flew towards Liu Qiyue.

As long as Ah Chuan survives, it’s enough. Liu Qiyue watched the towering Blackrock rush up to her. However, a hint of madness appeared in her eyes. Even if I, Liu Qiyue, were to die, I won’t make it easy for you!

She held her divine bow in one hand and an arrow in the other.

“Die!” She was prepared to die. In her Phoenix’s Nirvana state, her body and soul constantly grew stronger. She was in a constant state of epiphany as her insights into her Fire Dao kept increasing.

She strafed Blackrock with one arrow after another, trying her best to unleash even mightier arrows.

Blackrock’s towering body cracked from the shots. Pits—that spanned two to three feetblasted open. To the 1000-foot-tall Blackrock, the tiny holes on his body were not worth mentioning. As for the phoenix flames, they were naturally absorbed into his body. He was unafraid of fire.

“Your husband truly is a coward. He abandoned you and fled.” Blackrock charged over as his voice echoed throughout the Dragonwater Domain. Clearly, he was furious. Although killing Liu Qiyue was a meritorious deed, it was far inferior to killing Meng Chuan.

“It’s foolish for two people to die together. Ah Chuan will live and avenge me.” Liu Qiyue was just about to shoot another arrow when she saw a lightning-clad figure rapidly fly over from afar.

That lightning-clad figure was extremely fast! He was so fast that Liu Qiyue couldn’t clearly see who it was, but she still knew who it was. She couldn’t help but shout anxiously, “Ah Chuan, leave!”

“You’re here?” Blackrock turned his gigantic rock head and looked in pleasant surprise. He also saw a lightning-clad figure rushing towards Liu Qiyue.

He’s fast! Blackrock’s heart skipped a beat. He had a bad feeling because Meng Chuan was too fast! Even when suppressed by the Dragonwater Domain, he is still faster than Regis Godfiends? Blackrock was extremely alarmed. How fast would he be outside the domain? Is he faster than Creation Supremacies?

Swoosh.

Meng Chuan quickly circled around Blackrock and arrived beside Liu Qiyue. Only then could one see his appearance clearly.

A dark-red Quintessential Essence covered Meng Chuan’s body. He seemed to emit a dark-red glow. This scene was very familiar to Blackrock because Marquis Godfiends could protect themselves very well with Quintessential Essence when fighting.

Darkstar Quintessential Essence? Blackrock was stunned. He’s become aMarquis Godfiend? He was a Great Solar Godfiend just moments ago, and now he’s a Marquis Godfiend? Blackrock knew very well how dangerous it was to break through from the Great Solar realm to the Darkstar realm. Humans had to enter seclusion before breaking through. They couldn’t be disturbed during their breakthrough. Even demon monarchs had to enter seclusion to break through from the third Firmament to the fourth Firmament. They needed to be careful during breakthroughs.

Meng Chuan’s newfound strength instantly left Blackrock in disbelief.

“Ah Chuan.” Liu Qiyue couldn’t believe it either. She could sense the terrifying power within the dark-red nebulae around her husband’s body. His aura was the same as the Marquis Godfiends she knew.

“You made a breakthrough?” Liu Qiyue was a little afraid.

“I’ll take you out of this Dragonwater Domain.” Meng Chuan smiled. “You can stop casting Phoenix’s Nirvana.”

His wife, Liu Qiyue, stopped casting Phoenix’s Nirvana. However, Meng Chuan’s Marquis Godfiend status still left her a little confused. He directly broke through while in battle? How could Ah Chuan be so rash? What if he failed?

Time to go. Holding his wife’s hand, his Darkstar Quintessential Essence enveloped his wife as he rushed out of the Dragonwater Domain.

His wife didn’t need to withstand the immense pressure because he could use his Darkstar and Darkstar Quintessential Essence to do all that for him! He could borrow the wave’s strength to aid in their escape. No matter how strong the Dragonwater Domain was, Meng Chuan could still move at 30% of his maximum while carrying his wife.

Swoosh.

Meng Chuan was too fast! At 30% of his maximum speed, he was considered one of the fastest Regis Godfiends! Meng Chuan could be said to be the fastest in the world!

Chapter 241 - Fastest in the World

“Alright.” Liu Qiyue nodded with anticipation. Of course, she was excited to be able to live on. She still wanted to accompany her husband in battle and watch their children grow up.

As he watched Meng Chuan escape with his wife, Blackrock’s body shrunk to the size of an ordinary person. At the same time, he dispelled the Dragonwater Domain.

I need to leave. Blackrock immediately burrowed into the ground.

Meng Chuan was still 2.5 kilometers away.

The moment Blackrock drilled into the ground, Meng Chuan arrived at the spot where he had burrowed. He covered 2.5 kilometers in the blink of an eye.

Meng Chuan opened his third eye—the Divine Eye of Lightning. He immediately probed the ground with his electromagnetic domain. He probed a quarter-kilometer deep underground. Meng Chuan’s electromagnetic domain quickly discovered that Blackrock had only managed to burrow 300 feet underground.

Found you. A cold glint flashed in Meng Chuan’s eyes. Protected by his Darkstar Quintessential Essence and Darkstar domain, Meng Chuan burrowed in the ground and chased after Blackrock.

Meng Chuan has become a Marquis Godfiend. His speed is unparalleled. If I’m caught by him, a Regis Godfiend will come as well.I’ll be in danger of dying. Blackrock knew this very well. Therefore, he waited for Meng Chuan to escape the Dragonwater Domain with Liu Qiyue before immediately dispelling the domain and burrowing into the ground.

Many things obstruct Godfiends from scanning the underground on a large scale. The various probing methods-Essence Soul domain, Darkstar domain, and Quintessential Essence domain-will are greatly weakened when used to scan the underground. Even if I’m only 100 feet away from him, he won’t be able to sense me. Blackrock was filled with confidence.

The earth was the foundation of the world; it could bear the growth of all things. It was so dense and heavy that it almost completely suppressed all domains. The domains that were only slightly weakened were extremely impressive.

King White Treasure cultivated the Samsara Divine Body. The reconnaissance technique he created was the Nine Heavens, Ten Earths. The technique contained the mysteries of the world, which was why its effects were only slightly weakened when used to scan underground.

Meng Chuan’s electromagnetic domain was a divine power. It spanned 2.5 kilometers aboveground. It had a tenth of its range underground-a quarter-kilometer. This was considered a rather small reduction in effectiveness. The earth didn’t suppress the electromagnetic domain very much.

Huh? Although electromagnetic fluctuations could not be seen with the naked eye, a fourth Firmament demon monarch could isolate all auras and distort light. Naturally, he could detect electromagnetic fluctuations.

Electromagnetism and light were closely related.

A domain? Blackrock was alarmed. Dense electromagnetic waves swept past him-he could not hide at all.

Meng Chuan burrowed through the ground. Although soil impeded his underground travel, it wasn’t as obstructive as the Dragonwater Domain. With his Darkstar domain, Meng Chuan moved at 70% of his maximum speed underground; thus, he easily caught up to Blackrock.

As a Great Solar Godfiend with a perfected Lightning Devastator Fiend Body, I could match the speed of a Regis Godfiend. As a Marquis Godfiend, I should be the fastest in the world. However, I estimate that my speed is on par with a Creation Supremacy. Meng Chuan didn’t know how fast a Creation Supremacy was, so it was just a guess. Any information regarding Creation Supremacies was a secret. All he knew was the tip of the iceberg.

According to records, he could travel five kilometers in a second as a newly-advanced Marquis Godfiend with a Lightning Devastator Fiend Body! However, Meng Chuan was different. It might’ve been because his Godfiend body had been forged with nine bolts of heavenly lightning. It was also because his body was extremely strong, so his meridians could withstand greater bursts of Quintessential Essence; thus, making him even faster.

It was also possible that the electromagnetic field-generated by every particle space in his body-had been strengthened.

In short, Meng Chuan could reach 7.5 kilometers in a second! His speed was extremely terrifying. A typical Regis Godfiend could only travel about one kilometer in a second. Among Regis Godfiends, moving 1.45 kilometers in a second was considered relatively fast! Moving two kilometers in a second? That was considered extremely fast among Regis Godfiends.

My greatest advantage is speed. I’m much inferior in other aspects. Meng Chuan was very clear-headed. He understood this when he chose his cultivation path. When dealing with an enemy, I have to attack the enemy’s weaknesses with my strengths! For example, this greater demon monarch can’t be injured easily. I can’t do anything about it. However, I can follow it. It can’t escape me. It will die once a Regis Godfiend arrives.

As he chased, Meng Chuan constantly requested for help through his token. This allowed the Regis Godfiend to know his exact location. After all, his position was constantly changing because he was chasing after Blackrock.

Boom!

Suddenly, a sledgehammer flew towards him.

Meng Chuan had kept the Divine Eye of Lightning open the entire time. Thus, he naturally noticed his opponent’s attack through his electromagnetic domain. With a flash, he easily dodged the hammer. To Meng Chuan, the soil was as much an obstacle to him as the air was an obstacle to mortals.

To think that you are also skilled in domains. You are able to track me while underground. Blackrock’s eyes were filled with anger. In that case, either you die, or I die.

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan moved like a ghost. No matter how Blackrock attacked, Meng Chuan stayed 100 feet from him.

“Do you only know how to dodge? Do you not dare to fight me?” Blackrock roared. Suddenly, without any warning, he opened his mouth and spat out a golden flame. It burned the soil and rocks. It was thanks to this fire-type divine power that he dared to devour Liu Qiyue’s phoenix flames.

Meng Chuan thought nothing of it. His Darkstar domain easily repelled the golden flame, causing it to move slower and slower. The flame was extremely hot and could incinerate many objects. However, with the Darkstar domain repelling the golden flame, it was unable to deal any damage to Meng Chuan. Meng Chuan prevented the golden flame from coming close to him.

When Blackrock had used the Dragonwater Domain, water filled the entire region. If he wanted to use this flame-type divine power, he would’ve needed to make the water avoid it. Otherwise, the golden flame’s power would be greatly reduced when it collided with the water.

“In close combat, it’s useful against demon monarchs,” said Meng Chuan indifferently. “However, that golden flame is a joke to Marquis Godfiends.”

Blackrock suddenly stopped and sent a voice transmission. “As long as you spare me, I’m willing to destroy my demon core and hand over all my treasures to you.”

“You will definitely die today. No one can save you,” said Meng Chuan. “Then, I’ll destroy a human city before I die. A county city is about 15 kilometers from where we are. I’ll kill all the mortals there,” said Blackrock. “Eastcalm Prefecture City is 65 kilometers from here... I’ll storm my way there.”

“I said that you would definitely die today!” said Meng Chuan. “It’s impossible for you to reach the county city.” “Damn it.” Blackrock roared as he soared towards the surface. He rapidly rushed up hundreds of feet toward the surface.

After returning to the surface, he transformed back into his 1000-foot-tall mountain demon form. He took a huge step with his legs—which resembled heavenly pillars-and charged towards the nearest county city. The ground quaked as he ran.

Some of the mortals in the wilderness watched as the giant mountain demon dashed forward. They couldn’t help but be stunned.

Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!

Water killed the mortals Blackrock discovered in a 2.5-kilometer radius as he ran towards a county city.

This made Meng Chuan’s expression turn colder. He could not let this greater demon monarch live!

Why hasn’t the Regis Godfiend arrived yet? Meng Chuan requested for help again through his identity token. If I let the greater demon monarch enter a county city, everyone in the city will die. I have to do my best to stop it.

Meng Chuan transformed into a phantom and charged at Blackrock.

Huh? Upon seeing this, Blackrock was delighted. Two sledgehammers appeared in his hands as he immediately swung them towards Meng Chuan. With a poof, Meng Chuan’s figure dissipated.A fake? Blackrock’s eyes were filled with solemnity.

Many Meng Chuans appeared around Blackrock. He allowed Blackrock to swing his sledgehammers. The sledgehammers had terrifying might, but they failed to touch Meng Chuan’s true body.

Rip!

Meng Chuan executed Tiger Roar Stance and the saber beam pierced Blackrock’s body, producing a ten-foot-long rift. However, it was only five feet deep! Following that, the rift quickly closed.

As a newly-advanced Marquis Godfiend, I am as strong as a peak Marquis Godfiend after casting a forbidden Godfiend spell and using the Power of Essence Soul. However, my attacks can only tickle it?

Slash! Slash! Boom!

Blackrock’s body was covered in cracks and craters. Meng Chuan’s attacks were clearly much stronger than Liu Qiyue’s arrows, but Blackrock thought nothing of them. His massive body easily recovered. I can’t touch him at all! Blackrock was annoyed as well. Meng Chuan’s movements were too agile and ghostly. At that moment, a black stream of light rushed over from afar. It was King Luyuewho had rushed over with all his might.

I’ve arrived.Meng Chuan and his wife are right in front. King Luyue saw the towering mountain demon monarch from afar. He couldn’t help but feel relieved. From the Patroller token, he could sense that Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue were still alive. I’m not too late!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 242 - The Fate of Greater Demon Monarch Blackrock
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

King Luyue first saw Blackrock. When he was closer, he saw the tiny Meng Chuan.

The 1000-foot-tall Blackrock was like a mountain. In front of him, Meng Chuan was indeed very ‘tiny.’

The two continued to run across the wilderness as their powers spread out in all directions.

Darkstar domain? King Luyue stared at the dark-red nebulae surrounding Meng Chuan in shock. Meng Chuan has become a Marquis Godfiend? Furthermore, this greater demon monarch can’t touch him at all. He’s even fleeing while fighting. The greater demon monarch is the one fleeing while Meng Chuan chases after it?

King Luyue was astonished. The situation before him was completely unexpected, but he still rushed over to help immediately.

King Luyue. As Meng Chuan attacked Blackrock continuously, he discovered a black-haired elder within his 2.5-kilometer-wide electromagnetic domain; it was the familiar King Luyue.

Meng Chuan immediately sent a voice transmission. “Senior Brother Gu, quickly attack and kill this great demon monarch.”

When King Luyue was 2.5 kilometers away from meng Chuan, he couldn’t help but sigh when he sensed the existence of the electromagnetic domain. This newly-advanced Junior Brother Meng Chuan actually has such a strong reconnaissance domain?

King Luyue’s arrival excited Meng Chuan. He’s finally here.

However, Blackrock despaired. I originally planned on burrowing into the ground to escape, but Meng Chuan is actually good at underground reconnaissance. I wanted to rush to the nearest county city and use the mortals as hostages, but this Regis Godfiend arrived. Blackrock sighed inwardly. If only I were not a mountain demon, but a demon that specializes in escaping, how good would that

be?

In the human world, escaping was the most important ability for demon monarchs. Although mountain demons were very strong in head-on assaults, they were very ordinary when it came to escaping.

When humans request for help, powerful Godfiends will immediately rush over. As for me? It’s impossible for a demon sage to come. Blackrock stopped running. With a flip of his hand, a token appeared in his gigantic stone palm. His token could only pinpoint his current location, determine whether he was alive, and allow him to request for help.

Demon monarchs’ requests for help were divided into different ranks, such as Marquis Godfiend threat, Regis Godfiend threat, and Creation Supremacy threat.

That was all their tokens could do.

The demons’ system for reinforcement requests is a joke. Blackrock clenched his fist.

Crack!

His token shattered as he looked at Meng Chuan—who had already retreated to the side. Meng Chuan has already become a Marquis Godfiend. With his Essence Soul cultivation talent, he will probably become more and more terrifying in the future... He will become a calamity for us demons.

If I’m going to die, why should I care about the fate of the demons? In the eyes of demon sages and Imperial Lords, us fourth Firmament demon monarchs are not worth mentioning

A long time ago, he was forced to infiltrate the human world through an unstable World Entrance. At that time, he was only a second Firmament demon monarch. He had no right to choose. Rejecting meant death!

In the human world, he lay dormant and cultivated silently. He obediently listened to his superiors’ orders so that he could obtain treasures, allowing his cultivation to progress further. He had become a third Firmament demon monarch, then a fourth Firmament demon monarch. He had even gained the right to command all demon monarchs in the Great Zhou Dynasty. He even thought that his value to the demons’ upper echelons would drastically change once he became a fifth Firmament demon monarch.

The black-haired elder-King Luyuelevitated in midair. Black ripples emanated out from King Luyue’s body, causing Blackrock to panic.

“Demon Monarch, you have a chance to live,” said the black-haired elder.

“Live?” Blackrock was stunned.

Meng Chuan and his wife, Liu Qiyue, met up. They were stunned when they heard that.

“Ah Chuan, King Luyue wants to let that demon monarch off?” asked Liu Qiyue.

“Let’s listen.” Meng Chuan remained calm. The best choice was to kill Blackrock because he knew of his Essence Soul cultivation talent.

“How can I live? You’ll let me go?” Blackrock sneered. “I’ve never heard of you humans letting demon monarchs go.”

“There are two ways for you to live,” said King Luyue with a smile. “One, i’ll send you to Archean Mountain. You are to give up control willingly without any resistance. We humans can control your Essence Soul. From then on, you will be absolutely loyal to humans. We will naturally trust you.”

“Control my Essence Soul? Like those avian demon monarchs?” Blackrock sneered, but he was tempted by the offer.

He would be absolutely loyal to whoever controlled his Essence Soul. Humans could easily control demon monarchs that had yet to condense an Essence Soul. However, demon monarchs with Essence Souls were a lot more troublesome to control. Typically, a demon monarch with an Essence Soul had to be willing and have zero resistance to being controlled before there was any hope of controlling them.

“The second method is to enter one of Archean Mountain’s several grotto-heaven worlds. You can enter a grotto-heaven world and cultivate there. Without Archean Mountain’s permission, you are unable to contact the outside world. You have to live there your entire life,” said the black-haired elder.

“Live in a grotto-heaven world?” Blackrock was somewhat tempted. He knew that Black Sand Grotto-Heaven’s headquarters was in a large grotto-heaven world.

Archean Mountain was the most ancient human sect. It also had many grotto-heaven worlds. After entering, he naturally couldn’t leave without permission. However, he would be far away from the war. As a mountain demon, he liked to stay in a place without moving. He would be quite pleased to stay motionless for ten years.

“Why are you willing to keep me alive?” asked Blackrock.

“It’s because of the intelligence you will provide,” said King Luyue with a smile. “It’ll be of great help to humanity. Thus, you will naturally be allowed to live.”

“I want to meet a Creation Supremacy,” said Blackrock.

“Alright.” King Luyue smiled and nodded.

Blackrock had returned to the height of a normal human. His demonic powers were sealed and followed King Luyue without any resistance.

“Haha. Junior Brother Meng, you are very impressive.” King Luyue brought Blackrock and flew to Meng Chuan and his wife.

Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue glanced at Blackrock.

“In the blink of an eye, we are already senior and junior brothers.” King Luyue smiled at the couple. “You have done a great deed this time. Typically, most fourth Firmament demon monarchs in the human world have just broken through. For a fourth Firmament demon monarch to have the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiend, it must’ve lurked in the human world for many years to reach this stage. There are very few fourth Firmament demon monarchs with such strength.

“If it weren’t for you attacking it, it would probably have fled long ago. That would’ve resulted in countless mortals and many Godfiends dying.”

“Qiyue was forced to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana,” said Meng Chuan. “I was forced to make a sudden breakthrough. I was lucky enough to become a Marquis Godfiend. That’s how I managed to prevent it from escaping.”

“A sudden breakthrough?” King Luyue was alarmed.

“That’s right.” Blackrock stared at Meng Chuan with a complicated look. “This Meng Chuan of your human race is truly a monster. Under the threat of death, he reached the Realm of Dao. Then, he forcefully broke through to the Darkstar realm. Even when suppressed by the Dragonwater Domain, he was still faster than me while carrying his wife. Even though I fled underground, he could still find me. I lost to him fair and square.”“A way to scan the underground on a large scale?” King Luyue’s eyes lit up. “Meng Chuan, how deep can your technique probe?”

Now, humans were in desperate need of Godfiends that were skilled at underground reconnaissance. King White Treasure from Black Sand Grotto-Heaven had a battle record that was better than all the other Godfiends of his sect combined. From this, one could tell how useful an underground reconnaissance expert was.

“I’m only capable of probing a quarter-kilometer deep. I’m far inferior to King White Treasure,” said Meng Chuan.

“Just a quarter-kilometer?” King Luyue frowned slightly.

A quarter-kilometer was less than 1000 feet. Meng Chuan would be more useful aboveground than conducting underground reconnaissance.

“Senior Brother Gu, are you planning to bring this greater demon monarch to Luo Tang City Pass?” asked Meng Chuan. “Since you have become a Marquis Godfiend, come with me,” said King Luyue. “If you go there, you will meet Supremacy Luo Tang along with Supremacy Qin Wu.”

“Alright.” Meng Chuan smiled and nodded. “I do plan on making a trip.”

His Essence Soul cultivation talent was a secret. His master had also instructed him to keep it a secret. Since Blackrock knew of his Essence Soul cultivation talent, he naturally had to report it to Supremacy Qin Wu.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 243 - I Have a Life-Preserving Treasure?
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Junior Brother Meng, why don’t you do the honors? You are faster,” said King Luyue with a smile.

Meng Chuan nodded. “Okay.”

Meng Chuan’s Darkstar domain enveloped the four of them, and with a whoosh, they transformed into a bolt of lightning and headed straight for Luo Tang Pass.

King Luyue and Blackrock were somewhat alarmed. To fly at such insane speeds while carrying the three of them was truly unbelievable.

“You are still much faster than me despite carrying the three of us,” said King Luyue wistfully. “It’s no wonder that Lightning Devastator Fiend Body Marquis Godfiends are at the top of the world in regards to speed. In this day and age, only when one is fast can they protect a larger territory. It’d be good if we humans had more powerful Godfiends that cultivate the Lightning Devastator Fiend Body. Unfortunately, it’s too difficult to cultivate.”

“It’s difficult.” Meng Chuan nodded.

The 12 transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies could be separated into three different cultivation difficulty levels. The Phoenix Divine Body and the Dragon Divine Body were in a different category altogether because one required the prerequisite bloodline just to begin cultivating them.

Next, the five more difficult transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies: Samsara Divine Body, Great Strength Fiend Body, Archean Divine Body, Lightning Devastator Fiend Body, and Thirteen Swordbane Fiend Body. Very few Godfiends mastered these Godfiend bodies. Among the Marquis Godfiends and Regis Godfiends in the world, there weren’t more than a handful of them. For example, Meng Chuan was currently the only Lightning Devastator Fiend Body Marquis Godfiend in the world.

The last five transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies are the easiest to cultivate out of the 12 transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies. Xue Feng, Yan Jin, Xiao Yunyue, Yan Chitong, and others, cultivated one of these lower-difficulty transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies.

“Luo Tang Pass.” Meng Chuan and company saw Luo Tang Pass from afar. It was an extremely bustling and beautiful city. In recent years, since the demons had invaded the human world en masse, many people had moved to Luo Tang Pass. Many towns had appeared around Luo Tang Pass.

“Luo Tang Pass’s population has exceeded 20 million.” King Luyue looked down and sighed. “Over the past few years, too many people have rushed here.”

“The population of Jiang State Capital, Wu State Capital, and many other state capitals have increased greatly over the past few years,” said Meng Chuan. “The populations of Jiang State Capital and Wu State Capital are now more than ten million. However, it isn’t easy to provide for ten million people daily. The most lacking resource is food! We need more people to produce food.”

“Yes, food.” King Luyue nodded. “I heard that several of our Archean Mountain’s grotto-heaven worlds are currently planting food. Unfortunately, the grotto-heaven worlds are rather small. The foundation of those worlds is limited. The amount of food that can be grown in our grotto-heaven worlds is far inferior to what the outside world can produce. There is plenty of land here, but with the demons wreaking havoc...”

Meng Chuan nodded. Luo Tang Pass, some state capitals, and prefectures had a large increase in population, causing them to become more and more prosperous. However, this prosperity came with massive costs. The total human population was actually declining, and the living environment in other places was much worse.

“City Lord Manor.” King Luyue pointed at the most conspicuous building complex. “Supremacy Luo Tang is there. I’ll bring you there.”

Whoosh.

The group of four flew to City Lord Manor and landed in a pavilion.

“The demon monarch and I will stay here for now.” King Luyue smiled as he pointed at the limestone road ahead. “Follow this path and enter the garden in front. You will see the two Supremacies. The two Supremacies want to meet you first.”

“Senior Brother Gu, we will head over first.” Meng Chuan led his wife, Liu Qiyue, over to the garden. They walked across the limestone road and entered the garden.

In the garden, they could see an illusory Supremacy Qin Wu sitting opposite Supremacy Luo Tang as they played chess.

“Come, it’s your turn.” Supremacy Luo Tang became more confident after she made a move.

The illusory Qin Wu frowned as he pondered his next move. Every time he appeared, Luo Tang forced him to play chess. It always left him with a headache.

“Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue are here.” Qin Wu immediately put down his chess piece and smiled at the couple. “Luo Tang, let’s get down to business first.”

Luo Tang could only turn to look at Meng Chuan and his wife.

“Greetings, Master, Supremacy.” Meng Chuan bowed respectfully.

“Greetings, Master, Aunt-Master.” Liu Qiyue was equally respectful.

“Tell me what happened,” said Qin Wu with a smile. “From the looks of it, both of you have changed drastically.”

Meng Chuan and his wife exchanged looks before Meng Chuan took the initiative to say, “Qiyue and I received a request for help from Eastcalm Prefecture’s Zhenyou County. Therefore, we immediately rushed over. To our surprise, a fourth Firmament demon monarch as strong as a peak Marquis Godfiend was hiding there. It used its domain to trap us. It wanted to kill us, so Qiyue was forced to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana...”

The entire ordeal was explained in detail.

“I chased after the greater demon monarch and waited for Senior Brother Gu to arrive,” said Meng Chuan.

“You broke through during such a dire situation?” Qin Wu and Luo Tang exchanged looks as they felt a lingering fear.

Such actions were really risky. Archean Mountain had placed many hopes on Meng Chuan.

“There was nothing else I could do. I wanted to save Qiyue,” said Meng Chuan. Although Liu Qiyue felt that her husband had taken a huge risk, she still felt delighted.

“Thankfully, you have a third-level Essence Soul. It’s much stronger than a first-level Essence Soul that’s needed to become a Marquis Godfiend.” Qin Wu shook his head. “Don’t take such risks in the future. Your life isn’t just yours. It affects many others as well.”

Meng Chuan said, “I understand. By the way, I used the Soul-Vanquishing Spike to deal with the greater demon monarch. It knows about my third-level Essence Soul.”

“Remember to keep your third-level Essence Soul a secret.” Qin Wu looked at Liu Qiyue. “Liu Qiyue, if this secret is leaked, it will bring great trouble to your husband.” “I’ll definitely keep it a secret.” Liu Qiyue nodded.

“Although you have experienced some danger, it’s a joyous occasion for us humans to see the both of you become Marquis Godfiends,” said Qin Wu with a smile.

“Both of us become Marquis Godfiends?” Meng Chuan was taken aback.

Luo Tang laughed. “You might not be aware of it, but your wife has already condensed an Essence Soul.”

Meng Chuan looked at Liu Qiyue.

“Yes.” Liu Qiyue smiled and nodded. “When I maintained Phoenix’s Nirvana, my soul kept strengthening. Now, I have condensed an Essence Soul.”

Since Liu Qiyue had an Essence Soul and had reached the Realm of Dao, she only needed to enter seclusion and break through to the Darkstar realm.

“The reason why she was able to condense an Essence Soul so quickly was because she cast Phoenix’s Nirvana for a long time,” said Luo Tang. “She lost 18 years of her lifespan. Typically, one wouldn’t need to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana for so long. After her strength increases greatly, she should immediately stop casting Phoenix’s Nirvana after shooting a handful of arrows at her enemies. Typically, she would only lose one year of her lifespan.”

“She lost 18 years of her lifespan?” Meng Chuan looked at Liu Qiyue.

Liu Qiyue was one year younger than himshe was only 37 years old. However, she had lost 18 years of her lifespan after casting Phoenix’s Nirvana?

Liu Qiyue smiled. “Marquis Godfiends have a 300-year lifespan.”

“Two Marquis Godfiends are much more useful. Archean Mountain’s arrangements for the two of you will also change,” said Qin Wu with a smile. “Return to Gu Mountain Prefecture City and wait. Your new arrangements will be decided soon.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue nodded. They were proud that they could be of greater use.

“Meng Chuan, give me your identity token,” said Luo Tang suddenly.

Meng Chuan was slightly puzzled. He took out his identity token and placed it on the chessboard.Every Archean Mountain disciple had an identity token. They could use it to request for help, and it also allowed Archean Mountain to keep track of whether they were alive or not.

Whoosh.

Luo Tang flipped her hand and took out an illusory golden sword from Meng Chuan’s identity token.

“This is?” Meng Chuan was astonished. He had never realized that an illusory golden sword had been hidden in his identity token. Just looking at the illusory golden sword made Meng Chuan feel suppressed and horrified.

It held a terrifying might.

“Your master thinks highly of you.” Luo Tang shot a glance at the illusory Qin Wu. “Before you left the mountain, he gave you this treasure to protect you from any accidents that befell on you.”

Meng Chuan understood that he actually had a treasure that could save his life. Before this, he had no idea of its existence at all.

“If you had known about this treasure, how would you hone your strength?” asked Qin Wu with a smile. “To be honest, I hoped that you would never need to use it. However, now that you’ve become a Marquis Godfiend, this treasure won’t be of much use to you. Your strength and life-preservation means should be enough to guarantee your safety now. This treasure can only kill ordinary fifth Firmament demon monarchs.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 244 - Of Great Use
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue were secretly astonished by the illusory golden sword. They had never heard of such a treasure before.

The illusory golden sword did not have any requirements on the user’s strength. One just needed to carry it. Once it activated, it could kill a fifth Firmament demon monarch.

The Skydemon Sect only has two fifth Firmament Skydemons. The Skydemon cultivation system is much weaker than the demon monarch cultivation system. The two sect masters are probably barely comparable to ordinary fifth Firmament demon monarchs. In other words, a Skydemon Sect Master will be killed by this treasure if they attack me personally?

“Archean Mountain has very few of such treasures,” said Luo Tang. “That’s why I said your master thinks highly of you.”

“Thank you, Master,” said Meng Chuan gratefully.

“You didn’t use it, so I managed to save it for later,” said Qin Wu with a smile. “By the way, how fast are you after becoming a Marquis Godfiend? Show me your speed.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan instantly moved. A bolt of lightning flashed above City Lord Manor, and Meng Chuan returned to his original position.

“You’re much faster than all the Marquis Godfiends that had cultivated the Lightning Devastator Fiend Body in history.” Luo Tang and Qin Wu’s eyes lit up as they exchanged looks.

“It’s all thanks to the physical body mystic technique that Master bestowed upon me. It’s very helpful for my movement techniques,” said Meng Chuan.

Qin Wu and Luo Tang naturally knew that he was referring to the physical body cultivation system he obtained from Archean Eon Grotto-Heaven. Qin Wu pondered for a moment and asked, “Are you willing to accept even harder missions in the future?”

Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up. He said, “I can’t wait to kill more demons.”

Killing a demon monarch would save countless people.

A little more hardship? Meng Chuan was naturally willing

“Okay.” Qin Wu and Luo Tang were satisfied. “The two of you can return to Gu Mountain Prefecture City first. After Liu Qiyue becomes a Marquis Godfiend, remember to send a letter to me. Note down the title you want in the letter as well. Otherwise, the Imperial Court will decide your title for you.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue immediately left.

Qin Wu and Luo Tang watched the two leave.

“Meng Chuan is really fast. He’s much faster than me,” Luo Tang couldn’t help but praise. “His speed is almost the same as yours.”

Qin Wu smiled. “His speed is several times that of a Regis Godfiend. He’s about ten times faster than a Marquis Godfiend. He will be ten times faster than other Marquis Godfiends when it comes to providing help. Other Marquis Godfiends might’ve only traveled 150 kilometers by the time he travels 1500 kilometers.”

“How do you plan on using him?” Luo Tang asked.

“Great power comes with great responsibilities,” said Qin Wu. “I plan on handing over six states’ rescue missions that require a Marquis Godfiend to him.”

“Six states?” Luo Tang nodded. “Even if it’s six states, he will arrive within five minutes.”

“Six states... The Marquis Godfiends responsible for those areas will be freed up,” said Qin Wu. “Up to ten Marquis Godfiends will be free after Meng Chuan takes over. Liu Qiyue can also be in charge of guarding a state capital; this will free up another Marquis Godfiend. Our Archean Mountain will have an additional 11 Marquis Godfiends to deploy anywhere.”

“Eleven Marquis Godfiends?” Luo Tang’s eyes lit up as she said excitedly, “We will have more manpower and can do a lot more.”

“It is indeed very helpful that they’ve become Marquis Godfiends.” Qin Wu was rather delighted

Following that, the two Supremacies finally met Greater Demon Monarch Blackrock.

“Greetings, human Supremacies. I’m Blackrock.” Blackrock was extremely respectful.

“As long as your information is important enough, you can live,” said King Luyue. “Quickly tell them everything.”

Blackrock looked at the two Supremacies. “King Luyue promised me that I could live in a grotto-heaven world.”

“What he says is our will.” Qin Wu smiled. “Don’t worry. We won’t trick a mere fourth Firmament demon monarch like you,” said Luo Tang

“Yes.” Only then did Blackrock relax. He said, “Supremacies, I was originally in charge of commanding all demons in the Great Zhou Dynasty.” Luo Tang and Qin Wu’s eyes lit up.

“Do you know where all the demon lairs in the Great Zhou Dynasty are located?” asked Luo Tang

“How is that possible?” Blackrock shook his head. “Every demon lair is a secret. Other than those that reside in each demon lair, not even the demon Imperial Lords know about them. Only by doing so can we ensure absolute secrecy and security. However, I know the distribution of demon monarchs in the Great Zhou Dynasty. I know their general information. Also, I know who the strongest demon monarch hiding in the human world is.”

“Who is it?” asked Qin Wu immediately, “Is it a fifth Firmament demon monarch?”

“A demon sage! Demon Sage Nine Abyss!” Blackrock said, “However, he’s very careful. He rarely attacks.”

“Demon Sage Nine Abyss?” Qin Wu and Luo Tang exchanged looks as their expressions changed.

Less than ten people in the Demon Realm knew of the demon sage that had infiltrated the human world through possession.

Until now, humanity did not know of this secret.

“Demon Sage Nine Abyss has cultivated for more than 1,300 years,” said Qin Wu. “Even if it’s a super-large city pass, a demon sage’s true body isn’t able to enter. Therefore, there’s only one possibility-Possession!” “It snuck into the human world by possessing a weak demon monarch and slowly recovered its strength?” Luo Tang nodded slightly. “Ultimately, it isn’t the demon sage’s true body. Therefore, it’ll be very difficult for the demon sage to recover to its peak strength. However, it’ll be relatively easy for it to have the strength of a fifth Firmament demon monarch. It seldom makes a move because it’s afraid of Creation Supremacies. When the demon sage recovers to its peak strength, it will probably be much bolder. It will also attack more frequently.” “Yes.” Qin Wu nodded softly.

“Where is Demon Sage Nine Abyss?” asked Luo Tang urgently.

“He’s in a small grotto-heaven world,” said Blackrock. “He often moves about. The last time I met the demon sage, he was in the South Sea.”

“Do you have a way to meet him again?” Luo Tang stared at Blackrock.

“Impossible,” said Blackrock. “We have to be summoned by the demon sage before we can head over. We will be ordered to go to a specific spot. Following that, spacetime will warp, and we will arrive at the small grotto-heaven world! Furthermore, I already crushed my identity token. The demon sage should know that my mission has failed.”

“Warping spacetime?” Luo Tang was astonished. “The demon sage has a treasure that can affect spacetime?”

Qin Wu shook his head gently. “A mobile, miniature grotto-heaven, a spacetime treasure, and other such treasures are bestowed by demon Imperial Lords. It’s an old fellow that has been a demon sage for many years. We won’t be able to find it since it is so careful when summoning the greater demon monarchs under its command.”“There will definitely be a way of finding it now that we know of its existence.” Luo Tang pondered. “We have to work with Two World Island and Black Sand Grotto-Heaven on this matter.”

Three days after returning to Gu Mountain Prefecture.

Liu Qiyue entered seclusion, preparing for her breakthrough. Meng Chuan had prepared certain items for his breakthrough, but he now gave them to his wife since he no longer needed them.

Qiyue has reached the Realm of Dao. She has also condensed an Essence Soul. Due to casting Phoenix’s Nirvana, her body is extremely powerful. Although she has lost 18 years of her lifespan, she’s only 37 years old. Her body’s vitality is still at its peak. There’s no reason for her to fail. Meng Chuan sat in a pavilion, drinking alone as he waited silently. At 60 years of age, a Great Solar Godfiend’s vitality would gradually decline. Therefore, the probability of becoming a Marquis Godfiend gradually decreased once a Great Solar Godfiend was over the age of 60. The older one was, the unlikelier it would be for them to become a Marquis Godfiend.

Meng Chuan consoled himself, but he still felt uneasy. After experiencing the breakthrough from the Great Solar realm to the Darkstar realm, he knew how dangerous it was.

She has to succeed. He couldn’t think about his wife’s possible failure.

Creak. A door-not far away-opened. Liu Qiyue walked out and smiled at Meng Chuan. A dark-red nebula surrounded her body.

Meng Chuan stood up in joy. He knocked over the alcohol flask beside him, causing the alcohol to spill.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 245 - Marquis Couple (Final C.of Volume)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

3rd September, the Imperial Court’s messengers arrived at the Meng family’s ancestral mansion. The Meng family’s elders led their clansmen to welcome them.

The ambassador loudly announced the two marquisate conferments!

“Young Master Meng Chuan has been conferred the title of marquis? His wife has also been conferred the title of marquis?”

“A marquis couple?”

Upon hearing the messengers’ announcement, many people were shocked. How high was the status of a Marquis Godfiend? How rare was it?
