In the entire Wu State, there were only three Marquis Godfiends alive. For two Marquis Godfiends to originate from Eastcalm Prefecture? It was something that the entire Eastcalm Prefecture could brag about for 1000 years.

“Have you heard? Senior Brother Meng Chuan has become a Marquis. His wife has also become a Marquis.”

“A marquis couple, and on the same day at that. This is truly unbelievable.”

“I don’t dare hope to become a marquis, much less marry a marquis as a wife. I’ll be satisfied as long as I can become a Godfiend.”

“You should work hard to reach the Mortal Shedding realm first. Marquis? Ha!”

Inside Mirror Lake Dao Academy, a group of Dao Academy disciples discussed Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue.

Since Meng Chuan had once cultivated here, Mirror Lake Dao Academy had grown in strength and size over the years. It became the undisputed number one Dao Academy in Eastcalm Prefecture. With a large number of people moving into the city, there five times as many disciples in Mirror Lake Dao Academy compared to when Meng Chuan’s time.

The Dao Academy continued to expand over the years. However, land in Eastcalm Prefecture City was too precious. Thus, the Dao Academy could no longer expand.

“Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue have become Marquises?” In a small building in Mirror Lake Dao Academy, Yun Qingping was writing when she suddenly stopped to listen to the discussions outside. She was the same age as Meng Chuan. She was already 38 years old this year.

In the blink of an eye, 20 years have passed. Back then, I felt that Meng Chuan would become more and more powerful. Now, he has already become a Marquis Godfiend. Even Liu Qiyue has become a Marquis Godfiend. Yun Qingping stopped writing and looked out the window blankly.

Twenty years. She had gone from being the eldest daughter of the Yun family to a lecturer in Mirror Lake Dao Academy. She had experienced a lot. She had set her mind on cultivation and worked hard to become a Godfiend. However, as she grew older, she realized that she didn’t have what it took to become a Godfiend. She became a Mirror Lake Dao Academy lecturer and worked hard to teach her disciples.

What about me? It’s been 20 years. I’ve already reached the Impervious realm. I haven’t even achieved Sword Force. It’s probably not bad if I can achieve Sword Force before I turn old. Yun Qingping laughed self-deprecatingly. Humans are indeed different. The best I can achieve in life is what Meng Chuan achieved when he was young.

In the past 20 years, she had completely fallen out with her father and left the family to roam the world with her sword. She had once fallen in love, but because of the demons, she was alone again. She hated the demons to the bone...

She once wanted to become stronger, to become a Godfiend, and kill demons. However, she realized her limited potential and became a lecturer at Mirror Lake Dao Academy.

I’m weak, but I can still teach batches of disciples. I hope that some of my disciples will become Godfiends and kill more demons. Yun Qingping continued writing. She taught every disciple very seriously, and she was very well-liked in the Dao Academy. Even after 20 years, nobody dared to publicize Meng Chuan and Yun Qinping’s annulled engagement because they were afraid that they would offend the Meng family.

Therefore, the young disciples in Mirror Lake Dao Academy didn’t know the relationship between their Lecturer Yun and Meng Chuan.

Over the years, the population in Jiang State Capital had surged-exceeding over ten million people. In terms of population in the Great Zhou Dynasty, Jiang State Capital was ranked in the top ten.

“Jiang State Capital.” Meng Chuan’s family descended past the clouds and looked down at the magnificent city.

“That’s Meng Manor, our future home.” Meng Chuan pointed at a manor that spanned an extremely wide area. There was a lake in the manor, which showed how big it was.

“How big.” Meng Dajiang marveled. “This is the state capital. Every inch of land is worth its weight in gold, yet we are living in such a big compound?

“I’ve been to Jiang State Capital before. I’ve never seen such a big compound in the vicinity of Starmoon Lake,” said Liu Yebai.

The family landed in front of the manor.

“Meng Manor.” Meng Chuan, Liu Qiyue, Meng Dajiang, Liu Yebai, and the two toddlers looked at the manor entrance. The signboard above the entrance had the words “Meng Manor.”

A thin man quickly ran out of Meng Manor. He was an Indestructible Godfiend. He bowed respectfully to Meng Chuan and his wife, and said, “Greetings Marquis Eastcalm and Marchioness Calmmoon.”

“Is this newly built?” asked Meng Chuan. “Yes.” The thin man said immediately, “It was built on the orders from Archean Mountain. They have compensated the various families in the vicinity of Starmoon Lake and moved them to other parts of the city. Archean Mountain won’t bully mortals. Several Godfiends built this manor personally. It was built within a month. Also, Starmoon Lake is in the manor. This way, Marchioness Calmmoon will be able to practice her archery in the manor.”

Meng Chuan nodded and led his family inside.

“This mansion is rather large,” said Meng Dajiang. “From the sky, it looks much bigger than our Meng family’s ancestral mansion, and this manor is in Jiang State Capital.”

“Compared to Marquis Eastcalm and Marchioness Calmmoon, this is nothing,” said the thin man beside him with a smile.

“It’s so big. There are too few of us staying here,” said Meng Chuan. “Dad, you can arrange for thousands of clansmen from Eastcalm Prefecture to stay here. Such a large compound... It will be a lot more lively when there are more people. Our family will stay here for a long time.”

“Alright.” Meng Dajiang nodded. There would still be plenty of space even if thousands of people lived in a large Godfiend manor that spanned several kilometers. That day, a group of Godfiends came to pay their respects to Liu Qiyue. “Greetings, Marchioness Calmmoon.”

The dozen or so Godfiends were extremely respectful. Liu Qiyue sat in the seat of honor and flipped through a dossier. She indifferently said, “According to Archean Mountain’s arrangements, I will be in charge of Jiang State’s Earth Net from now on. However, I need to guard Jiang State Capital and have other matters to attend to. Therefore, Earth Net intelligence dossiers are to be delivered to the manor every day. I will read them carefully. You can settle day-to-day matters directly. I will decide on important matters.”

“Yes,” said the Earth Net Godfiends respectfully.

“Alright, you are dismissed.” Liu Qiyue nodded. From now on, she would be stationed in Jiang State Capital and guarded over ten million people. As a newly-advanced Marquis Godfiend, Liu Qiyue could unleash the strength of an ordinary Regis Godfiend after casting Phoenix’s Nirvana. All the major families in Jiang State Capital welcomed this new Marquis Godfiend.

As for commanding Earth Net? It was just a routine matter! The ordinary Godfiends settled all the miscellaneous matters. She just needed to monitor them.“All the Earth Net Godfiends have left?” Meng Chuan sat in his study and flipped through a dossier; it was from Archean Mountain.

“It’s normal for them to visit me, a nominal leader,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile. “In fact, I’m still very relaxed. My main job is to guard Jiang State Capital. Ah Chuan, you’re much busier than me.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded. “In the future, my designated 1500-kilometer-wide rescue area will be centered around Jiang State Capital. There are a total of 119 prefectures. In fact, it’s equivalent to six states. Master really trusts me. He trusted me enough to rescue cities in six different states.”

“The other Marquis Godfiends need to buy their own land and build their own manors. Archean Mountain gave us a large manor. If the mission was easy, I’m afraid there wouldn’t be such a good thing,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile.

“Yes.” Meng Chuan put down the dossier and gently pulled his wife into his arms. “Qiyue, we will be staying in Jiang State Capital for the foreseeable future.”

“I’m only guarding Jiang State Capital. You have to protect six states. Be careful,” Liu Qiyue said softly. “Don’t worry. Your husband is quite skilled when it comes to escaping,” said Meng Chuan with a smile.

Liu Qiyue leaned into Meng Chuan’s embrace and closed her eyes, enjoying the tranquility.

Final Chapter of Volume-Marquis Eastcalm Meng Chuan

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 246 - 114 Seconds
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

20th September.

In a dilapidated county city in Hu State, several plumes of smoke rose into the sky. This county city only had a population of about 20,000 people, and they all hid in the underground tunnels as per normal protocol.

A cat demon wantonly massacred humans.

About half a kilometer away from the cat demon monarch was a dilapidated restaurant. From afar, five demon monarchs watched the scene on the top floor.

“The cat demon is busy massacring humans. A Godfiend team will soon arrive. We will cast forbidden spells the moment we take action,” said the skinny leader in a deep voice.

“Archean Mountain’s Godfiend teams are very powerful. They have excellent teamwork. Brother, isn’t the time limit of 150 seconds a little too short? Why don’t we increase it a little? How about 240 seconds?”

“That’s right. Once 150 seconds are up, we have to retreat. That’s too little time! Last time, we killed a Godfiend. The remaining three Godfiends were clearly much weaker. If we had spent another 30 seconds attacking them, we would have definitely wiped them out. However, you still want us to retreat after 150 seconds are up. We have been in the human world for more than a year, but we only managed to kill one Great Solar Godfiend.”

“Fool! Brother is being careful. Only by being careful can we live long. Once a Marquis Godfiend arrives, we won’t be able to escape,” retorted a demon monarch.

“In the human world, survival is of utmost importance,” said another demon monarch.

The skinny leader looked into the distance with his dark yellow eyes. He indifferently said, “You have to listen to my orders if you’re in my team. No matter how tempted you are, you have to retreat after 150 seconds are up. This is my rule.”

“They’re coming.”

“The Godfiends are here.”

The five demon monarchs saw a huge bird flying over from afar. Four Godfiends jumped down from the sky.

“It’s a Great Solar Godfiend team. Attack,” ordered the skinny man.

In the human world, there were very few elite demon monarch teams. These elite demon monarch teams consisted of the 300 elite demon monarchs that Demon Sage Nine Abyss had personally received when they entered the human world. Over a hundred elite demon monarch teams were formed and scattered throughout the human world. There were only a few dozen elite demon monarch teams in each dynasty’s territory. Every elite demon monarch team was extremely cautious and wouldn’t take action easily.

If they saw a Marquis Godfiend arrive, they would immediately burrow into the ground. Some demon monarchs were adept at escaping underground.

This five-man elite demon monarch team would only attack when a Great Solar Godfiend team arrived.

Pfft.

The cat demon monarch fled in panic, but a sword beam killed it. The cat demon monarch was split in half, and the corpse fell into a ruined building.

At that moment, five figures suddenly attacked the Godfiend team from hundreds of feet away. At the same time, red mist permeated a half-kilometer area and enveloped the four Godfiends.

“Not good. Request for reinforcements.” The Godfiend team was very experienced. They immediately requested for help. At the same time, they cast forbidden Godfiend spells and resisted the attacks.

They did not seek success; they just hoped for nobody to make a mistake. Based on experience, Archean Mountain’s Godfiend teams were generally weaker than elite demon monarch teams.

Although there was usually one person in a Godfiend team that had the strength of a weak Marquis Godfiend when they went all-out and the Godfiends worked well together, the elite demon monarch teams were still stronger. In an elite demon monarch team, typically, two demon monarchs had the strength of a weak Marquis Godfiend. Some also had strong divine powers.

“They will naturally retreat after we hold on for a bit longer.”

“If they don’t retreat, a Marquis Godfiend will arrive.” The Godfiend team was very confident in their chances of survival. They didn’t wish to kill their enemies; they just wanted to stall for time.

In a situation where the strength difference wasn’t too great, there was some hope of stalling for enough time.

“Kill!” The five demon monarchs went completely mad.

The leader, the skinny demon monarch, transformed into an illusory shadow as he attacked crazily and strangely. A bear demon monarch brandished his axe and cleaved down. The other three demon monarchs also executed various attacks.

“Ah, the leader of this elite demon monarch team is too fast. Its claws are too ruthless.” A dual-wielding Godfiend resisted with great difficulty. A wound appeared on his arm. The robe bestowed by Archean Mountain had been torn. It showed how powerful the demon monarch’s claws were. “My right arm is injured. I can’t last much longer.”

“Leave the demon monarch leader to me. Junior Brother Lu, hold back the other two demon monarchs.” said an elderly Godfiend —that held a shield and a battle saber.

Time passed as the four Godfiends supported each other.

Thirty seconds, sixty seconds, ninety seconds...

“Ugh.” The Godfiend—who had been injured earlier-saw his arm flying. This caused the expressions of the other three Godfiends to change drastically.

“Junior Brother Lu!”

“Senior Brother Lu!”

“Kill them within 150 seconds.” The five demon monarchs were overjoyed. As long as one Godfiend lost their peak combat strength, they would be able to kill the other three Godfiends.

Huh? The five demon monarchs suddenly sensed something. They looked over and saw a blurry lightning-clad figure appear. The figure stood on a dilapidated street in the county city. Before they could even make out the blurry figure’s appearance, they saw a billowing black baneful aura transform into five black serpents that coiled around the five of them. Two demon monarchs froze to death on the spot. The remaining three were greatly weakened by the baneful aura and the Darkstar domain. The three remaining demon monarchs—who barely survived-felt suffocated.

Not good. It’s only been 114 seconds. How did a Marquis Godfiend arrive so quickly? The two weaker demon monarchs died on the spot in despair as a saber beam pierced their heads.

The demon monarch leader escaped quickly as he despaired. The closest prefecture city is 390 kilometers away. A Marquis Godfiend usually takes 300 seconds to arrive. It’s only been 114 seconds. How did a Marquis Godfiend arrive so quickly? Could he be guarding this prefecture? If he was guarding this prefecture, why would a Godfiend team be sent to rescue this county city instead of a Marquis Godfiend?

The skinny demon monarch didn’t understand why a Marquis Godfiend had arrived so quickly.

Humans had lacking manpower. Godfiend teams were usually responsible for patrolling two or three prefectures. Marquis Godfiends typically guarded two to three prefectures and were also responsible for rescuing any Godfiend team nearby.

If this prefecture was guarded by this Marquis Godfiend—who had rescued the Godfiend team—then the Godfiend team wouldn’t have even been sent over in the first place.

Pfft.

A saber beam penetrated the demon monarch’s glabella. His body withered before turning into dust and scattering. Only then did Meng Chuan walk to the other four demon monarchs’ corpses. He slashed each of them and let Demon Slayer absorb two demon monarchs’ blood.

“Uncle-Master Meng.” The four Great Solar Godfiends were overjoyed when they saw Meng Chuan. Marquis Eastcalm, Meng Chuan! He was the fastest in the world! Who didn’t know that?

Meng Chuan smiled at them and saw the Godfiend missing an arm. He couldn’t help but say, “Quickly go to Archean Mountain and treat your injuries.”

“Haha, it’s just a minor injury. It’s all thanks to Uncle-Master Meng this time. If not, we would be in big trouble.”

“Uncle-Master Meng’s speed is indeed unparalleled. You arrived in less than 150 seconds.”

They were overjoyed and shocked. Meng Chuan had taken only 114 seconds-a very short amount of time—to travel 1720 kilometers!

Five minutes was 300 seconds. Most Marquis Godfiends would only travel slightly over 50 kilometers in 114 seconds. It was equivalent to traveling from Jiang State Capital’s southern city wall to its northern city wall. Since their speed only amounted to that, most Marquis Godfiends were unable to rescue Godfiend teams in time.Therefore, this elite demon monarch team had chosen to retreat after 150 seconds. They were already extremely cautious compared to other elite demon monarch teams.

Unfortunately, Meng Chuan was now responsible for rescuing Godfiend teams in six different states! Meng chuan was much faster than even Regis Godfiends!

Meng Chuan’s speed made the demon monarchs in the six states very uncomfortable. They only fought Godfiends for a short while before Meng Chuan arrived.

Meng Chuan’s constant speedy rescues and demon monarch massacres caused the demons to feel pained by such losses.

Two months later, the demons’ upper echelons gave an order to all elite demon monarch teams that were suspected to be within the six states Meng Chuan governed. “When attacking Godfiend teams, one had to retreat after 60 seconds are up.”

Sixty seconds? What could they do in 60 seconds? It wasn’t even enough time to destroy a city. A third Firmament demon monarch could only run a dozen or so kilometers in 60 seconds.

If Meng Chuan was within 500 kilometers of an attacked city, he would arrive at an attacked city within 60 seconds.

Therefore, some elite demon monarch teams decided to distance themselves from Meng Chuan’s suspected rescue range. They had to do this because they were too easily caught. Meng Chuan was simply too fast.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 247 - Assassination
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

December. Night at Jiang State Capital.

Liu Qiyue waited in one of Meng Manor’s halls.

“Oh?” Liu Qiyue sensed something and looked outside the hall. She saw Meng Chuan walking across the snow.

“You haven’t slept yet?” asked Meng Chuan with a smile.

“Of course. I have to wait for you,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile. “You rushed out in a hurry. Were you out on a rescue?”

Meng Chuan shook his head. “No. An Earth Net spy discovered a demon monarch lair. He immediately reported it. Archean Mountain arranged for me to go. There were five third Firmament demon monarchs, 17 second Firmament demon monarchs, and some ordinary demons.”

“How far away were they from us?” asked Liu Qiyue.

“2,600 kilometers,” said Meng Chuan. “In An State.”

“You went so far?” Liu Qiyue frowned.

“First of all, I’m very fast. Traveling that distance isn’t much for me. We also can’t afford to wait or there might be some unpredictable changes. The faster I act, the better. Secondly, it’s hard to tell which demon monarchs reside in the demon monarch lair. It might even be a fourth Firmament demon monarch. It’s dangerous for weaker Marquis Godfiends to barge in,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. Although he was a newly-advanced Marquis Godfiend, Meng Chuan was capable of unleashing the strength of a peak Marquis Godfiend. His life-preservation means were also strong.

“Most importantly, in the six states, I’m the one that has the most spare time. I get a request for help once every ten days or so,” said Meng Chuan wistfully. Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but sigh. “I’ve looked into it. There are very few instances of elite demon monarch teams attacking in the surrounding ten states.”

“My rescue area spans 1500 kilometers, and Jiang State Capital is at the center. This is a secret. The demons aren’t aware of it, so they can only estimate my designated rescue range... Therefore, the elite demon monarch teams in these ten states are startled at the slightest sound. They are afraid that I will rush over immediately,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. “Archean Mountain is also cunning. Occasionally, they will send me to help areas that are over 1,500 kilometers away to confuse the demons.”

Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but say, “They actually made you travel more than 2,500 kilometers away.”

“If something is real, we should make it seem fake. If something is fake, then we should make it seem real,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. “This is a concept Archean Mountain abides by. It’s good that we can give the demons headaches.”

“You alone rescue 20 to 30 percent of the Great Zhou Dynasty’s cities. This will affect the surrounding areas as well. The demons will definitely treat you as a thorn in their side,” said Liu Qiyue. “You have to be careful. Last time, the demons sent Great Demon Monarch Blackrock to assassinate you. If you really provoke the demons, they might make a move on you in the future.”

Meng Chuan smiled. “Speaking of Greater Demon Monarch Blackrock, Archean Mountain gave me 50 million credits, and this was after the reward was shared equally with King Luyue. It looks like this Blackrock was worth 100 million credits.”

Meng Chuan chased and kept Blackrock at bay, and King Luyue captured him alive! According to Archean Mountain’s distribution rules, 50 percent of the rewarded credit would be given to those that discovered or tracked down demon monarchs. The other 50 percent of the rewarded credit was given to those responsible for killing or capturing said demon monarchs alive.

“A fourth Firmament demon monarch is worth ten million. It looks like it had treasures worth 90 million credits,” said Liu Qiyue.

“I don’t know what treasures it had, but they were worth so many credits.” Meng Chuan sighed. “In addition, I killed six elite demon monarch teams in the past two months and obtained quite a lot of spoils of war that I exchanged for credits. Now, I have nearly 90 million credits. I don’t even know how to spend it.”

“Look at how smug you are.” Liu Qiyue smiled.

“Here.” Meng Chuan flipped his hand and handed a brocade pouch to Liu Qiyue.

Liu Qiyue was stunned. “What’s this?”

“Open it and take a look.” Meng Chuan pretended to be mysterious.

Liu Qiyue opened the brocade pouch and saw ten crystals—which emitted a fiery red glow. This surprised Liu Qiyue. “Blood Fire Crystals?”

After becoming a Marquis Godfiend, Liu Qiyue needed resources to cultivate her Phoenix Divine Body. For example, the phoenix feather was something that could only be found by chance. As for Blood Fire Crystals, Phoenix Divine Body Marquis Godfiends historically used them for cultivation. Blood Fire Crystals could strengthen one’s phoenix bloodline. One Blood Fire Crystal cost three million credits. It was very expensive. Ten Blood Fire Crystals was 30 million credits.

“This is enough for you to cultivate for ten years,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. “Use them first.”

“Ah Chuan.” Liu Qiyue looked at him. She was touched, but she also exhorted him, “In the future, tell me first if you need anything. I’ll accumulate credit myself.”

Meng Chuan smiled and nodded. “Don’t worry. I understand.”

At this moment, a maid came in with a meal tray.

“I ordered someone to cook porridge,” said Liu Qiyue. “Have some porridge first.”

With that said, she placed one of the two bowls of porridge in front of Meng Chuan. She placed one bowl in front of herself before smiling at Meng Chuan.

She watched her husband eat first.

How fragrant! Meng Chuan held the bowl and drank half of the porridge in one gulp. He felt the fragrance of porridge fill his mouth. The lit candle beside him also emanated an odorless gas. As he breathed it in, the gas entered his body, mixing with the porridge... Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but smile as she watched Meng Chuan enjoy the meal. She picked up her spoon and began eating. “Don’t eat it.” Meng Chuan waved his hand. With a crash, the bowl of porridge in front of Liu Qiyue flew off the table and shattered on the ground.

Liu Qiyue was shocked.

Meng Chuan’s face had blackened. Blood-colored patterns surfaced on his body as though countless worms were wriggling.

“Ah Chuan!” Liu Qiyue was alarmed.

Boom! Boom! Boom!

Meng Chuan immediately struck himself seven times as his Quintessential Essence surged violently.

Pfft

Meng Chuan opened his mouth and spat out a mouthful of black blood. Organ fragments could be seen mixed in the black blood. A large mouthful of black blood landed on the ground, and a huge crater immediately appeared on the ground.

Chi! Chi! Chi

A black, sanguine mist rose from Meng Chuan’s body. The poisonous mist surged out from every pore on Meng Chuan’s body. Eighty percent of his blood instantly evaporated. Ordinary Godfiends wouldn’t have survived such serious injuries.

Pfft. Pfft.

Meng Chuan spat out two more mouthfuls of blood. His body became thinner as he closed his eyes.

His thin body and pale face began to recover at speeds visible to the naked eye. His body turned muscular again, and his face gradually turned rosy. What a powerful poison. Meng Chuan opened his eyes and looked at the corroded crater on the ground. He then looked at the bowl of porridge on the ground.“Ah Chuan, are you alright?” Liu Qiyue was a little flustered.

“It’s nothing.” Meng Chuan said, “Most Marquis Godfiends won’t be able to escape death after consuming this poison. It’s so potent that it’s unbelievably terrifying. Investigate what poison it is. The porridge and the candle on the ground have to be preserved properly. Let Archean Mountain’s poison experts investigate its origins.”

“Alright.” Liu Qiyue nodded. “Are you really alright now?”

“Don’t worry. I cultivate a physical body mystic technique. Even if the poison was five times more potent, it wouldn’t kill me,” said Meng Chuan. He immediately used his Quintessential Essence to cut and isolate all his poison body parts the instant the poison seeped into his body. He even sliced off parts of his organs. He lost over half his blood. After expelling all of the poison from his body, his powerful vitality restored his body rapidly. Meng Chuan looked at Liu Qiyue. “If you had drunk this bowl of porridge, you’d be in big trouble.”

Just the thought of it made Meng Chuan shudder. If his wife had consumed it, would her Phoenix Divine Body be able to withstand it? It was said that the Phoenix Divine Body was very powerful when it underwent Nirvana. It could be said to be an immortal’s body, but Meng Chuan wasn’t confident.

“Our food is repeatedly inspected from the moment it’s purchased. Even if it is poisoned during the cooking process, birds and beasts will sample it first. They actually managed to poison our food,” Liu Qiyue said solemnly. “I’ll get people from Earth Net to investigate carefully.”

Meng Chuan nodded. “Such lethal poison is definitely extraordinary. Those who are willing to pay such a huge price are most likely demons. Carefully investigate how the demons infiltrated. Also, I feel that the manor isn’t safe. It isn’t suitable for You’er and An’er to stay here.”

“You’er and An’er?” Liu Qiyue’s heart stirred.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 248 - Ten Years
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Yes.” Solemn, Meng Chuan said, “The demons hate me to the core. If they do everything they can but are still unable to get rid of me, it’s very likely that they will take revenge on our children. The demons are ruthless and evil. They can and will do anything to exact revenge on me.”

“Ah Chuan, you guard six states and have great influence in this region. You alone are much more useful than a Regis Godfiend,” said Liu Qiyue seriously. “The demons will definitely not give up. We might as well hide You’er and An’er. Even the clansmen in the manor don’t know about our children… The Skydemon Sect can forget about finding out where our children are.”

“There are more than ten million people in Jiang State Capital. There are all sorts of people here,” said Meng Chuan. “I’ll find an ordinary manor and let You’er and An’er live there. We will usually live there so that we can take care of them.”

“Yes.” Liu Qiyue’s eyes lit up. “I’ve always been worried about You’er and An’er. They live in Meng Manor and have always been accompanied by a retinue. They are placed on a pedestal because their parents are Marquis Godfiends. I’ve been afraid that they would become proud and complacent. It will be detrimental to their growth. Now that they’re only two years old and still unaware of the world, we can pretend to be an ordinary family to nurture their characters. At the very least, they can be more down-to-earth.”

“Once they reach the Mortal Shedding realm, we can tell them everything,” said Meng Chuan. “After all, once they reach the Impervious realm, they will probably head to Archean Mountain to cultivate soon.”

“Can both of them enter Archean Mountain?” asked Liu Qiyue as she smiled.

“Let’s nurture and train them well. In this era, helping them possess sufficient strength will be the best gift we can give them,” said Meng Chuan. He had seen demon monarchs slaughtering humans too many times.

“Yes.” Liu Qiyue also understood what her husband was getting at.

In the foreseeable future, the war would likely become crueler.

“Oh? They’re here.” Liu Qiyue walked out of the study and saw a large group of people from Earth Net enter. Three Earth Net Godfiends led the group towards them.

“Marchioness Calmmoon.” The three Earth Net Godfiends bowed respectfully.

At that moment, Meng Chuan began cleaning up the bowl of porridge and the candle.

“This bowl of porridge and that candle combine to form a lethal poison. Even Marquis Godfiends might die if they are poisoned,” said Liu Qiyue coldly. “Investigate the origins of this poison. How did this poison make it to Marquis Eastcalm and I?”

The three Earth Net Godfiends were extremely shocked.

Marquis Eastcalm and Marchioness Calmmoon had just survived an attempted assassination?

“Yes.” The three Earth Net Godfiends respectfully acknowledged her orders.

Earth Net was responsible for investigating everything. They were experts at this. Even Great Solar Godiends that were proficient with illusions in Jiang State Capital helped investigate this matter.

Archean Mountain also sent Godfiends to investigate.

In just three days, the results were out.

The poison was Gold Horn Worm Poison. It was unique to the Demon Realm. Demon experts had to carefully produce this special poison. This poison required one to kill thousands of demon monarch-level Golden Horn Worms for a chance of refining the poison. In the Demon Realm, Golden Horn Worms were a rare species. A portion of Golden Horn Worm Poison was equivalent to 150 million Archean Mountain credits. Even a treasure like the Dragonwater Domain only had a value of 60 million credits.

Once the Golden Horn Worm Poison entered one’s body, it rapidly destroyed every part of the victim’s body. A Marquis Godfiend would die within seconds.

Even if one were a Phoenix Divine Body expert, they would be too late to save themselves if the poison reached their brains. Only Marquis Godfiends that cultivated the Indestructible Divine Body had a high chance of surviving the body. The rest were practically doomed. Such a potent poison was meant for cultivation. However, it was suitable for assassination because it was colorless and odorless. It was quite a significant loss for the demons to use it to assassinate a Marquis Godfiend.

The demons were willing to make such sacrifices just to kill Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue. Unfortunately for them, Meng Chuan had reached the physical body cultivation system’s Divine Power realm. His life-preservation means far exceeded the demons’ expectations.

Jiang State Capital, a manor that spanned just over an acre. It was ordinary in every way.

“Little You’you, Little An’an, this will be our home in the future.” Meng Dajiang and Liu Yebai brought Meng You and Meng An along as they played around. Meng You and Meng An ran around the yard happily. Meng Chuan and his wife watched this scene with a smile.

“Come, learn from Dad, and swing the saber.” Meng Chuan taught his son and daughter, Meng You and Meng An-who were both only three years old. They held a wooden saber each and swung them excitedly.

Let’s try again. Meng Chuan patiently taught them. He had personally sharpened the two wooden sabers.

When Meng You and Meng An were four years old, they had decided on the weapon they would wield in the future.

Meng An liked spears. His elder sister, Meng You, was more fond of swords.

They aren’t going to use sabers. Meng Chuan was helpless.

“You’re good at close combat. After attaining the Realm of Dao, you can use other weapons skillfully,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile. “I rarely engage in close combat. I’ll have to rely on you to teach them close-combat skills.”

“Don’t worry.” Meng Chuan smiled and said, “Be it spear or sword, in the early stages, they are just an application of strength. Furthermore, it’s only an extension of one’s arm. It’s the same for the Realm of Unity, Realm of Force, and the Realm of Intent. In each realm, they learn how to use their strength more intricately until they can affect the outside world. The Heart Intent Saber’s Yin-Yang Transformation is based on one’s intent. I’m still very confident in teaching them the basics. There’s no better master in Jiang State Capital than me!”

In just half a month’s time, Meng Chuan had created a set of basic spear arts and a set of basic sword arts. They contained the principle of Yin and Yang.

“How dare you slack off! Turn around and raise your buttocks!” Meng Chuan’s veins bulged as he roared angrily.

Meng An turned around and raised his buttocks obediently.

Pa! Pa! Pa! Meng Chuan slapped furiously.

“Stop hitting me. Stop hitting me. It hurts. It hurts.” Meng An finally cried after enduring a few hits. His sister stood at the side, not daring to speak. She also looked scared.

Years passed.

Meng Chuan taught them step-by-step. They reached Foundation Establishment at four years of age, Internal Tempering at six, and Marrow Cleansing at eight. They entered the Green Elm Dao Academy—the closest dao academy to their home. In public, they were thought to be ten years old! However, in reality, two years were added to their real age. In a large city with a population of over ten million, reaching the Marrow Cleansing realm at ten years of age wasn’t too conspicuous.In the blink of an eye, it had been ten years.

They still lived in the same manor. Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue were having breakfast when the boy and girl quickly finished eating.

“Dad, Mom, we are going to the Dao Academy.” Meng You and Meng An stood up. “Go.” Meng Chuan smiled at his children.

Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue hadn’t changed in the past ten years, but their children had grown up.

Now 12 years old, Meng An and Meng You had reached the peak of the Mortal Shedding realm! Of course, everyone in Green Elm Dao Academy believed that the twins were 14 years old! But, they were still considered Green Elm Dao Academy’s geniuses.

“Meng An and Meng You are stronger than us back when we were their age.” Meng Chuan looked at the withered leaves floating down from the trees in the courtyard and sighed. “They will probably reach the Impervious realm next year. Their cultivation speed is rather good if they can reach the Impervious realm at 13 years of age.”

“I wonder when they will gain insight into Force,” said Liu Qiyue. “Junior Brother Yan Chitong attained Force at the age of 13. I wonder if Meng An and Meng You will be able to catch up to Junior Brother Yan.”

“I’ve taught them everything that needs to be taught. They have to rely on themselves to reach the Realm of Force. The further they go on their cultivation path, the less help we can provide,” said Meng Chuan.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 249 - Send Her To Me
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“We can spend time with them for the next ten years or so. When they head to Archean Mountain, we won’t get to spend much time with them,” Liu Qiyue said softly, feeling unwilling to part with them.

“When the children grow up, they will ultimately have to walk their own paths,” said Meng Chuan. “After reaching the Mortal Shedding realm, they will know that we are both Marquis Godfiends. Although they will be very excited, they still have to keep it a secret at the Dao Academy. They won’t be able to bully others because of their power. Both of them have good temperaments. Our two children are truly outstanding.”

“Okay.” Liu Qiyue nodded. As their children grew up, the couple realized that they had less time to spend with their children.

“I’m going to practice my archery.” Liu Qiyue stood up.

“Let’s go together. I want to practice my saber arts too,” said Meng Chuan.

The couple left the small manor. There were usually only two servants inside.

After returning to Meng Manor, they cultivated next to Starmoon Lake.

No matter how much he theorized about saber arts, it wasn’t as good as actual practice! After practicing over and over again, Meng Chuan knew that his talent in saber arts was considered at the genius level. However, he was inferior to Xue Feng, Yan Chitong, and the others. He naturally needed to put more effort into it and didn’t dare slack

off.

In the evening, at Green Elm Dao Academy.

Meng You, Meng An, and the other disciples walked out of the Dao Academy together. At that moment, a multi-colored bird was flying in midair and looking down. It was another third Firmament avian demon monarch that Meng Chuan and his wife had exchanged for from Archean Mountain. It was secretly following the twins and was responsible for protecting them. It was also stronger than the gray bird Meng Chuan and his wife had exchanged for previously. The gray bird took human form. It took on the identity of Liu Qiyue’s personal female attendant, Aunt Hui. Aunt Hui was the one responsible for relaying information to her.

The multi-colored bird took human form and acted as Uncle Hua. Occasionally, it would use the identity of the twins’ elder to deal with Green Elm Dao Academy.

“Junior Sister Méng, Junior Brother Méng, we are having a gathering at Rotten Stone Garden tonight. Are you guys going?” asked a blue-robed youth at the entrance of the Dao Academy.

“We still have to return. Father and Mother are very strict with us,” said Meng An with a smile. The siblings followed their parents’ instructions and had used the names Méng You and Méng An to cultivate in the Dao Academy. The Skydemon Sect was everywhere. The couple had done their best to protect the two children by making them use a different surname-Méng.

“The two of you are still too young. You don’t understand how things work.” The blue-robed youth had a sword by his waist as he boarded a luxurious carriage. A carriage driver and six guards escorted the departing carriage.

“Junior Sister Méng, let’s spar again tomorrow,” said a red-robed girl with a smile. Following that, she boarded a carriage. It, too, had a carriage driver and guards.

In front of the Dao Academy’s entrance, many descendants of ancient Godfiend family clans were escorted by an entourage.

Jiang State Capital had two Marquis Godfiends— Liu Qiyue and Meng Chuanpresiding over it. Liu Qiyue could unleash the strength of an ordinary Regis Godfiend by casting Phoenix’s Nirvana. Meng Chuan was known to be the fastest Godfiend in the world. Thus, Jiang State Capital was favored by many large family clans. They arranged for their families to reside in Jiang State Capital. Many children from Godfiend family clans were in Green Elm Dao Academy.

“Let’s go back.” Meng You and Meng An did not mind the blue-robed youth’s words.

The descendants of Godfiend family clans were just that—descendants. As immediate children of powerful Godfiends, Meng You and Meng An had much higher status. Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue even had to think of ways to keep their identities a secret because the Skydemon Sect might assassinate them!

A bustling crowd of disciples still lingered at the entrance of the Dao Academy as they left. As they walked home, the number of disciples accompanying them decreased. “Senior Sister Méng, Senior Brother Méng, see you tomorrow.” On the limestone streets, a young girl smiled and walked towards her house.

UL

“Junior Sister Ning, see you tomorrow,” said Meng You and Meng An with a smile.

“What are you doing?” exclaimed a young girl suddenly. Huh? Meng You and Meng An exchanged looks and walked over. Their parents guarded Jiang State Capital, so it was a very safe city. “Stop, stop!” Junior Sister Ning shouted anxiously because quite a number of people were moving items out of her home.

“Get lost!” roared a black-robed man angrily as he swung his hand towards the girl.

The girl immediately dodged but was still sent flying. Meng You and Meng An immediately went forward to help Junior Sister Ning

“Junior Sister Ning, this is your house, right?” Meng You asked curiously. “I don’t know who these people are. They came and started moving things out of my house,” said Junior Sister Ning anxiously.

“Your house?” The man in black frowned and looked at Junior Sister Ning. “You’re Ning Donggu’s daughter?” The black-robed suddenly said, “Capture her. That old man will repay his debt if we capture her.”

A voice sounded from the courtyard. “Stop, stop!” A middle-aged man with a bruised face rushed out and shouted, “You guys have foreclosed my house and my shop. Isn’t it enough to capture me? Why are you capturing my daughter?”

“Ning Donggu.” The black-robed man sneered. “The money you owe my young master has already reached 30,000 taels of silver because of the interest. Your house and shop might not even be enough. Besides, once your shop is sold to repay the debt, you will probably owe more than 30,000 taels of silver. That’s why we will be holding your entire family captive so that you will obediently work to repay the debt.”

“You did business with my business partner and plotted against me, forcing me to give my palm print.” The middle-aged man was ferocious. “You deliberately stalled for time, disappearing when I was trying to return the debt. Now that you have appeared, you have turned 3,000 taels of silver to 30,000 because of the interest? And the debt will keep increasing? When will it end?”

“You’ll have to talk to my young master.” The man in black smiled and said, “Take Ning Donggu and his daughter away.”

Even Ning Donggu and his wife were caught. In despair, his wife said, “I knew we shouldn’t have done business with Young Master Wang, but you didn’t listen. We are doomed.”

Two muscular men walked towards Junior Sister Ning with cold smiles on their faces, wanting to take her down.

Bam! Bam!

Meng An stepped forward and kicked out twice, sending the two Marrow Cleansing strongmen flying. Meng An—who was at the Mortal Shedding realm-had a robust Godfiend foundation. In terms of strength, he could match a Impervious realm expert. Naturally, he could defeat the two goons easily.

“I heard that there are some people in Jiang State Capital who deliberately scheme and force others into bankruptcy. It’s all a scheme to take their homes.” Meng An looked at the group of people in front of him and scoffed. “You’ve seized the Ning family’s residence and store?”

The man in black looked at the pair of siblings and frowned slightly. “Kid, there are things that you can’t and shouldn’t interfere with.”

“I’ll be interfering in this matter for sure.” Meng An pulled out his bag from behind him and retrieved a spear. He spun the spear, and it immediately reached nine feet long. With the spear in hand, he looked at the group of people in front of him.“Senior Brother Méng!” Junior Sister Ning was starting to panic. “You sure have guts.” A thin man sneered and stepped forward, instantly drawing his saber. Clang! Clang! Clang! However, Meng You suddenly drew her sword. With a flash of her sword, the thin man let out a tragic cry as he retreated. A bloody hole was left in his arm as he glared angrily at Meng You. He immediately said, “This lass is very powerful.”

“Who are you? How dare you meddle in our affairs?” The black-robed man frowned as well.

“Brother, this pair of siblings are from another house a quarter-kilometer away. They are called Méng You and Méng An,” said one of his subordinates softly. “I’ve seen their father before. He’s not famous, but from the looks of it, he should be at the Impervious realm.”

“Méng You, Méng An?” The black-clothed man nodded slightly. His subordinates knew almost all the families in the vicinity. They had their own judgment on which families were fat sheep to be fleeced and which ones they could not touch.

Suddenly, a luxurious carriage escorted by guards came over. The curtains on the carriage were lifted slightly. A pale-faced youth looked outside and asked, “Guard Yu, is everything done?”

“A pair of siblings suddenly interrupted us,” said the black-robed man softly.

“Siblings?” The pale-faced youth looked over and his eyes lit up when he saw Meng You. As Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue’s daughter, Meng You had inherited their extraordinary looks. She had been nurtured since she was young, and she had a robust Godfiend foundation. Her eyes held a spirited look.

“What a stunning little beauty.” The pale-faced youth instructed, “Be careful. Don’t damage her flesh. Send this little beauty to my place. Let’s go!” He lowered the curtain after he spoke.

Chapter 250 Cloud State’s Wang Family and Jiang State’s Xiao Family

Send this little beauty to my place? Meng You and Meng An’s expressions turned colder.

The siblings looked at each other and made their decision. They had to investigate this Young Master Wang properly. They couldn’t let him off so easily!

A group of guards escorted the luxurious carriage away. At the same time, an elderly guard stayed behind, and indifferently said, “Brother Yu, hurry up and quickly do what the Young Master has ordered.”

“Don’t worry,” replied the black-robed man with a smile. At the same time, he glanced at his subordinates and instructed, “Catch them all, especially this young lady. Don’t hurt her.”

“Young lady, our Young Master has taken a fancy to you. If you obediently submit, riches and comfort might await you. If you don’t submit… I’m afraid there will be another corpse in one of the stinky drains in Jiang State Capital tomorrow,” said the black-robed man indifferently. “Jiang State Capital is a place with all kinds of people-good and bad. Countless people die every day. Young lady, I advise you to be wise.”

Meng You and Meng An were alarmed when they heard that. Although they had heard of Jiang State Capital having all kinds of people and how there was a lot of hidden bloodshed, they had never truly seen it before.

Every day, they would be at home or at the Dao Academy!

Now that they had encountered such things, although he was furious, he wasn’t afraid at all. Meng An shouted angrily, “Do you still even fear the law? What happened to the rules of Archean Mountain?”

“Haha…” Those people had mocking looks in their eyes.

The black-robed man’s voice turned cold. “Since you aren’t submitting to us, we can only be rough.”

“No need. I’ll leave with you,” said Meng You coldly.

The black-robed man and the old guard both revealed smiles.

“Sis?” Meng An looked at Meng You.

“Don’t worry. You are someone who caught Young Master’s fancy. Of course, we will take your requests into consideration.” The man in black immediately waved his hand. Soon, an ordinary carriage came over. Meng You, Meng An, and Ning Donggu’s family of three entered the carriage.

“Hurry up.” The elderly guard personally followed the carriage and left.

Inside the carriage.

“Senior Sister Méng! Senior Brother Méng! It’s all my fault for implicating you!” Junior Sister Ning wept.

“I told you to stay away from that Young Master Wang, but you insisted on doing business with him. What should we do now?” The woman was extremely pained.

Ning Donggu knelt in the carriage and kowtowed to Meng You and Meng An.

“No, there’s no need for that.” Meng An hurriedly helped him up. Ning Donggu sighed. “I have implicated the two of you.”

“We were just dealing with injustice, yet they dared to capture us as they pleased. From this, one can tell how reckless they usually are,” said Meng You. “It’s not your fault, Uncle Ning.” Ning Donggu sighed softly. “Young Master Wang’s name is Wang Cong. He’s a descendant of the Wang family, a Regis Godfiend family.” “Cloud State’s Wang family?” Meng You was surprised.

Meng You and Meng An were very familiar with the strongest family clans in the Great Zhou region—the royal family, the Qin family, and the ten Regis Godfiend family clans.

“Yes, Cloud State’s Wang family.” Ning Donggu was very surprised by the siblings’ extensive knowledge. “The Wang family mainly resides in Cloud State. Due to the demon monarchs, the Wang family had a family branch migrate to Jiang State Capital. This branch has hundreds of Wang family clansmen. Leading them is an Indestructible Godfiend, Wang Fanchou. Wang Cong is Wang Fanchou’s grandson.”

“There are plenty of descendants from Jiang State Capital’s Regis Godfiend, Marquis Godfiend, and ordinary Godfiend family clans.” Ning Donggu sighed softly. “One can’t do business here without backing. Since I met Young Master Wang by chance, I wanted to cozy up to him. I was willing to be his goon and give him more than half of the money I earned. All I wanted was a stable business. Who would have thought that Young Master Wang would snatch my family assets and not give me a chance to live?” Ning Donggu’s eyes were filled with hatred.

The woman beside him sighed.

Junior Sister Ning was also crying softly. Their future was dark. No matter how hard the family struggled, there was no hope. Meng You and Meng An exchanged looks.

“We’re here.” The ordinary carriage stopped at an inconspicuous side door of a large manor. Meng You, Meng An, and Junior Sister Ning’s family got off the carriage.

“Please follow me.” The elderly guard smiled as he led Meng You and his sister. At the same time, he said softly, “Young lady, if you do not wish for your brother to encounter any mishaps, you have to be more obedient later.”

Meng You did not say a word.

The elderly guard smiled. He had seen too many similar situations.

In the main hall of the large manor, a group of Godfiend descendants was in a drunken stupor. A group of dancers dressed in thin clothes were dancing barefoot. Their alluring bodies were faintly discernible under the thin clothes, making the Godfiend descendants even more excited.

“Brother Xiao, this is a batch of dancers that Windsay Hall has just nurtured. They are nearly the same height and weight. They cultivate the same cultivation formula, and all of them are virgins.” The pale-faced Wang Cong sat beside a white-robed youth and whispered with a fawning smile, “Brother Xiao, are you interested? You can bring them all back.”

“Brother Xiao, it’s more important that you are happy. I have ways to deal with them.” Wang Cong chuckled.

Young Master Xiao shook his head. “There’s no need.”

“Yes, yes, yes. These are still too pedestrian.” Wang Cong nodded with a smile. The Wang family clansmen that had migrated from Cloud State were only a branch of the family. Thus, they needed to have a good relationship with the local head honcho, the Xiao family.

The Xiao family was Jiang State Capital’s number one Godfiend family clan! It was also one of the Great Zhou Dynasty’s top ten Regis Godfiend family clans. It had long been entrenched in Jiang State Capital.

Young Master Xiao was the only son of the Xiao family’s fifth Elder. He was definitely one of the top Godfiend descendants in Jiang State Capital with a large influence. Wang Cong paled in comparison. “Young Master.” The elderly guard silently appeared in a corner and sent a voice transmission to Wang Cong. “That pair of siblings know better than to resist. They have already been sent to the backyard.”

Wang Cong’s eyes lit up as he nodded at the elderly guard in the corner. Suddenly, Wang Cong’s heart stirred. “One has to take risks to reap the rewards.” Wang Cong was reluctant, but he gritted his teeth and approached Young Master Xiao.

“Hmm?” Young Master Xiao looked at him.

“I have a little beauty here. She slightly resembles Miss Peony that Hundred Flowers Brothel has been promoting recently, but she’s even more outstanding. Miss Peony is still a little pedestrian, while this beauty’s temperament is much better. Young Master Xiao, are you interested?” Wang Cong asked quietly. “Better than Miss Peony?” Young Master Xiao’s eyes lit up.

“I saw her with my own eyes. It can’t be wrong.” Wang Cong smiled mysteriously.

“Yes.” Young Master Xiao nodded slightly. “Brother Wang, thank you.”

“I’ll arrange it for you, Brother Xiao. I’ll invite you over later,” said Wang Cong with a smile. “Please excuse me.”

“Go on.” Young Master Xiao was filled with anticipation.

Wang Cong quietly led the elderly guard to the backyard. “Have you investigated her background?” Wang Cong asked. “They live near the Ning family and come from an ordinary family. The elder sister’s name is Méng You, and the younger brother’s name is Méng An. There’s an old servant at home, a woman who does the groceries and cooking, and an old servant named Uncle Hua who occasionally follows the siblings. Their father, Méng Ning, is not famous in Jiang State Capital. He’s only an ordinary Impervious realm expert,” said the elderly guard. “However, these siblings are considered genius disciples in Green Elm Dao Academy.” “Méng? There’s no one with the surname Méng in Jiang State Capital that I can’t afford to offend.” Wang Cong scoffed. He soon arrived at an independent courtyard.

There were guards in the yard. The door was open, and the siblings could be seen inside.

They obviously knew about the Xiao family. The Xiao family’s newly-advanced Marquis Godfiend-Xiao Yunyue—had a very good relationship with their parents. When Xiao Yunyue returned to Jiang State Capital, she would specially visit Meng Chuan and his wife. She had also brought gifts for the two children. Although the couple kept it a secret and didn’t allow their children to meet outsiders, they still handed Meng You and Meng An the gifts from Xiao Yunyue.

Meng You and Meng An remembered this Aunt Xiao.

The war was cruel. Over the past ten years, many elite Godfiend teams from Archean Mountain had died. However, six Marquis Godfiends had also risen. Yan Chitong and Xiao Yunyue were two of them.

“What a powerful spear art.”

Pfft.

A fast, mirage-like sword thrust forward but was caught between two of the elderly guard’s fingers.

Bam!

Suddenly,

An invisible force enveloped the small courtyard. Wang Cong, the five ordinary guards, and the elderly guard’s expressions changed.

The five guards and Wang Cong also felt a terrifying force surrounding them. It horrified them.

Godfiend!

They could only associate such strength with Godfiends! This was a power that far exceeded mortals.

Whoosh.

Pa!

Wang Cong snapped out of his daze and silently crushed a jade talisman on his chest to seek help. At the same time, he lowered his voice and asked the elderly guard beside him, “Is he the Uncle Hua you mentioned?”

The elderly guard found it unbelievable as well. He whispered, “It’s all information from the subordinates. They say he’s an ordinary old servant.”

A large manor a few kilometers away.

This was the residence of a Regis Godfiend family branch, the Wang family, in Jiang State Capital. The manor was brightly lit with resplendent lanterns. Maids and guards patrolled the residence. Swoosh.

Wang Fanchou instantly rushed out of the chamber.

As an Indestructible Godfiend, he was naturally quite fast. He appeared like a phantom under the night sky. He flashed across roofs, tree crowns, and other places. Soon, he arrived at Wang Cong’s courtyard several kilometers away.

He landed in front of the courtyard and immediately saw seven corpses lying inside. Blood dyed the yard red. Among the seven corpses, six were guards, and one was his grandson-Wang Cong. Wang Cong lay there with his eyes wide open with a bloody hole in his chest.

Cong’er. Wang Fanchou was shocked and furious. He also saw three figures standing in the courtyard.

Meng You, Meng An, and Uncle Hua stood by the side.

“A Godfiend is here?” The old servant, Uncle Hua, frowned slightly when he saw Wang Fanchou arrive. He instantly requested help from Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue through a token.

As an avian demon monarch, it was not suitable for him to handle the internal matters of the human race. He naturally left it to his master to handle.

Chapter 252 - Arrest
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

As the wind howled in the night sky, a few lit candles in a study room could be seen.

Liu Qiyue was flipping through a dossier while her husband was painting.

“I’ll finish the painting tomorrow.” Meng Chuan smiled as he looked at the long scroll. In the painting was Starmoon Lake’s Lake Heart Pavilion. His son, Meng An, had caught a big fish and was excited. His daughter, Meng You, and his wife— Liu Qiyue—were playing chess seriously.

After putting down the brush, Meng Chuan looked out the window and couldn’t help but ask, “Qiyue, why aren’t You’er and An’er back yet?”

Liu Qiyue looked up from the dossier and glanced at the window. She said with a smile, “They must have been delayed at the Dao Academy.”

“It’s already dark. It’s rare for them to be outside this late.” Meng Chuan sensed his son and daughter’s location, and curiously said, “They are in the city. They are more than 15 kilometers away from us.”

“Why did they run so far?” Liu Qiyue put down the dossier in puzzlement.

“Uncle Hua is secretly protecting them. Nothing will happen to them. However, why are they so far away?” Meng Chuan was puzzled. His children would immediately return home after leaving the Dao Academy. Even if they were to go somewhere else, they would inform him first.

Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue’s expressions changed slightly.

They had bought a set of tokens from Archean Mountain to be used in the family. Their son and daughter brought the tokens with them, allowing them to know their children’s location at all times. As for the avian demon monarch, Uncle Hua, he had one too. He could request for help at any time.

“Uncle Hua is summoning us,” said Meng Chuan.

There were different levels of help requests. The lowest level was to request the couple’s present. The higher level meant a more urgent situation. An even higher level request for help meant a life-and-death situation.

Since it was the lowest-level request for help, Meng Chuan and his wife didn’t panic.

“Uncle Hua wouldn’t trouble us if it’s nothing important. Let’s go and see what happened.” Meng Chuan held his wife’s hand and disappeared from the study.

Wang Fanchou stood outside the courtyard and looked at the seven corpses and the bloodstains on the ground. He could not help but be furious. He looked at Meng You, Meng An, and Uncle Hua and angrily shouted, “Did you kill them?”

“Yes,” Meng An replied decisively.

“Little bastard.” Wang Fanchou’s eyes turned red. His beloved grandson had died tragically. Already enraged, he charged over.

The moment he rushed out, he stopped in midair.

A terrifying domain enveloped the courtyard and Wang Fanchou. Wang Fanchou felt like a tiny bug that had fallen into a spiderweb, unable to struggle at all. Shock appeared in his eyes. A young man and woman appeared in the courtyard with sizzling lightning bolts around them.

“Marquis Eastcalm and Marchioness Calmmoon?” Wang Fanchou’s heart skipped a beat. He was only an Indestructible Godfiend, and now, he was facing two Marquis Godfiends! Just their auras indicated the difference in status. His heart palpitated, and his legs went weak. He was only an ordinary Elder of the Wang family. Otherwise, he wouldn’t have been responsible for leading a branch family to Jiang State Capital. Jiang State Capital was quite far away from the Wang family’s central command center—the Cloud State.

“Dad, Mom,” Meng You and Meng An shouted immediately.

The moment Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue arrived, they saw their children holding weapons and seven corpses around them. They felt that something was amiss.

“Master,” Uncle Hua said respectfully, “These seven were ruthless in their attacks. I only acted to save the young master and young mistress.”

Meng Chuan’s heart stirred when he heard that. He couldn’t help but turn to look at Wang Fanchou. Wang Fanchou was suspended three feet above the ground by Meng Chuan’s Darkstar domain, unable to move.

“You’re here to assassinate them too?” Meng Chuan’s eyes were cold.

At that moment, Wang Fanchou figured out the situation. The two teenagers addressed Marquis Eastcalm and Marchioness Calmmoon as their father and mother. They even talked about assassinations?

“No, I’m not trying to assassinate them,” said Wang Fanchou immediately. “Marquis Eastcalm, how would I have the guts? I’m Wang Fanchou from Cloud State’s Wang family.”

“I saw you about to attack.” Meng Chuan waved his hand, and his Darkstar Quintessential Essence instantly attacked Wang Fanchou. Wang Fanchou immediately shouted in horror, “Spare me!”

Following that, the Darkstar Quintessential Essence invaded his body. Wang Fanchou instantly lost consciousness.

Humph.

Meng Chuan waved his hand.

After losing consciousness, Wang Fanchouwhose Quintessential Essence was sealedfell to the side.

“Give me the details?” Liu Qiyue looked at Uncle Hua.

Uncle Hua respectfully said, “This is what happened. On the way home, Young Master and Young Mistress discovered that their Junior Sister Ning from the Dao Academy was in trouble, so they helped her out of righteousness. Who would have thought that this Wang Cong would try to abduct Young Mistress? Young Mistress and Young Master held back and didn’t resist and deliberately came here...”

“We were very angry back then,” said Meng An immediately. “However, Dad, you said that one shouldn’t act based on one’s emotions. You told us to investigate the situation before making a decision. Therefore, Sis and I came here. We had to figure out what kind of person Wang Cong was before we decided on how to punish him. Who would have thought that this person is a wolf in sheep’s clothing? He has harmed countless innocent women. Sis and I could not help but take action. Uncle Hua only took action when we could not defeat them.”

“They do deserve death.” Meng You’s face was filled with anger. “Dying a thousand times isn’t even enough.”

“I killed Wang Cong,” said Meng An. “Dad, if you want to punish somebody, punish me.”

“Alright.” Meng Chuan frowned and looked at Uncle Hua. “Uncle Hua. You’er and An’er’s identities can’t be exposed. From the beginning to the end, you should be able to point out whoever saw You’er and An’er, right?”

“Yes.” Uncle Hua said, “From the beginning to the end, only the seven dead, Wang Cong’s eight subordinates, and Ning Donggu’s family of three, saw Young Master and Young Mistress.”

“Dad, Mom, you can’t harm Junior Sister Ning and her family,” said Meng An immediately. Meng You was also worried.

“Don’t worry.” Meng Chuan smiled and looked at his wife, Liu Qiyue.

“Leave the rest to me,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile. “Leave Wang Fanchou of the Wang family to me.”

“Alright, I’ll bring them back first.” Meng Chuan nodded before disappearing with Meng You and Meng An.

Liu Qiyue stood in the small courtyard while Uncle Hua stood beside her respectfully.

After a while, one figure after another-more than ten-appeared at the courtyard. All of them were Godfiends. They were all extremely respectful.

“Greetings, Marchioness Calmmoon.” Over ten Earth Net Godfiends bowed respectfully. Liu Qiyue them through a token.

“Someone in this manor colluded with the demons to carry out an assassination,” said Liu Qiyue coldly. “These seven people are dead. Everyone in this manor is to be arrested and brought back. Also, all the subordinates of the manor’s owner, Wang Cong, are to be apprehended as well. Investigate carefully! What have these people done? Who colluded with the demons? Do a thorough investigation.” “Yes.” The ten-plus Godfiends responded respectfully.

Liu Qiyue pointed at the unconscious Wang Fanchou. “Imprison Wang Fanchou in the dungeon. I’ll personally conduct the interrogation.”

“Yes.” Immediately, a Godfiend carried Fanchou and left the courtyard.

In just a moment, hundreds of soldiers arrived at the manor, completely surrounding it.

“Take them all away.”

In the hall, the Godfiend descendants were all in a daze. They looked at the Godfiends and soldiers that had appeared around them. Although they were all descendants of powerful family clans in Jiang State Capital, they were still extremely afraid of a group of Godfiends.

“Uncle, Uncle, I really didn’t do anything,” one of the nobles said to a bearded Godfiend immediately. “Uncle, you have to save me.”

The bearded Godfiend looked at his family junior, and coldly ordered. “Shut up. Take him away.”

“I’m Li You. I’m a descendant of the imperial family. How dare you touch me?” shouted a young man.

A soldier hesitated.

“Take him away.” The Godfiend standing at the door gave the order.Imperial family?

The Li family had a long history. Before they became royalty, they were an ancient Godfiend family clan. After tens of thousands of years, over a million people were publicly acknowledged to be a part of the clan. There were even more people who were not acknowledged.

The person with the highest status in this manor was actually Young Master Xiao.

“I’m Xiao Yong, Xiao Fenglei’s son. Marchioness Orchidmoon is my aunt.” Xiao Yong-who held the highest status heremaintained his composure and said, “My aunt is best friends with Marchioness Calmmoon and Marquis Eastcalm, who both guard Jiang State Capital “

“We are under Marchioness Calmmoon’s orders,” one of the Godfiends said indifferently. “Take him away.”

“Marchioness Calmmoon’s orders?” Young Master Xiao was astonished as he was taken away.

Marchioness Calmmoon was the guardian of Jiang State Capital! She had the highest authority here.

Young Master Xiao knew better than anyone that Marchioness Calmmoon’s husband, Marquis Eastcalm was the highest-level Patroller of Archean Mountain! He had greater authority than Marchioness Calmmoon. As Marquis Eastcalm’s job was related to pursuing demon monarchs, everyone was to cooperate with him. If anyone dared to use their status to delay and obstruct his work? No one would dare say a word even if he were killed.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 253 - A Decade Long Painting
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Jiang State Capital, Meng Manor.

Meng Chuan brought Meng You and Meng An to Starmoon Lake’s Lake Heart Pavilion.

Ever since they learned of their parents’ true identities, Meng You and Meng An had often visited the residence with their parents. However, they only stayed in Lake Heart Pavillion. Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue had others build this building in the middle of Starmoon Lake. Other than the couple, Meng Dajiang, Liu Yebai, the twins, and the two avian demon monarchs, nobody was allowed to approach it. Liu Qiyue used her phoenix flames to guide Earth Fire to a few hot springs, causing Lake Heart Pavillion to be shrouded in mist perennially. It made it difficult for others to see the people on the lake.

“Dad, we were wrong.” Meng You and Meng An obediently admitted their mistakes.

“What faults did you commit?” Meng Chuan asked indifferently. “After we found out about Junior Sister Ning’s matter, we should’ve immediately fled. We shouldn’t have involved ourselves,” replied Meng An obediently, “We should’ve reported the matter to Dad and Mom so that you can save Junior Sister Ning’s family.”

“However, since we’ve involved ourselves, others now know of our extraordinary background. Now, we are in danger of being exposed,” whispered Meng You. “Dad, you said that we had to keep our identities a secret so the demons wouldn’t target us.”

Meng Chuan didn’t flare up in anger when he saw how obedient his son and daughter were.

Whoosh.

Aunt Hui—the gray avian demon monarch that had taken human form-held a wooden tray. She walked over the water towards Lake Heart Pavilion.

“It’s good that you know your faults. In the future, you have to think twice before doing anything. Hurry up and have dinner,” shouted Meng Chuan.

“Yes, Dad.” Meng You and Meng An were overjoyed. They exchanged looks and left happily.

Meng Chuan stared at their backs.

It’s a good thing for young people to be hot-blooded. It’s not realistic to make them endure injustice all the time. Meng Chuan was cognizant of this fact.

Late at night. When his children were already fast asleep, Meng Chuan detected Liu Qiyue returning to Lake Heart Pavilion.

“How was it?” asked Meng Chuan. “I actually found something,” said Liu Qiyue in surprise. “There’s a brothel called Windsay Brothel. The Skydemon Sect uses it to gather intelligence.”

“Skydemon Sect?” Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up. “Investigate carefully.”

“The Skydemon Sect is very cunning. It’s probably very difficult to figure out anything else. However, we will definitely investigate this matter thoroughly. “Liu Qiyue nodded. “By the way, Uncle Hua left a demonic power mark on Wang Cong’s eight subordinates. When Uncle Hua went to capture them, those eight subordinates were still handling some of the Ning family’s artifacts. After they were arrested, I used the Bewitching Spell to investigate. As time was short, they didn’t leak this matter. These eight people do dirty work for Wang Cong and have committed heinous crimes. I executed them directly.”

Meng Chuan nodded.

Liu Qiyue was a Marquis Godfiend and had condensed an Essence Soul. It was very easy for her to control mortals with the Bewitching Spell. She added, “Only the Ning family of three and Wang Fanchou might expose You’er and An’er’s identities. The Ning family of three doesn’t know much about what happened. They only know that Wang Cong captured You’er and An’er. They don’t know about Wang Cong’s death. As for Wang Fanchou... he knows a lot more.”

Meng Chuan asked, “What do you plan on doing?” “The Ning family of three can be recruited and deployed inside Earth Net’s headquarters,” said Liu Qiyue. “Earth Net requires some mortals to do miscellaneous chores in the headquarters. Their family of three will stay there. Most of the mortals in Earth Net’s headquarters are forbidden from contacting the outside world to keep information confidential. They will stay there for five years.

“In five years, You’er and An’er will definitely have entered Archean Mountain. When that happens, the Ning family of three can leave as they wish. They will probably be more willing to stay in Earth Net’s headquarters. After all, they’ll have no worries when living there. We will also promise them that after five years, their house, store, money, and other things will still be theirs.”

Meng Chuan nodded. “What about Wang Fanchou?”

“Two ways.” Liu Qiyue said, “From the interrogation just now, the deceased Wang Cong conducted sordid businesses-ones stained with blood. Firstly, he thinks up all sorts of schemes to seize others’ assets. The Ning family was just one victim that had fallen to his schemes. If it weren’t for You’er and An’er’s intervention, not only would the Ning family’s assets be gone, they would also lose their lives.

“Secondly, he’s in the prostitution business, causing the deaths of many women. Third, he is also a broker. He sends women to befriend the descendants of various Godfiend family clans. Then, he uses the influence of these Godfiend family clan descendants to reap benefits. Therefore, this person is as You’er said-he commits heinous crimes! He has killed over 100 families and even more innocent women.”

“You’er and An’er did a good job killing him.” Meng Chuan also had killing intent.

“Wang Fanchou is his grandfather and his greatest backer. It’s impossible for Wang Cong to hide this from Wang Fanchou,” said Liu Qiyue. “Wang Fanchou turned a blind eye and kept protecting his grandson. Wang Fanchou can’t shirk off responsibility for these crimes.”

“So there are two ways to deal with him. It’s all fair. One, we shall document these crimes clearly and throw them in Cloud State’s Wang family’s face! The Wang family will probably have nothing to say. Even if Wang Fanchou didn’t directly participate in these crimes, he would still be sentenced to 50 years in jail for turning a blind eye to his grandson’s actions and protecting him. Locked in a Godfiend prison, he won’t be able to interact with the outside, so it’s naturally impossible for news to leak.” said Liu Qiyue. “However, from Archean Mountain’s standpoint, they prefer a guilty Godfiend to risk their lives and resist the demons, redeeming themselves. Therefore, my solution is to hire a Godfiend skilled with illusions to change Wang Fanchou’s memories. His false memories will remind him of the assassination attempt on our children, but he won’t remember seeing You’er, An’er, and Uncle Hua. In those memories, he would’ve only seen the two of us!”

“After changing his memories, he won’t know You’er and An’er’s appearances, so he can be safely sent to risk his life fighting the demons and redeem himself,” said Liu Qiyue. “I prefer the latter method.” Meng Chuan frowned. “It’s just that although Wang Fanchou hasn’t condensed an Essence Soul, he’s still a Godfiend. To change his memories... you need someone who has reached the Dao realm with illusions. Those Godfiends are now in Godfiend teams.”

“Ah Chuan, your illusions are also very potent. Can’t you do it?” Liu Qiyue asked.

“I can temporarily hide his memories, but I can’t change them completely.” Meng Chuan pondered and said, “Don’t worry. I’ve been reinforcing the various states for the past ten years. Archean Mountain will occasionally send me to other places as a reinforcement. I have close relationships with more than ten Illusion experts. Let me think about how to resolve this matter.”

From Meng Chuan and his wife’s perspective, they had to protect their children well. In the past ten years, Meng Chuan had caused too much damage to the demons.

The demons hated Meng Chuan to the core. They had attempted to assassinate him three times. Thankfully, Meng Chuan trained with the physical body cultivation system. Otherwise, he would have died long ago. This made Meng Chuan even more careful and cautious when protecting his children. Among the people he cared about, his son and daughter were still mortals. They were too weak.

The next day.

In Lake Heart Pavilion’s study, Meng Chuan was painting

This painting depicted his wife, son, and daughter. His wife was playing chess with Meng You, while his son, Meng An, was overjoyed after catching a big fish. Back then, his son shouted, “Dad, Dad, look! I caught a fish!” When Meng Chuan looked up, he found the scene very beautiful. He also knew that his son and daughter had grown up. In the future, they would go to Archean Mountain. The time they could spend together decreased slowly.

Such a scene was destined to become a memory. Hence, he depicted the scene in this painting. The seriousness could be seen in his wife and daughter’s eyes as they played chess. Under the sunlight, their hair was slightly yellowish, and everything was beautiful. His son was energetic and excited when he showed off his big fish. The way he looked at him, an attachment to his father...

Meng Chuan would never forget that scene.

He had worked on this painting for two months. At this moment, he was finally done painting

Meng Chuan felt his Essence Soul transform. Over the past ten years, he had painted a portrait of his wife every year, as well as many scenes he had seen during his rescues. At Archean Mountain, he had cultivated arduously all day, so his psyche wasn’t affected much. After becoming a guardian that rescued others, his emotions were stirred a lot more. Oh? Meng Chuan sensed the changes in his Essence Soul. I’m finally breaking through?

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 254 - Fourth-Level Essence Soul
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Meng Chuan inspected the changes in his Essence Soul. For the past ten years, his Essence Soul had remained at the third level. He had painted seven portraits that allowed him to seek answers from his inner self. Each finished painting changed his Essence Soul slightly. Today, his Essence Soul had finally undergone a qualitative transformation.

Fourth-level Essence Soul? Meng Chuan revealed a look of anticipation as his heart stirred.

Swoosh.

Another “Meng Chuan” jumped out from his body. He looked like a real person. Fourth-level Essence Soul-Soul Separation? Meng Chuan carefully noted the flaws of separating his Essence Soul from his body. The separated Essence Soul couldn’t withstand wind, sunlight, and rain. His Essence Soul still needed some attachment to his body to continue existing.

Now, I can split a portion of my Essence Soul and seal it in You’er and An’er. This way, I can be more at ease.

Only after attaining a fourth-level Essence Soul could one seal a portion of their Essence Soul into another person or object. Doing this required one to split a portion of their Essence Soul’s Origins. According to records, splitting the Essence Soul into nine was the normal limit. Within this limit, splitting one’s soul wouldn’t affect their intelligence and perception. If one split their Essence Soul into more than nine portions, their Essence Soul would be injured. With weakened intelligence and perception, one’s cultivation path would be much more difficult. Therefore, it was very rare for powerful Godfiends to cast an Essence Soul seal willingly.

Whoosh. Meng Chuan’s Essence Soul returned to his body.

Meng Chuan looked at the painting in front of him and wrote two words on the right-hand corner, “Children’s Joy.” He smiled and put down the brush before walking out of the study.

COL

Meng You and Meng An sparred in an open area of Lake Heart Pavilion. Meng You’s sword techniques were like mist, fast, and unpredictable.

Meng An’s spear was more direct and straightforward. The spear struck out like a dragon in a more ferocious manner.

Clang!

Meng An swept the end of his spear and blocked Meng You’s sudden sword beam.

“Not bad,” praised Meng Chuan. “You’er’s attack came so suddenly without any warning. An’er, your spear protected you well. You did a good job at offense and defense.”

Meng You and Meng An stopped and listened respectfully.

Meng Chuan walked over and gently patted the twins’ shoulders. He smiled and said, “Continue training. No matter how much you theorize, it’s impossible for it to be better than actual training. You have to cultivate for at least six hours a day. You can’t relax for even a day.”

“Yes, Father,” answered Meng You and Meng An obediently.
