Meng Chuan nodded. As he patted his children’s shoulders, he separated two portions of his Essence Soul and sealed them on their shoulders.

Once the Essence Soul seal was activated, it would be equivalent to an Essence Soul avatar. However, it would dissipate after a single use. Only after his Essence Soul reached the sixth stage—the Indestructible realm-could his Essence Soul avatars last for a long time. When his Essence Soul reached the seventh stage, he could have up to nine long-lasting Essence Soul avatars.

A seventh-level Essence Soul had all sorts of magical powers. For example, the Essence Soul’s Origins—that was consumed by forming an Essence Soul seal—could be completely restored at the seventh level. Every Essence Soul avatar would have the combat strength of a Regis Godfiend despite only having a single Essence Soul mystic technique. As long as the main body didn’t die, the Essence Soul avatar could be restored after being destroyed.

As for an eighth-level Essence Soul? It was even possible to win the war between humans and demons.

However, in the long history of humans, the strongest Essence Soul was an eighth-level Essence Soul. Only three people had ever attained an eighth-level Essence Soul. There were much fewer people that had attained an eighth-level Essence Soul than those that had become an Imperial Lord.

Meng Chuan left Lake Heart Pavilion and arrived at Jiang State Capital’s Earth Net headquarters.

“Marquis Eastcalm.”

“Marquis Eastcalm.” The Godfiends at Earth Net headquarters were extremely respectful when they saw Meng Chuan.

Liu Qiyue also sensed Meng Chuan’s arrival and took the initiative to welcome him. “Ah Chuan, why are you here?”

“Let’s go to Wang Fanchou,” said Meng Chuan.

“Meet Wang Fanchou?” Liu Qiyue was puzzled, but she still led Meng Chuan to the dungeon. In the depths of the dungeon, Wang Fanchou laid imprisoned in a sealed cell. No guard was to come in contact with Wang Fanchou.

Rumble~

The sealed cell door opened. Inside, Wang Fanchou immediately looked up and saw Meng Chuan and his wife walking in. The cell door closed once again. “Marquis Eastcalm, Marchioness Calmmoon, I really didn’t have any intentions of assassinating...” Wang Fanchou explained anxiously. He was also flustered after being imprisoned for a day. “Really?” Meng Chuan looked at him.

“Yes, I’m innocent.” Wang Fanchou looked at Meng Chuan, but his eyes gradually glazed over. He didn’t say another word.

Meng Chuan looked at him. He cast an Essence Soul mystic technique and easily penetrated Wang Fanchou’s soul. Although he hadn’t reached the Realm of Dao with illusions, he could change memories due to the uniqueness of a fourth-level Essence Soul. Even those that had reached the Realm of Dao with illusions would produce flawed memories when using their illusion techniques. Meng Chuan’s Essence Soul directly modified Wang Fanchou’s in an even more tyrannical manner.

This was very similar to what Qin Wu had done. However, Qin Wu’s means were even more intricate.

Meng Chuan erased memories of Meng You and Meng An from Wang Fanchou’s mind. Then, he used illusions to create fake memories.

“It’s done,” said Meng Chuan. “I’ve changed the memories where he saw You’er and An’er.”

“Ah Chuan, didn’t you say that you can only temporarily block his memories? Why can you do it now?” Liu Qiyue’s heart stirred.

“I broke through.” Meng Chuan smiled at his wife.

“You broke through?” Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but whisper, “Fourth level?” Meng Chuan nodded slightly.

Liu Qiyue was shocked. This was because for a Regis Godfiend to reach the Creation realm, one of the requirements was a fifth-level Essence Soul! It was very difficult to describe a fifth-level Essence Soul in books. Creation Supremacies might be very powerful in other aspects, but most of their Essence Souls only reached the fifth level.

Now, Meng Chuan had a fourth-level Essence Soul! He was close to attaining a fifth-level Essence Soul.

“Wang Fanchou.” Meng Chuan looked at the dazed Wang Fanchou, snapping him awake suddenly.

“Are you aware of the many heinous crimes your grandson, Wang Cong, has committed? Without your protection, how could he have continued committing these crimes to this day?” Meng Chuan sneered. “Many Godfiends are using their lives to protect cities and countless mortals. Is it to allow fools like him to wreak havoc on people?”

Wang Fanchou was drenched in a cold sweat.

It didn’t matter if no one cast their attention on this matter. But if a Marquis Godfiend were to target such matters, there was no way to deny Wang Cong’s crimes. The Imperial Court’s laws and Archean Mountain’s rules were written clearly.

Humph.

Meng Chuan snorted coldly and left with his wife.

After exiting the dungeon, Meng Chuan asked, “The investigations have been going on for a day. Have you found anything?”

“The Skydemon Sect is very careful. We did find some Skydemon Sect spies through Windsay Brothel. As for the big fish? We found nothing. The clues stopped in the middle,” said Liu Qiyue. “On the other hand, we did find out about a lot of things some Godfiend descendants have done. It’s shocking. Some of their crimes are in no way inferior to Wang Cong’s.”

Liu Qiyue brought Meng Chuan to a room. She pointed at the pile of dossiers on the desk. “These dossiers are the results of the investigation. You can take a look.”

Meng Chuan picked one up, and his expression changed slightly as he read through it.

Every dossier was stained with a person’s life -blood and injustice.

“They deserve to die.” Meng Chuan’s eyes were filled with bloodlust. “Are these Godfiend descendants just going to embarrass their ancestors? Godfiends are risking their lives, but these juniors are acting so wantonly?”

“There are many people in Godfiend family clans,” explained Liu Qiyue. “For example, the Meng family has more than 10,000 clansmen. Older Godfiend family clans have tens of thousands of clansmen and even hundreds of thousands of clansmen! With so many of them, it’s natural to have a few bad eggs! They have no future in cultivation, but they have connections. Once they commit evil, they will be far more harmful than ordinary people.”

“You’ve been guarding Jiang State Capital for the past ten years? Didn’t you do anything about it?” Meng Chuan was infuriated.

Liu Qiyue helplessly said, “I’m in charge of guarding the area. However, the information from Earth Net is directly handled by the Godfiends below. I only make decisions regarding important matters. As for crimes committed by mortals in Jiang State Capital? It’s all handled by the imperial government. Archean Mountain Godfiends normally won’t interfere with mortal matters. After all, the Imperial Court has always been in charge of mortal matters.”

“You are the guardian of Jiang State Capital. You have the right to take control of the government office directly,” said Meng Chuan.

Liu Qiyue nodded. “Yes, I can forcefully take control of it.”

“Then take control. Sweep Jiang State Capital ruthlessly,” said Meng Chuan. “Even the government office needs to be raided once. There are probably many parasites in the government office as well.”

“Sweep through Jiang State Capital?” Liu Qiyue looked at her husband. “There are quite a number of people from Creation Godfiend family clans, the imperial family, and Regis Godfiend family clans in the city.”

“We Godfiends are risking our lives to kill demon monarchs and protect an entire area,” said Meng Chuan angrily. “We’re protecting them with our lives. We can’t let them spit on our efforts like this.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 255 - Raid
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Liu Qiyue had been stationed in Jiang State Capital for ten years, and she rarely took action. As for Meng Chuan, he had been in charge of rescuing people in six different states for ten years. He had been engaging in slaughter all this time, so he was extremely bloodthirsty.

Every time the demon monarchs attacked, a large number of mortals would die.

Meng Chuan had seen too many massacres. He tried his best to rescue the various regions and never slacked off! Wherever Archean Mountain deployed him, he would go without any complaints. He had been stationed in all of the Great Zhou Dynasty’s regions. This was also what Archean Mountain called “defense switch.” By moving Godfiends around, the demons suffered even more losses in the Great Zhou Dynasty. That was why they hated Meng Chuan—who was the fastest Godfiend in the world.

Meng Chuan wasn’t afraid of the demons. He wanted to protect the cities.

“Do a ruthless raid. Arrest and kill those who deserve it,” said Meng Chuan coldly. “As long as there’s sufficient evidence, I believe that no Godfiend from Archean Mountain will make things difficult for me.”

“Alright, I’ll do it then.” Liu Qiyue had been by Meng Chuan’s side for many years. She had killed countless people, and she was similarly bloodthirsty.

“We’ll do a raid every one or two years,” said Meng Chuan. “As long as Archean Mountain doesn’t transfer us away, we’ll do it! I believe that Master will support us.”

Liu Qiyue smiled. “Okay.”

The head of the Yan family’s Jiang River Hall branch angrily said, “Who are you? How dare you come to my Yan family and act so impudently?”

A bearded Godfiend led a group of soldiers to charge in. The bearded Godfiend held a token in his hand as he coldly said, “Marchioness Calmmoon ordered us to capture criminals and take Yan Xiu away.”

“Orders from Marchioness Calmmoon?”

The Yan family was stunned.

In Jiang State Capital, Marchioness Calmmoon had the highest authority. Godfiends, armies, and the government office had to obey her orders.

“Take him away,” a tall, skinny Godfiend ordered. The soldiers charged forward.

“I’m Xiao Yu. My grandfather is the Xiao family’s Grand Elder,” shouted a thin man loudly. However, his subordinates did not dare resist the Godfiends. The great Young Master Xiao Yu was also arrested.

“Walk.”

“Arrest them.” Numerous guards were dispatched to arrest people. Arrests were made across the entire Jiang State Capital.

For those with high statuses, they might resist with greater force; therefore, the teams were led by Godfiends. Ordinary soldiers captured those with relatively ordinary statues.

Almost every Godfiend family clan had members arrested. Even Meng Chuan’s Meng family had two juniors arrested.

“Please pass the message. Our Patriarch wishes to meet Clan Leader Meng Dajiang.” At the entrance of Meng Manor, an old steward of the Yan family came forward and politely said, “Our clan leader and Clan Leader Meng are good friends.” “Sorry.” The guard at the entrance of Meng Manor politely said, “The clan leader went into seclusion last night. We were given instructions not to disturb him.”

“Seclusion? When will he exit seclusion?” The old steward’s expression changed slightly. “The clan leader said that it would take at least ten days to a year or so,” explained the Meng Manor guard.

The old steward could only turn around and walk towards the nearby carriage.

“Let’s go back.” In the carriage, the Yan family’s Jiang River Hall branch leader had a livid expression.

“Please inform...”

“I’m sorry, our clan leader went into seclusion last night and instructed us not to disturb him.”

“Clan Leader went into seclusion last night.”

All the factions in Jiang State Capital came to seek an audience. They couldn’t meet the two Marquis Godfiends, so they tried to meet the Meng family’s clan leader, Meng Dajiang. However, even Meng Dajiang had announced his seclusion.

“The Meng family is crazy. They don’t even give us face.” “I heard that the Xiao family’s clan leader personally went to pay a visit to Marquis Eastcalm, Meng Chuan, but ended up having a bunch of dossiers thrown at him. The Xiao family’s clan leader returned dejectedly. Marquis Eastcalm doesn’t even give the Xiao family any face.”

“The Xiao family has been rooted in Jiang State Capital for thousands of years and has infiltrated many areas. Many members of the Xiao family who were arrested this time are of high status. They are obviously anxious.”

All the major family clans in the city were engaged in a flurry of discussion. Too many people had been arrested.

“Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue are crazy. Do they really think they can do whatever they want after becoming Marquis Godfiends?” Yan family’s Jiang River Hall branch leader was infuriated. “I’ll write to my grandfather now.”

“Meng Chuan and his wife have angered everyone. Just wait. They will suffer.”

“Our lineage has thousands of clansmen in Jiang State Capital, so we naturally have to show our gratitude and authority to each other. Without deterrence, there’s no way we can do anything. It’s inevitable to kill some people. As Godfiends, why would Meng Chuan and his wife interfere with mortal matters?”

Many people only dared to curse secretly while at home.

No matter how great the chaos was outside, Meng Chuan only treated them as insect noises.

As the highest-level Patroller, he had the same status as a Regis Godfiend. Only Supremacies could truly control him.

The fragrance of sandalwood filled a chamber.

Meng Chuan sat cross-legged as he condensed an Essence Soul weaponSoul-Vanquishing Spike. After attaining a fourth-level Essence Soul, he needed to imprint more complicated second-level divine patterns on his Soul-Vanquishing Spike. Every night, Meng Chuan spent six hours imprinting complicated second-level divine patterns on top of the original foundation. After three consecutive days, he improved the Soul-Vanquishing Spike’s strength to a new level. Its might was greatly increased.

Soul-Vanquishing Spike’s attacks are very direct. Condensing and imprinting divine patterns is relatively simple. It won’t take too long for me to finish. However, the Soul-Buster Bell will be troublesome to condense. It’ll take about half a month to condense from scratch.

With a fourth-level Essence Soul, Meng Chuan could condense another Essence Soul weapon—the Soul-Buster Bell.

Soul-Vanquishing Spike and Soul-Buster Bell were both extremely powerful Essence Soul weapons. In fact, once one attained a fourth-level Essence Soul, the strength of ordinary Essence Soul mystic techniques would greatly increase.

After attaining a fourth-level Essence Soul, I can begin cultivating the physical body cultivation system’s Undying realm. I can’t afford to waste time. I’ll make a trip to Archean Mountain and exchange for enough Scarlet Blood Divine Pills.

The physical body cultivation system had several realms-Foundation Establishment, Diamond, Divine Power, Undying, Blood Droplet, Sage Becoming, and Mythical. Due to limited resources in the human world, he would peak at the Blood Droplet realm.

Now that Meng Chuan’s Essence Soul had reached the fourth level, and having reached the Realm of Dao a long time ago, he could cultivate the Undying realm. Once he mastered it, he would have an Undying body. He could completely suppress Marquis Godfiends with just his physical strength.

Creak.

Meng Chuan left the chamber. Liu Qiyue waited outside as she flipped through dossiers. She had been crazily making arrests the past three days, so she had to read through every dossier carefully.

“Ah Chuan,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile. “I still need to read dossiers for a while. I have to ensure that I didn’t wrong anyone.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded. “I’ll make a trip to Archean Mountain now. I’ll be back in two hours.”

“Alright.” Liu Qiyue nodded.

Swoosh.

Meng Chuan disappeared from the room. Liu

Qiyue glanced at the night sky through the window before continuing to read the dossiers.

Meng Chuan transformed into a blurry bolt of lightning as he charged towards Archean Mountain at unbelievable speeds. Just 15 minutes later, he arrived at Archean Mountain—which was 5,000 kilometers away from Jiang State Capital. “Meng Chuan, come to me.” Supremacy Qin Wu’s voice sounded in his ears.

Meng Chuan immediately turned around and headed for Grotto-Heaven Pavilion obediently. Within Grotto-heaven Pavilion.

“Master.” Meng Chuan bowed respectfully.

The robed-Qin Wu smiled and said, “It’s already late at night. Why did you suddenly come to Archean Mountain?”

“I’m here to exchange for some Scarlet Blood Divine Pills. I also wish to put up a bounty for the baneful aura,” replied Meng Chuan obediently.“Yes.” Qin Wu nodded with a smile. He could tell at a glance that Meng Chuan’s Essence Soul had reached the fourth level. This made him rather delighted. “Now that you have attained a fourth-level Essence Soul, you can indeed begin cultivating the physical body cultivation system’s Undying realm. Master it as soon as possible. Your life-preservation abilities will be much stronger.”

Meng Chuan nodded.

“By the way, I heard that you and Liu Qiyue have been raiding and arresting people in Jiang State Capital?” asked Qin Wu with a smile.

“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded. “I really can’t tolerate it. So many Godfiends have risked their lives to protect the cities. However, these idiots relied on their power and background to do whatever they want.”

“They do deserve being arrested and killed.” Qin Wu nodded and sighed. “I also wish to deter them. In fact, the Imperial Court has its laws, and Archean Mountain has set the rules. However, those who enact the laws are ultimately subordinates. My orders—when passed down the chain of command—will be acted upon differently. Humans ultimately have selfish motives. With selfish motives, these things are inevitable.”

“I understand. There are more than ten million people in Jiang State Capital. The various factions are in cahoots, and the Skydemon Sect is hidden in the shadows. In addition, life is difficult, so it’s naturally difficult to avoid the dark side. Qiyue and I also understand that it’s impossible to wipe them out completely. Therefore, we plan to clean the city once every one or two years, hoping to deter them. We have to let them know that if they commit a crime, they might be investigated in the future. It will make them feel fear,” said Meng Chuan.

“Yes, just do it.” Qin Wu agreed. “By the way, how many Scarlet Blood Divine Pills do you want to exchange for? I’ll help you retrieve them.”

“I need 3,600 Scarlet Blood Divine Pills,” said Meng Chuan.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 256 - Grotto-Heaven Magical Bead
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Qin Wu’s heart palpitated when he heard that. He could not help but ask, “That many?”

“I need ten Scarlet Blood Divine Pills a day. It’ll take about a year to master it. That’s why I need so many Scarlet Blood Divine Pills,” said Meng Chuan. “If I don’t use them, it will take ten years.”

“Scarlet Blood Divine Pills are for Marquis Godfiends to recover their Quintessential Essence,” said Qin Wu helplessly. “It can completely restore a Marquis Godfiend’s Quintessential Essence reserves in 30 seconds. It’s usually consumed at critical moments. You sure are good... Eating Scarlet Blood Divine Pills like it’s a meal. You have to eat ten pills every day and have to eat it for an entire year.”

Meng Chuan smiled obsequiously.

“You want 3,600? No.” Qin Wu shook his head.

“No?” Meng Chuan was taken aback.

“Such divine pills are rare. Only after finding a batch of materials can a batch of pills be refined,” said Qin Wu. “Now, Archean Mountain only has a stock of about 2,000 Scarlet Blood Divine Pills. Many Godfiends have to exchange for them occasionally. It’s impossible for you to take them all. It’s too wasteful to use them like this.”

Meng Chuan immediately said, “Master, you’re right. However, this disciple’s cultivation of the physical body cultivation system consumes an astonishing amount of Quintessential Essence. If I rely on recovering my Quintessential Essence naturally, it will take ten years.”

“If this were any other time, it wouldn’t be a big deal to spend ten years.” Qin Wu looked at Meng Chuan and gave him a faint smile. “Now that it’s wartime, it’s indeed best to master it as soon as possible. How about this? I’ll lend you a treasure for a year! Return it to me after the year is up.”

As Qin Wu spoke, he flipped his hand, and a cyan bead, that emitted a glow, appeared in his palm.

Meng Chuan looked at the cyan bead. Meng Chuan could sense the immense power contained within the bead.

“This is the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead,” said Qin Wu. “It contains a pocket grotto-heaven. You can directly devour it and place it in your dantian space.”

“A small grotto-heaven?” Meng Chuan was shocked. “It can be carried with me?”

“Take it with you,” said Qin Wu. “When you cultivate, you can directly trigger the energy in the pocket grotto-heaven. The Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead’s power is boundless. It’s much more powerful than the Scarlet Blood Divine Pill’s medicinal essence. It’s enough for you to master the Undying realm. Return the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead to me one year later. Of course, the one-year loan will cost you 36 million credits. Are you okay with that?”

Meng Chuan said obediently, “Thank you, Master. I’m naturally okay with that.”

3,600 Scarlet Blood Divine Pills also cost 36 million credits... The Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead loan for a year cost the same.

“Master, other than using its power to cultivate, what other uses does the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead have?” asked Meng Chuan.

“It contains a pocket grotto-heaven that spans 250 kilometers,” said Qin Wu. “Many items can be thrown in directly or hidden in it, living things included. One can plant food inside, so letting hundreds of thousands of people live and reproduce inside it wouldn’t be a problem. Hiding the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead in a remote, uninhabited place and then hiding in it can lead to eternal freedom.”

Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up when he heard that. A paradise-like place that was outside of this world? “Can I use credits to exchange for it?” asked Meng Chuan. “You can.” Qin Wu smiled at Meng Chuan. “500 million credits.”

Meng Chuan smiled and didn’t say a word.

Over the past ten years, he had only accumulated about 160 million credits. It was earned from being stationed all over the Great Zhou Dynasty, allowing him to kill many elite demon monarchs. He had handed the treasures left behind by the elite demon monarchs to Archean Mountain. After ten years of hard work, that was all he had accumulated. He hadn’t spent much credit in this past decade.

Meng Chuan and his wife’s cultivation would be shockingly expensive when they became Regis Godfiends in the future. If they wanted to increase their strength quickly, everything they needed required credit.

A pocket grotto-heaven for 500 million credits? Forget it.

“Remember to return it to me in a year,” said Qin Wu as he handed it over. “This is Archean Mountain’s property.”

“Yes, yes, yes.” Meng Chuan obediently received the cyan bead.

He opened his mouth and sucked the cyan bead into his body.

Quintessential Essence wrapped around the cyan bead as it rapidly entered his body. The dantian space was extremely mysterious, but the cyan bead easily entered.

What a mighty grotto-heaven. Meng Chuan’s consciousness permeated the cyan bead, and he discovered that the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead contained a vast land. There was a ring of nine volcanoes that often erupted. The world’s foundation powers contained within this pocket grotto-heaven were immense and miraculous. It was even more magical than the Scarlet Blood Divine Pills’ medicinal essence. It replenished one’s Quintessential Essence even faster.

“What else do you need?” inquired Qin Wu.

“Once I reach the Undying realm and have a strong body, I can absorb a higher level of baneful aura,” said Meng Chuan. “I wish to place a 100 million credit bounty on five tubes of Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura or three cubes of Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura.”

Qin Wu nodded. “An Undying realm expert can crush Marquis Godfiends with just their bodies. Combat strength is only secondary; an Undying realm expert’s lifeforce is even more impressive. It’s much stronger than the lifeforce of a Regis Godfiend. You will indeed be capable of absorbing a higher level of baneful aura.”

“Our Godfiend cultivation system is inferior in terms of physical strength, but our Quintessential Essence is potent,” said Meng Chuan.

“The physical body cultivation system heritage you obtained in Archean Eon Grotto-Heaven...” Qin Wu shook his head. “It seems like it can crush our Godfiend cultivation system, but there are too many flaws to it. The main flaw is that the requirements on one’s Essence Soul are too harsh. Mortals would require a first-level Essence Soul to achieve basic mastery. One needs a fourth-level Essence Soul to reach the Undying realm. The number of experts of this cultivation system is much fewer than us Godfiends.”

Meng Chuan nodded. Across the world, how many people had attained a fourth-level Essence Soul? This was just one of the requirements for reaching the Undying realm.

“Archean Mountain doesn’t have five cubes of Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura or three cubes of Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura.” Qin Wu shook his head.

“That’s why I want to put up a bounty,” said Meng Chuan. “I hope a Godfiend happens to have it in their collection.”

“If they have such baneful auras, and are unable to use it themselves, they would have long handed it over to the sect,” said Qin Wu. “Actually, you can try other baneful auras.” “Other baneful auras?” Meng Chuan was puzzled.

“Previous Lightning Devastator Fiend Body cultivators in history have tested different baneful auras through trial and error. Those who followed the frost baneful aura path tested Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura first. Later, they tested Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura. However, all of the two baneful auras have been used up by your predecessors. You will need to test out a few baneful auras that suit you,” said Qin Wu.

Meng Chuan was puzzled. “What are the baneful auras I can try?”

“My Archean Mountain has a kind of baneful aura called Origins Returning baneful aura. It’s much more potent than Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura and Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura,” said Qin Wu. “It’s also a frost baneful aura. After you reach the Undying realm, your body will be stronger than a Regis Godfiend’s. I think you can give it a try. However, I believe you will need two cubes of Origins Returning baneful aura to master it completely. That will cost you 200 million credits.”

“200 million credits?” Meng Chuan was shocked. “It’s that expensive?”

The Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead was only worth 500 million credits.

Three cubes of Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura or five cubes of Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura typically cost 80 million credits. Meng Chuan was willing to offer 100 million credits.

“It’s very cheap.” Qin Wu looked at Meng Chuan. “Only our Archean Mountain possesses it in this world. It was obtained by an Archean Mountain senior from outside this world.”

“Yes, yes. Can I purchase it on credit?” asked Meng Chuan.

“Yes. I’ll slowly deduct from the credits you earn every year.” Qin Wu flipped his hand and took out a tiny black calabash. “There’s a sliver of Origins Returning baneful aura in it. After you cultivate to the Undying realm, you can try to see if your body can withstand it. If you fail... pretend I didn’t say anything.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan took the black calabash.

Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura and Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura could only be found by chance.

This Origins Returning baneful aura was something unheard of in this world. He was only nurtured so much because he was an outstanding disciple and it was wartime.

Following that, Meng Chuan bade farewell and left Archean Mountain. He returned to Jiang State Capital 15 minutes later.

...

One of seven major city passes in the Great Zhou Dynasty, Swallow Mountain Pass.

Other than Supremacy Luo Tang-who guarded Luo Tang Pass—the guardians of the six other major city passes were publicly acknowledged to be the six strongest Archean Mountain Regis Godfiends. Every major city pass was of utmost importance.

Within an enormous chamber, a white-haired elder sat cross-legged as a grayish-white gas swirled around him. The void distorted as a result. Suddenly, he sucked in a deep breath and completely devoured the grayish-white gas.

The old man opened his eyes and said, “Come in.”

The door to the chamber opened.

A Godfiend guard respectfully walked in. “Your Highness, it’s a letter from Jiang State Capital.”

“Oh?” The old man took the letter and smiled. “It’s from Shuang. He still remembers to write to me?”

The Godfiend guard sighed inwardly.

King Swallow Mountain had been guarding the city pass for more than 200 years. He did not dare to relax for a single day and was usually rather strict. Only a few juniors from his family clan could make him smile.

“Jiang State Capital. Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue?” King Swallow Mountain frowned as he read the letter.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 257 - King Swallow Mountain
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

King Swallow Mountain frowned after reading the letter.

“Your Highness?” said the Godfiend guard softly.

“Junior Brother Meng Chuan has been down the mountain for nearly 20 years. He has been hunting down the demons, and his contributions are remarkable. The demons have attempted to assassinate him several times.” King Swallow’s old voice was filled with puzzlement. “When King True Martial wrote to me, he was also full of praise for Junior Brother Meng Chuan. He claimed that Meng Chuan alone was comparable to ten Marquis Godfiends. Now, the Great Zhou Dynasty is rather stable, mostly because of Junior Brother Meng Chuan’s contribution.”

King Swallow Mountain shook his head gently. “Why would such a figure care about such trivial mortal matters?” With his status, he was more concerned about the war with the demons. He was indeed too lazy to care about the conflicts of interests among mortals.

From King Swallow Mountain’s point of view, it was a form of bliss for mortals to have conflicts of interest! If the world were filled with mass graves because of countless demons and mortals dying, then ‘living’ would be the greatest desire of mortals. How could they have the mood to think about anything else?

“Zhang Chu, investigate what happened in Jiang State Capital recently,” said King Swallow Mountain.

“Yes,” replied the Godfiend guard respectfully. A day later, a thick dossier was delivered to Swallow Mountain Pass and sent to King Swallow Mountain.

King Swallow Mountain flipped through the dossier, and his expression turned ugly.

“B*STARD!” King Swallow Mountain’s white beard trembled, his eyes filled with rage. “B*stard! B*STARD!!!”

“Your Highness, calm down,” said Zhang Chu immediately.

“I’m not angry because of what is stated in the dossier,” said King Swallow Mountain coldly. “There are thousands of kinds of people. It’s normal for a family to have some fools when it’s big. I’m angry because of that good grandson of mine! What a good grandson! As the leader of our family’s Jiang River Hall, he didn’t punish his descendants severely when he encountered such matters. Instead, he wrote a letter to slander Junior Brother Meng and his wife, hoping to use me to deal with Junior Brother Meng Chuan. Didn’t he think it through? Once the truth is revealed, what will the other Godfiends think of me?

“He just wants to borrow my hands, but he didn’t even consider if he was even right in this matter. How embarrassing! Truly embarrassing! And he’s stupid!” King Swallow Mountain’s eyes were cold. “From the looks of it, he has enjoyed himself in Jiang State Capital and is used to doing whatever he wants. No one can do a thing about him. Over the past few decades, he has already become dumb. I’ll force him to go to the battlefield to see some blood and wake him up. That’s right. Why should I let him enjoy life in Jiang State capital just because he’s my grandson?”

The Godfiend guards, Zhang Chu and Yan Tong, left Swallow Mountain Pass on a bird and arrived at Jiang State Capital—which was 5000 kilometers away.

Jiang State Capital.

The Yan family’s Jiang River Hall manor occupied a large area.

In the main hall.

“Brother,” said Clan Leader Yan Shuang with a smile. “Why did you come from Swallow Mountain Pass?”

“I came here on the orders of the king,” Yan Tong said.

“What instructions does His Highness have?” An elder seated next to him couldn’t help but ask eagerly.

Yan Tong glanced at the elder before nodding at the Godfiend guard, Zhang Chu. Only then did Zhang Chu stand up. He held a token in his hand. “Decree from His Highness.”

Everyone stood up to listen to the decree.

“The clansmen have committed crimes, but as clan leader, not only did Yan Shuang not punish them severely, he even lied to His Highness. He hoped for His Highness to deal with a fellow disciple.”

As Zhang Chu spoke, Yan Shuang’s expression changed. “No, I didn’t...”

“His Highness has instructed that from now on, Yan Shuang will be stripped of the position of leader of Jiang River Hall. He will be whipped 80 times on the spot! Then, he will head to Swallow Mountain Pass to fend off the demons,” said Zhang Chu. “From today onwards, Yan Tong will take over as leader of Jiang River Hall.”

Everyone present was stunned. However, King Swallow Mountain’s words were final in the Yan family. Even the main branch had to obey his orders, let alone Jiang River Hall.

“Grandfather was deceived. He made a mistake.” Yan Shuang’s face turned pale as he immediately shouted, “I’m grandfather’s grandson. Yan Tong is only my cousin. He’s separated by several levels. What right does he have to be clan leader? He’s not qualified.”

How carefree was he in Jiang State Capital?

He enjoyed the highest status in the family clan branch! Whatever he wanted, happened! He truly could do whatever he wanted. With just a hint, the people under him would do whatever he wanted. He enjoyed riches and glory. He had a bunch of wives and concubines. King Swallow Mountain had favored this grandson of his. Since Yan Shuang was only an Indestructible Godfiend and the family clan needed an ordinary Godfiend to preside over the branch family in Jiang State Capital, Yan Shuan was given such a generous arrangement.

Yan Shuang was also very obedient in front of his grandfather. However, he had indulged himself in Jiang State Capital for too long. After doing virtually whatever he wanted for decades, he had become accustomed to being arrogant. In fact, he was only a little unhappy that Meng Chuan and his wife had arrested one of the Yan family’s descendants. He felt humiliated when Meng Chuan, Liu Qiyue, and Meng Dajiang completely ignored him. The more clansmen arrested, the more he wanted to use his grandfather to deal with Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue.

From his point of view, his grandfather was a Regis Godfiend. He had guarded Swallow Mountain Pass for more than 200 years. How much had he contributed? How could two newly-advanced Marquis Godfiends like Meng Chuan and his wife compare?

“His Highness was right.” Zhang Chu shook his head. “You have been too used to doing whatever you want and have become dumb! Carry out the punishment!” Zhang Chu waved his hand, and an invisible mist bound Yan Shuang like ribbons. Yan Shuang-only an Indestructible Godfiend-was unable to resist.

“Zhang Chu! You dare hit me?” Yan Shuang shouted anxiously, but he couldn’t break out of the binding.

Pa!

Zhang Chu held a whip in his hand as he lashed out. Yan Shuan’s body trembled as the whip lacerated his skin. It left the Elders watching in shock.

“Zhang Chu, you are crazy!” Yan Shuang roared.

Zhang Chu continued lashing out with his whip. As a Great Solar Godfiend, no one present could resist him. Furthermore, he had the king’s token and was also King Swallow Mountain’s personal guard.

The first few whips resulted in howls of anger, but later on, he began begging for mercy. Towards the end, he was barely breathing.

The 80-lash punishment ended. Yan Shuang laid on the ground like a dead dog, unconscious. “I’ll leave Jiang River Hall branch to you.” Zhang Chu looked at Yan Tong.

“Don’t worry. I will definitely do what His Highness instructed me to do.” Yan Tong nodded. He was a Godfiend of the Yan family. He had served at Swallow Mountain Pass for 50 years, and he had an iron-like personality.Zhang Chu carried the unconscious Yan Shuang and left the main hall. He leaped onto a bird’s back and quickly left for Swallow Mountain Pass.

What awaited Yan Shuang was a long period of demon-fighting at Swallow Mountain Pass.

News of what happened in the Yan family quickly spread among the major families in Jiang State Capital, shocking the major clans.

However, just three days later, the Imperial Court sent an order to all the cities in the world. In recent years, large numbers of people had entered the state capitals and prefecture cities, causing the degradation of public security. It was time for a purge!

Qin Wu personally wrote letters to Regis and Marquis Godfiends. During wartime, Godfiends had to risk their lives in battle, but they still had to pay attention to their descendants to prevent them from harming others.

In fact, the Imperial Court’s announcement was not very useful. After all, the government offices all over the world just needed to put on an act.

On the contrary, Qin Wu’s letter was a lot more effective. Although Regis and Marquis Godfiends couldn’t be bothered with mortal matters and they were more focused on dealing with the demons, they took it seriously when the Supremacy wrote to them. They gave strict orders. It didn’t matter what the members of the various family clans thought, at least on the surface, they had to make it sound good. In Jiang State Capital, all the major family clans immediately stood in line. Everyone praised Meng Chuan and his wife for their love for the people.

“The Imperial Court has issued a decree, and Master has written letters to various Godfiends.” Liu Qiyue sat in Lake Heart Pavilion and flipped through dossiers. She shook her head and said, “The major family clans are now very strict with their clansmen, but it’s just an act. They’re half-heartedly keeping in line.” As Meng Chuan painted, he chuckled softly and said, “People have selfish motives; thus, many things are inevitable. On the surface, the major family clans are doing their best to make everything look fine. That’s already good enough. Those descendants of large family clans will pay attention to their words and actions outside. This way, the havoc they wreak will be reduced by 80 percent.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 258 - Undying Realm
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Yes, it’s already pretty good if they can pay attention to their words and actions on the surface.” Liu Qiyue nodded.

Meng Chuan continued, “Time is heartless. After five to ten years, many descendants of Godfiend family clans will probably return to their old ways. The two of us can only frequently raid Jiang State Capital, but we can’t control the entire world. Master can’t write letters to Regis and Marquis Godfiends every one or two years, right?”

“We’ll do our best,” said Liu Qiyue. “In comparison, the demons are the greatest enemy.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan also turned serious.

Demons...

“Ah Chuan, you said that the demons are becoming more and more cunning. The number of demon monarchs we can kill is decreasing,” said Liu Qiyue.

“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded. “They are very cautious.” “Ever since the demon army invaded en masse, the demons have become more cautious over the years. In fact, the frequency of their attacks has decreased,” said Liu Qiyue. “There are many demon monarchs in the Demon Realm. There are a bunch of newly-advanced third firmament demon monarchs every year. Every year, demon monarchs will constantly infiltrate the human world. The number of demon monarchs in the human world hasn’t decreased over the years, but their attacking frequency has decreased.” Meng Chuan nodded. “Yes, the demon monarchs are afraid of death. Even if the upper echelons give the order, the demon monarchs aren’t willing to die. Therefore, the frequency of their attacks will be reduced. According to what I know, the demons mainly rely on enticing treasures that can be exchanged with credit to make them risk their lives. After all, they are hiding in the human world. The demons can’t force them.”

“There are clearly many armies hidden in the shadows. Are they just going to continue this war of attrition with humans?” asked Liu Qiyue. “A war of attrition doesn’t benefit the demons. Although many mortals have died, with how fast humans produce, it won’t affect our foundation in the human world. As for Godfiends teams? They are composed of the most elite Great Solar Godfiends. Although there are losses in every battle, we have even more Marquis Godfiends now. In the past 11 years, Archean Mountain has produced ten new Marquis Godfiends, including us.”

Xue Feng, Yang Huayu, Meng Chuan, Liu Qiyue, Xiao Yunyue...

Ten new Marquis Godfiends had risen in the past 11 years. With the strongest Great Solar Godfiends risking their lives and engaging in life-and-death battles, they now had a higher chance of breaking through despite it being crueler.

“It doesn’t affect the foundations of mortals. Godfiends are also breaking through on a regular basis,” said Liu Qiyue. “Are the demons going to continue like this?” “What do you mean?” Meng Chuan looked at his wife.

“Ah Chuan, you said before that in the Dao of Yin-Yang, Yin is about accumulation and convergence. Yang is about the eruption of accumulated strength,” said Liu Qiyue. “I think the demons will erupt one day. They have been lurking for so long and have planned for so long. Once they really attack... Ah Chuan, you have to be careful.”

Meng Chuan nodded. He had actually thought about the situation that his wife had just described. According to the humans’ judgment, many demon monarchs infiltrated the human world every year, but their attacking frequency had decreased. Meng Chuan was similarly uneasy, but what could he do?

Clang! Clang!

The sound of weapons colliding could be heard from outside.

Meng Chuan and his wife looked through the window at a distant spot. Meng You and Meng An were sparring

“You’er and An’er have also read through the dossiers,” said Liu Qiyue with a sigh. “They know of the sins that Wang Cong had committed, and also know how much darkness there is in Jiang State Capital. They have become much more diligent in their cultivation.”

“They should know about such things at their age,” said Meng Chuan.

“I really hope that we can finish this war. There’s no need for You’er and An’er to continue fighting for generations,” said Liu Qiyue.

Meng Chuan nodded. He also hoped for the war to end quickly. However, there was no hope of victory now. All he knew was that the demons’ forces in the human world were growing stronger and stronger.

Inside the chamber, the white-robed Meng Chuan sat cross-legged. Lightning flashed all over his body.

After attaining a fourth-level Essence Soul, Meng Chuan’s perception of the ‘microscopic world’ had grown even stronger. His view of everything in his body was magnified countless times. A drop of blood was even wider than the sea. Even the smallest particles that formed his body were like towering mountains. When his Essence Soul seeped into a particle, he could probe the particle space.

With his present perception of the ‘microscopic world,’ the particle space seemed much vaster. The core that occupied a trillionth of the particle was the size of a stone stable after being magnified countless times.

Chi! Chi! Chi! A droplet-shaped crystal entered the particle space from the outside world. Meng Chuan’s figure appeared inside the droplet-shaped crystal.

The particle space was controlled completely. Under the guidance of Meng Chuan’s physical body mystic technique, the particle space absorbed the pocket grotto-heaven’s Origins power. Chi! Chi! Chi!

As he absorbed the pocket grotto-heaven’s Origins power, the particle space became more stable. Finally, this droplet-shaped crystal entered the particle space and landed on the core sphere that was the size of a stone table.

Boom!

The particle space trembled. Meng Chuan stood in the middle of the water droplet-shaped crystal, curiously looking at the world.

This is the particle space? Meng Chuan’s inner self had indeed become a droplet-shaped crystal. He looked at the core sphere beneath his feet and looked up at the vast particle space, as though he was looking at a starry sky.

My psyche is located in the middle of the particle space, allowing me to control this particle space completely. This particle space is now much stronger than the others.

His psyche was also called Essence Soul Thought. An Essence Soul was composed of billions of thoughts. It was usually complete. One’s Essence Soul had to reach the fourth level before the Essence Soul could gather and disperse. It was easy to keep a portion of one’s Essence Soul sealed even if they were 5000 kilometers away. There was no need to mention the controlled splitting of one’s Essence Soul within their body! Essence Soul Thought was the smallest quanta of the Essence Soul. To reach the Undying realm, one had to leave an Essence Soul Thought in each particle space. Once this was achieved in all particle spaces, one would complete the Unification of Spirit and Body.

Every particle would undergo a qualitative change. Under the control of the unique consciousness, the entire body would undergo a qualitative change.

Divine powers becoming stronger? Gaining multiple divine powers?These were just external manifestations of one’s powerful body. After reaching the Undying realm, one would have immense strength and a nigh-indestructible body. It was difficult to even pierce through one’s skin. Even if one’s skin were to be pierced or if their body were sliced into 18 portions, they would be able to become whole instantly. Even if one’s head was pierced dozens of times, they would be instantly healed. At this stage, one could be said to be undying! Killing an Undying realm expert was too difficult. In the later realms, the physical body cultivation system’s suppression of the Godfiend cultivation system became more and more obvious.

However, this cultivation system was just too difficult... A fourth-level Essence Soul and reaching the Realm of Dao were just the foundation of reaching the Undying realm. Only by expending a vast amount of energy could one attain such a terrifying body.

During the cultivation process, Essence Soul Thoughts exerted immense pressure on particle spaces. One had to cultivate the particle spaces before it could hold an Essence Soul Thought stably. However, the body was composed of billions of particles, so the cultivation process naturally took a long time. According to Meng Chuan’s original plan, he would reach the Undying realm in a year by consuming ten Scarlet Blood Divine Pills a day.

However, Meng Chuan was pleasantly surprised to discover that the Origins power from the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead was very magical. It was directly absorbed by his body and particles. His cultivation efficiency was several times that of using Darkstar Quintessential Essence.

Although he couldn’t cultivate his body for too long a day, his overall speed was still much faster.

Days passed. Jiang State Capital regained its tranquility. The Godfiend family clans were much more obedient. Meng Chuan often went out to act as a reinforcement. He had also done a defense switch twice. However, his daily cultivation did not stop!

9th March.

Just after half a year, Meng Chuan had finally succeeded. He had reached the Undying realm.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 259 - Three Great Divine Powers
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

3rd March, early in the morning.

In one of Meng Manor’s chambers, Meng Chuan had been cultivating for six hours continuously. Although his body was tired and his cultivation efficiency had decreased, he decided to push on since success was within arm’s reach.

Boom!

After an Essence Soul Thought entered the final particle space’s core sphere, his body transformed completely.

Is this the Undying realm? Meng Chuan sensed the changes in his body. Mysterious runic patterns naturally appeared on his arms and legs. These runic patterns weren’t Lightning Runes. These runic patterns were naturally produced when his body had reached a certain level. On demons, runic patterns were called Demon Runes. On Godfiends, runic patterns were called God runic patterns. They were just different names for runic patterns. These runic patterns had naturally formed; they were a manifestation of the mysterious power that Meng Chuan now possessed. Boom!

Meng Chuan sat there cross-legged. With a thought, he issued billions of commands, gathering all the particle spaces into one. The surrounding void collapsed and distorted, turning dark and chaotic.

Around Meng Chuan, space became unpredictable. A distance of 100 feet could become 10 feet, and a distance of 10 feet could turn into 100 feet.

The power contained in my undying body can cause the void to distort if I don’t restrain it? Meng Chuan was shocked. My saber can only distort the void due to the profundity contained within the Heart Intent Saber Art. However, I can now cause changes in the laws of the world with pure physical strength. Perhaps this is using raw strength to alter the laws!

With a thought, Meng Chuan completely restrained his strength. The surrounding void returned to normal.

I can now tear apart divine armaments with my bare hands. Even Meng Chuan was shocked by his current strength. Even a mountain-sized rock demon monarch would be sent flying by a single punch from me.

Despite his tiny size, his strength was much more terrifying than a rock demon monarch.

It’s a pity that from now on, the Power of Essence Soul will no longer allow me to unleash greater physical strength. In the past, he could use the Power of Essence Soul to increase his strength by two or three times. But now, the Power of Essence Soul was no longer able to increase his strength. This is because I have an Essence Soul Thought entrenched in every particle space. With this, every particle can be perfectly controlled. My control over my strength can’t be any more perfect. Meng Chuan sighed. It could be said that he now had absolute control over his physical strength.

Even Regis Godfiends didn’t dare say that they could perfectly control their physical strength. This was because the Godfiend cultivation system wasn’t focused on physical strength. Instead, the Godfiend cultivation systems granted one extreme control over Quintessential Essence. After becoming a Regis Godfiend, one could perfectly control their Seamless Quintessential Essence. With such control, their strength would also be terrifying. However, the Power of Essence Soul would no longer be able to further increase one’s control over their Quintessential Essence.

My physical strength should be equivalent to a peak Marquis Godfiend with a Great Strength Fiend Body. My lifeforce matches a peak Marquis Godfiend with an Indestructible Divine Body. My body’s toughness exceeds that of even Samsara Divine Body Marquis Godfiends! However, the physical body cultivation system’s Undying realm doesn’t grant me anything like the Darkstar domain or the Seamless domain. Therefore, an Undying realm expert’s physical strength alone is equivalent to a peak Marquis Godfiend-close to the strength of a Regis Godfiend.

However, I have a Darkstar Domain, and I’m the fastest in the world. Combined with terrifying Undying realm strength and nigh-indestructible body, I should have the strength of an ordinary Regis Godfiend.

Meng Chuan was just guessing his approximate strength. Archean Mountain’s predecessors had determined the strength of an Undying realm expert. However, it was difficult to determine the strength of an Undying realm expert who was also the fastest in the world. Meng Chuan judged his current strength to be at the Regis Godfiend level. He probably had to fight a fifth Firmament demon monarch to determine the limits of his newfound strength and divine powers.

Meng Chuan understood the divine powers he could use. When he was at the Divine Power realm, he only had one divine power—the Divine Eye of Lightning. After reaching the Undying realm, he had three divine powers. Many fifth Firmament demon monarchs only had three or four divine powers.

Boom!

With a thought, the mysterious runes on his arms and legs surfaced once again. The terrifying power contained in his body gathered at the runes naturally. A very thin layer of light appeared around his body. This layer of light contained billions of particles of spatial energy that combined intricately after passing through the runes. Its power was naturally unimaginable. At that moment, Meng Chuan’s body seemed to be filled with light. His body contained an even more terrifying might. The surrounding void immediately distorted and collapsed. The void distortion was even greater than before.

He stood there as the void trembled. This is the Indestructible Divine Armor? Meng Chuan looked at the thin layer of light over his skin. I finally have a traditional divine power of the physical body cultivation system.

There were some common divine powers in the physical body cultivation system. Divine powers like the Indestructible Divine Armor were the most common. Upon reaching the Undying realm, nearly 90 percent of the cultivators would gain this divine power. This was an extremely powerful divine power that was used in battle. Divine power runes appeared on the arms and legs, which was why the Indestructible Divine Armor was strongest at the arms and legs. Their limbs could be used as divine armaments for direct combat.

The strength of the Indestructible Divine Armor was weaker around other parts of his body, but it still provided an astonishing defense. Cultivators of the physical body cultivation system mainly fought bare-handed because they weren’t skilled at weapon refinement. Their limbs were also stronger than divine armaments, so they naturally preferred unarmed combat.

Unarmed combat? Meng Chuan looked down at his palms. There was an additional layer of light over his skin. The light layer could change according to his will. It became as sharp as a blade at the edges of his palm. At the tip of his finger, it became as sharp as a sword tip.

Meng Chuan shook his head. My Demon Slayer has devoured demons for more than ten years. Its power has increased greatly. Furthermore, I’m used to saber arts. Godfiends were relatively skilled at crafting weapons. He could still find weapons that were stronger than his body. Demon Slayer’s current might was even stronger than his body. There was no need to fight empty-handed.

Converge. With a thought, the layer of light around his body converged as he dispelled the Indestructible Divine Armor. This divine power required him to unleash the full power of his body’s particle spaces. If he maintained this divine power constantly, it would be too terrifying. Even Great Solar Godfiends’ hearts would tremble if they saw Meng Chuan. Mortals would immediately faint.

The second divine power allows me to unleash the accumulated lightning in my body instantly? Meng Chuan gently extended his palm.

With his very strong body, massive amounts of lightning filled every particle space in his body. When countless bolts of lightning gathered at a single point, the might of the attack would be inconceivable.

I can only unleash 30% of the lightning in my body at once with my Undying Body. In other words, I can only unleash three strong lightning attacks consecutively.There was too much lightning in the billions of particle spaces. After attaining the Unification of Spirit and Body-which required an Essence Soul Thought to be entrenched in each of the billions of particle spaces-he could unleash 30% of the lightning in his body at once! This was the limit of Meng Chuan’s control over the lightning in his body. Any more lightning forced into a single point would result in his body exploding! It was impossible to condense boundless lightning into a single point perfectly. Lightning scattered naturally, so to condense lightning into a single point? The difference in power was like night and day.

To gather 30 percent of the lightning in his body into a single point and unleash it.

Meng Chuan vaguely understood that he had an extremely powerful technique.

I can’t test it in Jiang State Capital. When I’m out, I’ll try this divine power in an empty area. This divine power releases lightning, so I’ll call it Heaven’s Wrath.

The Indestructible Divine Armor was a common divine power in the physical body cultivation system, and it was also the main combat divine power. Heaven’s Wrath was a divine power produced by Meng Chuan’s physique. The Divine Eye of Lightning was Meng Chuan’s first divine power-an electromagnetic domain.

The range of my electromagnetic domain is even greater now. I wonder how much weaker it is compared to King White Treasure’s reconnaissance technique. Meng Chuan felt an itch in his heart. He was looking forward to this divine power the most. During the war, this divine power was the greatest weapon against demons! For example, King White Treasure alone was comparable to all the other Godfiends in Black Sand Grotto-Heaven.

Open. A divine eye opened at Meng Chuan’s glabella.

The electromagnetic waves—that were much stronger than before-surged in all directions. Meng Chuan carefully sensed the depth his electromagnetic domain could go underground

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 260 - King White Treasure and Meng Chuan
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Early in the morning, Meng You and Meng An practiced their sword and spear techniques next to a peach tree in Lake Heart Pavilion.

Liu Qiyue watched her children cultivate with a smile. Suddenly, an invisible electromagnetic wave spread out. The electromagnetic wave was very concealed, but as a Marquis Godfiend, Liu Qiyue could naturally sense the electromagnetic wave with her Darkstar domain. The electromagnetic wave spread out in all directions, out of Meng Manor, and into a wider area.

Ah Chuan is using his electromagnetic domain? Liu Qiyue was secretly puzzled. Why did he use his electromagnetic domain when he’s in seclusion?

Very quickly, the electromagnetic waves receded.

In moments

Huh? Liu Qiyue’s Darkstar domain naturally covered the entire Lake Heart Pavilion and the chamber. Previously, the aura in the chamber was isolated, but now, she could sense a power that made her heart tremble.

This power was extremely unique. It was as though all objects had been destroyed, all living beings had perished, and the world had entered a state of stillness. An absolute coldness accompanied the sense of complete annihilation. There was no light, heat, or life. Only absolute coldness...

What is Ah Chuan doing? He can perfectly isolate his powers when he cultivates. I can’t even look into the chamber. Why is there a trace of aura leaking out? Ah Chuan didn’t isolate his aura well? Liu Qiyue was secretly puzzled.

It’s cold, so cold. My body is cold; even my Essence Soul is cold. Meng Chuan sat cross-legged and turned into an ice sculpture. Beside him was a small black calabash that had been opened.

After reaching the Undying realm, Meng Chuan attempted to absorb the Origins Returning baneful aura given to him by his master. According to his master, Origins Returning baneful aura was stronger than Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura and Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura! It was obtained by an Archean Mountain senior from another world. Meng Chuan believed that his body was powerful, and he had been filled with confidence. However, he had suffered greatly just by absorbing a sliver of Origins Returning baneful aura. For an instant, he couldn’t even restrain his aura inside the chamber. A sliver of his aura leaked out, allowing Liu Qiyue to sense it.

Of course, the moment his Essence Soul was affected, Meng Chuan immediately reacted and restrained his aura. This was because many Essence Soul Thoughts lingered in the billions of particles, allowing him to stay lucid.

It’s really cold. It was unlike other baneful auras that contained evil and resentment. Origins Returning baneful aura was just cold! Absolute coldness happened when everything turned still.

Although Meng Chuan’s body had transformed into an ice sculpture, his lifeforce remained extremely potent. The baneful aura damaged his body as he refined it while healing his injuries. In fact, if he resisted, his skin would prevent any baneful aura from invading his body. However, to absorb and refine it, he had to give passage and allow the baneful to invade his body.

As he healed his wounds, he slowly refined the sliver of baneful aura.

After ten minutes, he completely refined the sliver of Origins Returning baneful aura.

It’s done. The ice on Meng Chuan’s body instantly shattered. Joy appeared in his eyes. This Origins Returning baneful aura is very potent. Even with an Undying Body, it’s still so difficult to refine it. Once it’s completely refined... my baneful aura domain will surpass all other Lightning Devastator Fiend Body Regis Godfiends in history. It will become a peak killing move of mine.

Following that, Meng Chuan stood up happily and left the chamber. Meng Chuan arrived at an empty area at the edge of Lake Heart Pavillion by following the sounds and saw his wife and children.

“Ah Chuan.” Liu Qiyue walked over and whispered, “There was a sliver of aura that leaked out just now. That aura seemed very terrifying.”

“I’m refining a baneful aura. I directed the baneful aura into my body. What leaked out was just a sliver,” explained Meng Chuan. “Back then, I was shocked by the sliver of baneful aura and forgot to restrain my aura.”

“What kind of baneful aura is this?” Liu Qiyue was curious.

“Master calls it Origins Returning baneful aura,” said Meng Chuan. “I’ve never heard of it before. Master also said that it’s unique to Archean Mountain.”

Liu Qiyue nodded.

“Oh right, my electromagnetic domain has expanded greatly.” Meng Chuan couldn’t help but smile.

“Expanded greatly?” Liu Qiyue’s eyes lit up. “What about underground reconnaissance?”

Meng Chuan smiled and nodded. “Of course, my range has increased greatly too.” “How extensive is it?” Liu Qiyue was excited. “On land, the electromagnetic domain spans a distance of 15 kilometers,” said Meng Chuan softly. “Underground, I can probe up to 1.5 kilometers deep.” “1.5 kilometers?” Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but immediately say, “King White Treasure’s range is said to only be 2.5 kilometers.”

“Yes, and my movement speed is unparalleled. It naturally surpasses him,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. “Although the range of my electromagnetic domain is inferior to his reconnaissance technique, I should be on par with him when my speed is taken into account.

Liu Qiyue nodded immediately and was extremely excited. “This way, you can seek out the demons lurking underground in our Great Zhou Dynasty.”

The underground was vast and deep. If a search was done in a carpet-style manner, it would be like searching for a needle in a haystack. The efficiency would be very low. Marquis and Regis Godfiends would choose the most efficient method for killing demons. Previously, Meng Chuan’s designated rescue area of six states was the best way his strength could be used. Of course, the demons in the six states were mainly killed by Godfiend teams. He was just responsible for protecting these Godfiend teams. If he were to conduct underground reconnaissance, his contributions would be on par with King White Treasure’s. The number of demons he could kill would rise to an unimaginable number.

It wasn’t an exaggeration to say that one person could match an entire sect’s contribution to the war efforts. King White Treasure was an example!

“I just broke through, so I’ll be resting. I’ll head to Archean Mountain in the afternoon and inform Master,” said Meng Chuan.

“Master will definitely be very happy,” Liu Qiyue said excitedly. “Among the three great dynasties in the world, the situation in Black Sand Dynasty is the best. It’s because of King White Treasure!”

Meng Chuan was rather excited as well. He had long sworn an oath to wipe out all the demons in the world. However, he knew how difficult this path was. Now that his electromagnetic domain’s range had increased drastically, he knew how useful he could be. Under the present global situation, he was previously equivalent to ten Marquis Godfiends. However, he was now comparable to King White Treasure. He was comparable to a sect when it came to slaughtering demons.

This made him extremely useful.

Since I have such strength, I need to use it.

After reaching the Undying realm and refining a sliver of Origins Returning baneful aura, Meng Chuan was rather exhausted. After giving his children pointers on their cultivation, he ate lunch. He then left for Archean Mountain in a good mood several hours later.In a pavilion on Archean Mountain.

Qin Wu’s expression turned cold as he frowned. “Has King White Treasure left?” “Let’s go.” Archean Mountain Lord sighed and said, “The promise was to chase down demons in our Great Zhou Dynasty for a month every year. Once the month is up, he would leave.”

“In a year, he spends eight months in Black Sand Dynasty, three months in the Great Yue Dynasty, and only a month in our Great Zhou Dynasty.” Qin Wu frowned. “Every month, the treasures we give are in no way inferior to Two World Island. What right do they have to lend us King White Treasure for just a month?”

“Black Sand Grotto-Heaven’s explanation is that the situation in the Great Yue Dynasty is worse. There are even more demons lurking underground over there. If he goes there, he can kill more demons,” explained Archean Mountain Lord. “I’ve also privately spoken to King White Treasure and gifted him a treasure. However, he said that... we are to negotiate with Black Sand Grotto-Heaven. He completely ignores our Archean Mountain.”

Qin Wu pondered with a frown.

Black Sand Dynasty enjoyed the best situation across the three dynasties. In the first ten years, King White Treasure had been staying in Black Sand Dynasty to seek out the demons. From the 11th year, Black Sand Grotto-Heaven agreed to send King White Treasure to the Great Yue Dynasty for three months a year and to the Great Zhou Dynasty for a month.

Suddenly, Qin Wu sensed Meng Chuan enter Archean Mountain.

Meng Chuan is here? Qin Wu pricked up his brows. He immediately sent a voice transmission to the old steward to receive him.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 261 - Heaven’s Favor
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Swoosh.

Meng Chuan landed in front of Grotto-Heaven Pavilion’s entrance. He saw the old steward welcoming him with a smile. “Lord Meng Chuan, please.”

With my flying speed, Master is still able to get the steward to welcome me ahead of time. He probably discovered me hundreds of kilometers away. Meng Chuan secretly marveled at his master’s means. He followed the old steward in. After passing the winding corridor, he arrived at a familiar garden that had a pavilion. In the pavilion, Qin Wu and Archean Mountain Lord were sitting there drinking tea and chatting. The old steward naturally took his leave. Meng Chuan walked over and bowed respectfully. “Greetings, Master, Mountain Lord.”

“Junior Brother Meng, it’s rare for you to return to Archean Mountain,” said Archean Mountain Lord with a smile.

Meng Chuan muttered to himself. In the past ten years, I’ve returned several times. However, most of the time, I would leave after meeting Master once.

“Of course, he has important matters to attend to when he returns.” Qin Wu looked at Meng Chuan and nodded in satisfaction. “Your physical mystic technique has already reached a new realm. If my senses are correct, you have also successfully refined that wisp of Origins Returning baneful aura.” “I can’t hide anything from you, Master,” said Meng Chuan immediately. In front of his master, he had perfectly converged aura. However, he couldn’t hide his Essence Soul, body, and baneful aura from his Master’s eyes. Archean Mountain Lord asked in puzzlement, “Origins Returning baneful aura? What kind of baneful aura is this?”

“It’s a baneful aura stored in Treasury A3. Our world doesn’t produce such baneful aura. It was obtained by an ancestor of Archean Mountain in another world. It’s extremely precious, and only our Archean Mountain possesses it,” Qin Wu simply explained. “Treasury A3?” Archean Mountain Lord nodded slightly.

Although he was the mountain lord, Archean Mountain was the most ancient sect. There were too many secrets that only Supremacies were qualified to know. For example, Archean Mountain Lord didn’t have the right to the contents of the sect’s A-class treasuries. Only Creation Supremacies were qualified to know about the contents and open them.

Qin Wu waved his hand.

Six large bronze calabashes immediately appeared in the garden beside him. Qin Wu said, “In here are two cubes of baneful aura. I believe it’s enough for your cultivation. Archean Mountain only has five cubes of this baneful aura. You took nearly half of it... In the future, only one junior will be able to master it.”

Meng Chuan smiled. “I believe that juniors will have their own opportunities. Perhaps, they will encounter better baneful auras.” With that said, Meng Chuan waved his hand and stored the six bronze calabashes into his Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead.

Huh? Archean Mountain Lord’s pupils constricted when he saw Meng Chuan wave his hand to collect the treasures.

One needed to place items inside storage bags.

To collect treasures with a wave of his hand? A grotto-heaven treasure?

“These two cubes of Origins Returning baneful aura will cost 200 million credits,” said Qin Wu. “You do not have enough credits. I’ll deduct your 132 million credits first. You still owe 68 million credits.”

He can buy things on credit? Archean Mountain Lord could only mutter inwardly when he saw this. One usually needed enough credits to exchange for treasures. Nobody took the treasures first and made up for the credit debt later. Also, a grotto-heaven treasure was extremely valuable. It was nearly impossible to obtain them with credits. Could it be that Meng Chuan obtained one by luck? Archean Mountain Lord didn’t ask further.

Meng Chuan obediently agreed. “I owe 68 million credits.” With his electromagnetic domain’s expanded range, Meng Chuan wasn’t worried about his debt.

“Since you’ve taken the baneful aura, is there anything else? If there’s nothing else, you may return.” Qin Wu continued drinking his tea.

“I have something to report,” said Meng Chuan.

“Speak.” Qin Wu put down his teacup, picked up the teapot beside him, and poured the tea leisurely.

“I have an electromagnetic domain that can penetrate underground,” said Meng Chuan respectfully. “I have a range of 1.5 kilometers underground.”

Qin Wu looked up at Meng Chuan. His pupils dilated as he stared blankly at Meng Chuan.

Chi! Chi! Chi!

Tea poured from the spout of the teapot. The teacup quickly filled up, and tea spilled all over, flowing across the table. His underground reconnaissance range is 1.5 kilometers? King White Treasure can only probe 2.5 kilometers underground. The area is smaller, but Meng Chuan is several times faster than King White Treasure. Overall, Meng Chuan’s underground reconnaissance efficiency is probably no less than King White Treasure’s. Qin Wu had a wealth of experience when it came to various situations. At that moment, he quickly processed Meng Chuan’s information and began thinking excitedly.

“Master, Master?” A voice rang out, interrupting Qin Wu’s thoughts.

Huh? Qin Wu immediately stopped thinking.

“The tea is overflowing,” reminded Meng Chuan.

Qin Wu lowered his head and immediately raised the teapot’s spout. He placed the teapot to the side and smiled as he looked at the tea that spilled out. “Well spilled! Well spilled! Hahaha, hahaha... I have cultivated to the Creation realm and have everything under control. However, I’m very happy to spill the tea this time.”

“Meng Chuan, you mentioned an electromagnetic domain? Is it a divine power that you obtained from cultivating the physical mystic technique?” asked Qin Wu. “I remember that your underground reconnaissance range was only a quarter-kilometer when you used this divine power against Greater Demon Monarch Blackrock.”

Archean Mountain had a detailed dossier, and Blackrock had explained everything. Therefore, Qin Wu guessed the reason when Meng Chuan said that his electromagnetic domain had an underground range of 1.5 kilometers around him.

“That’s right. After breaking through, the strength of my divine power increased drastically.” Meng Chuan nodded.

Qin Wu immediately nodded in delight. “Good, good, good!” He said “good” thrice, which showed how excited he was.

“Junior Brother Meng, are you saying that...” Archean Mountain Lord couldn’t help but say, “You have an underground reconnaissance range of 1.5 kilometers?” “Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded.“Have you already tested it?” asked Archean Mountain Lord immediately. “Only King White Treasure’s reconnaissance technique has such an extensive range underground. You are only a Marquis Godfiend, but your range is only slightly smaller than his? Are you sure?”

Meng Chuan said, “I’ve experimented on the way to Archean Mountain several times. There’s no mistake.”

“This... This...” Archean Mountain Lord couldn’t believe it.

“The heavens have shown pity on us humans,” said Qin Wu with a sigh. “To give birth to King White Treasure, and now there’s Meng Chuan!”

“Junior Brother Meng is several times faster than King White Treasure. Even if his range is smaller, his reconnaissance efficiency might not be inferior to King White Treasure’s.” Archean Mountain Lord was extremely excited. “The heavens are pitying us. They pity us humans.”

King White Treasure and Meng Chuan would influence the war between humans and demons hugely. They hunted down the demons and, alone, they could match a sect! There were only three sects in the world. It was obvious how important the two were. “From today onwards, I’ll arrange for other Regis Godfiends to reinforce the six states. You will be like King White Treasure. All you need to do is carry out underground reconnaissance for a few hours a day,” said Qin Wu as he looked at Meng Chuan. “Also, I’ll give you Origins Returning baneful aura and the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead for free.”

“No.” Meng Chuan said immediately, “Those two treasures are worth 700 million credits. When I do underground reconnaissance, I will naturally obtain spoils of war. Just slowly deduct the owed credit from whatever the spoils of war will be worth. The sect has its rules.”

“Junior Brother Meng, just take it.” Archean Mountain Lord’s beard was trembling as he said excitedly, “It’s just 700 million credits! Credits are bestowed on a person whenever they take up a position in the sect. Your current position... is Archean Mountain’s top Patroller. Nobody can replace you. Nobody will say a word about us bestowing 700 million credits to you. If we were to invite King White treasure to our Great Zhou Dynasty to carry out underground reconnaissance, 700 million credits will probably not even give us him for a year!”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 262 - Stone Talisman
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Take it.” Qin Wu said with a smile, “Although Origins Returning baneful aura is precious, it has been in the treasury for a long period of time. It’s a good thing that you can refine it, making it useful. As for the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead, a pocket grotto-heaven, that has a 250 kilometer-wide space, is nothing to Archean Mountain. Instead, it will be very convenient for you. When you carry out underground reconnaissance and kill demons, you can throw all the demon corpses and treasures in it.”

Meng Chuan understood that Archean Mountain definitely had a large-scale grotto-heaven treasure. For example, every disciple had to go to Nine Mystical Caves, which spanned more than 250 kilometers.

“I believe I’ll be able to obtain a lot of credits by carrying out underground reconnaissance.” Meng Chuan didn’t like to take advantage of others. In the future, when he pursued the demons, he alone could match a sect’s results. How many demons would he kill annually? Those demon monarchs could be exchanged for a massive amount of credits. In addition, the treasures left behind by the demon monarchs could also be exchanged for credits. 700 million credits? It really wasn’t much.

“Every time a person takes up a new position, we will give credits,” said Qin Wu. “In the past ten plus years, you were the nation’s top Patroller. You guarded six states and were equivalent to a Regis Godfiend guarding a city pass. You earned five million credits every year. Now, you are the number one Patroller of Archean Mountain. You will earn 20 million credits every year. After giving you Origins Returning baneful aura and the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead, you will not receive any credit for the next 35 years. In that case, there will be nothing personal.” Qin Wu looked at Meng Chuan.

“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded.

“Having it be one of us is the best.” Archean Mountain Lord sighed. “King White Treasure only came for a month. Black Sand Grotto-Heaven ruthlessly fleeced us.”

Meng Chuan couldn’t help but ask, “How much did they ask for?”

With a smile, Qin Wu said, “Although all of us are working together to deal with the demons, we are ultimately three different sects. We still have differences. Black Sand Grotto-Heaven also knows that our Archean Mountain has accumulated many resources over generations. It’s normal for them to take the opportunity to get more benefits. If Two World Island invites you over in the future, we will also take the opportunity to ask for some benefits from Two World Island. Leave these matters to me. I’m afraid you don’t know what benefits you can get.”

“Yes, Master, you can decide.” Meng Chuan nodded.

“Regardless, you have to first carry out underground reconnaissance of our Great Zhou Dynasty before thinking of helping Two World Island,” said Qin Wu. “King White Treasure took ten years to sweep through Black Sand Dynasty’s underground.” “I’ll begin the reconnaissance today,” said Meng Chuan.

“No rush.” Qin Wu said, “I’ll send a Regis Godfiend to take over responsibility for your six assigned states. You can begin sweeping through our Great Zhou Dynasty tomorrow.’ With that said, Qin Wu waved his hand solemnly. A gray stone talisman appeared in his palm. The gray stone looked ordinary, but from the runic patterns on its surface, Meng Chuan felt as though spacetime was in chaos.

“Take this treasure with you.” Qin Wu stared at Meng Chuan solemnly. “Remember, crush it when you encounter the danger of death. Don’t crush it at any other time.”

“Oh?” Meng Chuan looked at the gray stone talisman.
