“Yes.” Meng Chuan nodded.

The Black Sand Dynasty was in the best situation among the three great dynasties, so why were they abandoning most of their cities as well? Previously, they had been defending with all their might. Now that they had abandoned them, there was probably a more profound reason.

That night, all the various states’ guardians received Archean Mountain’s orders. Everyone was shocked, and they also sent letters to Archean Mountain to confirm.

Meng Chuan and his wife didn’t sleep the entire night. From the decisions made by Archean Mountain and Black Sand Grotto-Heaven, they sensed danger approaching

The next morning, Meng Chuan continued his underground reconnaissance as usual. He traveled at an extremely high speed at a depth of 31 kilometers underground. He kept his Divine Eye of Lightning open as he sensed his surroundings.

He continued flying as he carried out reconnaissance, from morning to afternoon.

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan flew under Gu Mountain Prefecture City.

Gu Mountain Prefecture City was also one of the many prefecture cities that Wu State would abandon. It could barely be considered in the center of Wu State, but its geographical location was not as central as Eastcalm Prefecture City! Furthermore, more than half of the Meng family lived in Eastcalm Prefecture City. If Meng Chuan and his wife could choose, they would also choose Eastcalm Prefecture City as one of the remaining cities. This made it easier for the surrounding prefecture cities and county cities to migrate.

Gu Mountain Prefecture City was where he and his wife had stayed for many years, the place where they had their children. It would become a barren city in the future.

“What? We’re not allowed to complete the transaction?”

There were many people gathered outside Gu Mountain Prefecture City’s government office.

“We have already signed a contract. We are willing parties. We will pay the necessary taxes, so why can’t we complete the transaction?” Many people were standing anxiously outside the government office. They were prepared to conduct a property transaction today.

The transaction of houses had to be done through the government. One reason was to pay taxes, and the second was to determine who the owner of the house was. If this wasn’t done through the government, they would not be protected by the laws of the Imperial Court.

“Everyone.” Finally, an official came out as guards protected him. The official laughed loudly and said, “Everyone, don’t worry. We have just received the Imperial Court’s orders From now on, all property transactions will stop. As for when it will revive, we will have to wait for the Imperial Court’s new orders.”

“The Imperial Court’s orders?” The people looked at each other.

W

If the local officials were to stop them, there was still a way to get around them. Many of them had some background, but if the Imperial Court directly gave orders, it would be troublesome.

“Transactions are forbidden?”

“We are not allowed to sell our houses? This bastard owes my master 500 taels of silver. We can only get him to repay his debt with his house. Why can’t we do the transaction?”

All the county and prefecture cities in the Great Zhou Dynasty were immediately prohibited from completing any property transactions.

That evening.

After carrying out his daily reconnaissance, Meng Chuan arrived at Archean Mountain. It was still Archean Mountain Lord who received him.

Within a vast grotto-heaven, Meng Chuan and Archean Mountain Lord stood there as batches of demon monarch corpses appeared one after another beside them. Soon, more than 1,000 demon monarch corpses were left in an open space. There were also large amounts of weapons and artifacts.

Archean Mountain Lord had a complicated expression. He looked at Meng Chuan and said, “The final battle between demons and humans is coming!”

They are unable to communicate with the outside world because the demons wish to keep it a secret as much as possible.” Archean Mountain Lord sneered. “But we humans have our ways. Now, our Great Zhou Dynasty and the Black Sand Dynasty have abandoned many prefecture and county cities. The demons should realize that the news has been leaked. Therefore, if I didn’t guess wrongly, the demons will likely take the initiative to spread the news since it can’t be kept under wraps,” said Archean Mountain Lord.

As Meng Chuan marveled at the humans’ infiltration of the Demon Realm, he felt immense pressure.

“Do all 605 fourth Firmament demon monarchs have the means to infiltrate the human world?” Meng Chuan asked. “Only large city passes and super-large city passes allow passage to fourth Firmament demon monarchs.”

“Since they have mobilized the army, they have full confidence that they can enter the human world,” said Archean Mountain Lord. “There are too many major city passes. There are seven in the Great Zhou Dynasty. There are 19 major city passes in the world. As long as one is destroyed, they can enter.”

“There are more than 600 of them. Including the fourth Firmament demon monarchs that have sneaked in these past few years, the human world will have about 700 fourth Firmament demon monarchs!” Meng Chuan’s expression changed.

“Not only that.” Archean Mountain Lord said, “Even fourth Firmament demon monarchs are forced to enter the battlefield. I’m afraid that ordinary demon monarchs will also be mobilized on a large scale. There will probably be more than a million ordinary demon monarchs.”

“More than a million ordinary demon monarchs?” Meng Chuan’s face turned pale. There were only tens of thousands of Godfiends in the human world. Humans had done their best to protect them and not let them fight in risky battles. If they fought, they would probably be wiped out quickly. “The lives of mortal demons are as cheap as ants. They might surge in through the various World Entrances located in the seas,” said Archean Mountain Lord calmly. “For the demons, they can always mobilize demon monarchs on a large scale again if they lose this battle. As for us humans, this is the final battle. If we can’t withstand it, humanity will be finished...”

“Can we survive this?” Meng Chuan looked at Archean Mountain Lord.

“Since we chose to build large cities, we have the confidence to defend them.” Archean Mountain Lord looked at Meng Chuan. “If not, wouldn’t it be easier to abandon everything else and simply defend the state capitals?”

Meng Chuan nodded slightly.

In states like Wu State, Jiang State, and Qian State, there would be three large cities with massive populations. In the sparsely-populated states, they would have two large cities each. If one built a large city, they naturally had to allocate forces to defend it.

“About 700 fourth Firmament demon monarchs will be in the human world when they are mobilized. We are in the open while they are in the dark,” said Meng Chuan. “They can gather their strength and attack the Great Zhou Dynasty together. As for our Godfiends, even though there have been many born over the past ten years, Archean Mountain only has 73 Marquis Godfiends. They have to be spread out to guard the cities.”

“700 against 73? How are we going to beat them?” Meng Chuan looked at Archean Mountain Lord. “If we fail to handle the situation well, many Marquis Godfiends will die in battle!”

“The real plan needs to be kept confidential.” Archean Mountain Lord looked at Meng Chuan. “All you need to know is that we have the confidence to fight them.”

“Yes.” Meng Chuan didn’t ask further. He knew that the more people that knew the full plan, the more likely it would be leaked. With his status, he did not even have the right to know the ‘responsive plan.’ Most likely, only a handful across the three major sects in the human world knew of the full plan.

Days passed.

The entire world was in a state of panic. Due to the fact that the Great Yue Dynasty was sparsely populated and that the population was scattered across many islands, they had long abandoned their prefecture and county cities. They only defended large cities—that now had populations exceeding ten million people. However, the Great Zhou Dynasty and Black Sand Dynasty-which had always been in a rather stable state—had begun to abandon their prefecture and county cities and began to construct large cities. This naturally made the people of the world speculate.

“The demons are attacking. Humans are doomed.”

“Directly abandoning the prefecture and county cities is a testimony to the lack of confidence.”

Countless mortals had such discussions.

“We can all move into the big cities. Powerful Godfiends guard the big cities. It’s much safer. In the future, our children can cultivate in peace.”

“This is to protect us better. Demon monarchs often slaughter those in the county cities. Isn’t it safer being in a big city?”

People would also retort naysayers.

In short, the entire world had already begun the migration. It was still fine if the roads were smooth. It was very difficult to move a large number of people in the states where transportation or the roads were lacking.

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan flew high into the sky and saw a large number of people heading towards Jiang State Capital from all directions. The closest people could arrive at Jiang State Capital in just a few hours. The nearest prefecture city’s residents moved very quickly. They’ve already begun migrating. Meng Chuan looked down and saw the outer city that was being built in Jiang State Capital.

Liu Qiyue, who was bathed in flames, stood alone on the city wall. She looked like a flame deity. With her Darkstar domain, soil and countless rocks were moved outside the city. Soil and countless rocks flew up and were melted by Liu Qiyue’s flames. They turned into a magma paste. The magma paste was naturally compressed into shape by her Darkstar domain. It then expanded to the size of an 800-foot-long city wall.

Whoosh.

The slow-flowing magma paste’s hot gases were quickly swept away by Liu Qiyue. The magma paste rapidly cooled down and was forcefully compressed by her Darkstar domain. Finally, it formed a solid wall that was roughly 800 feet long, 120 feet tall, and 60 feet wide.

Boom! The enormous city wall crashed down like a small mountain, connecting with the original city wall.

Through the process of digging out soil and rocks, melting it, molding it, and letting it cool, a towering city wall—that was about 800 feet long-was built. The city wall was mainly used to block ordinary demons. Therefore, this 120-foot-tall wall was enough.

After excavating the land outside, an 800-foot-long, 100-foot-wide moat formed naturally outside the outer city walls. As construction continued, the moat would be as long as the city walls.

Liu Qiyue took a step and arrived at the edge of the city wall that had just been built. She used her Darkstar domain to dig up soil and rocks again and built another section of the city wall.“That’s Marchioness Calmmoon.”

“How impressive.”

“A quarter-kilometer-long city wall was built in less than five minutes.”

“Marchioness Calmmoon began construction this morning. In a day’s time, she has already finished 30 kilometers. The four outer city walls are 100 kilometers long each. It will probably take her about two weeks to complete!” Many mortals were dumbfounded. This was the power of Godfiends! They were filled with confidence. Such mighty Godfiends could definitely withstand the demons.

They didn’t know that ordinary Godfiends were equally shocked. This was only possible when she combined her control over fire with her Darkstar domain. She had also achieved a Fire Dao, which was why she was able to construct the city walls easily.

In terms of building walls, I’m far inferior to Qiyue. Meng Chuan looked at this scene and shook his head.

Phew. After Liu Qiyue placed down another section of the massive city wall, the moat outside the city also extended by a quarter-kilometer. She turned her head and saw the distant Meng Chuan. She smiled and took a step forward. Mortals could no longer see her. If a Marquis Godfiend wanted to hide, ordinary Godfiends wouldn’t be able to see them, much less mortals.

Liu Qiyue flew over with a smile. “In another ten days, Jiang State Capital’s outer city walls will be completed.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 273 - Refining Baneful Aura
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“You built the city really fast,” praised Meng

Chuan.

Liu Qiyue smiled and said, “When combining the Darkstar domain with my Fire Dao, I only need to melt the soil and rocks and shape it into a wall. Any Regis Godfiend can build a city faster than me with the Seamless domain.”

Meng Chuan nodded.

The Seamless domain was mysterious and strange. It had all kinds of unimaginable abilities. His body was powerful and could be said to be undying. He also had divine powers and unparalleled speed... Even so, he estimated that he was barely comparable to an ordinary Regis Godfiend. The more he knew, the more he realized how terrifying a Regis Godfiend was. Half of the strength of a Regis Godfiend came from the Seamless domain.

Coldness, heat, wind, lightning... These were things that could be generated by the Seamless domain with a single thought. This was something that could be described as manifesting the laws of nature with a mere thought.

Sin, grievance, lifespan—the Seamless domain could detect them. Even one’s Essence Soul could not escape the detection of the Seamless domain. As for offensive, defensive, and suppressive abilities, the Seamless domain far exceeded the Darkstar domain.

“Our Great Zhou Dynasty only wants to build dozens of cities. Building a city isn’t difficult,” said Meng Chuan. “What’s difficult is how we’re going to resist the demon monarchs’ attacks.”

“One million demon monarchs.” Liu Qiyue’s brows were filled with worry. Who knew what kind of nightmare it would be when one million demon monarchs wreaked havoc in the human world?

“Archean Mountain and Black Sand Grotto-Heaven are still building cities in the face of such a situation and are trying their best to protect mortals,” said Meng Chuan. “They must have some confidence. We will know the full plan when the war begins.”

“It does need to be kept a secret.” Liu Qiyue said, “In the past, there have been cases of Godfiends colluding with the Skydemon Sect. If news of one million demon monarchs storming their way into the human world spreads, more Godfiends will likely pledge allegiance to the enemy.” Although most Godfiends stood on the human side, there were all kinds of people. Likewise for Godfiends! At such a juncture, it was entirely possible and expected for a small number of betrayals to occur. The full plan to deal with the demons had to be kept a secret. The fewer that knew about it, the lower the possibility of information being leaked.

Even Meng Chuan didn’t know about it... This showed how confidential the matter was.

Most people in the prefecture and county cities had migrated to the large city by the time the Spring Festival came, but there wasn’t a festive mood. This was because the news had spread throughout the human world. As time passed, it became more and more widespread. Many mortals discussed it.

At night, in a residential area outside Jiang State Capital.

“All prefecture and county cities in the Great Zhou Dynasty and the Black Sand Dynasty have been abandoned because they know that they can’t defend them.” There were dozens of people gathered in the small yard.

A skinny youth whispered, “When one or two demon monarchs massacre a county city, we mortals are killed tragically. This time, one million demon monarchs are coming. I heard that there are only more than 10,000 Godfiends in the world. How are we to fend them off? One against a hundred?”

“Can we not fend them off?” “We are all in the state capital.”

The surrounding people whispered. It was a matter of life and death when demon monarchs were concerned.

“It will be difficult.” The skinny youth shook his head. “We have already shown our fear before the battle. The Godfiends are afraid and have retreated to the big cities. If the fight really begins, we might very well lose. Once we lose, we mortals will be slaughtered like pigs and sheep.”

“We can hide in the tunnels.”

“The state capital has a huge population. If we hide in the tunnels, powerful Godfiends will come.”

“Stupid.” The skinny youth scoffed. “In the past, we humans had powerful Godfiends reinforcing us when danger came. This is the real final battle. If we are completely defeated, how could there be any reinforcements? Without Godfiends, the demons will kill all of us.”

The people around him were flustered.

“I’ve heard of a solution. We have a chance of survival when the demons are massacring the others,” said the thin youth in a low voice mysteriously.

“What solution?” Everyone looked at him.

“When facing a demon monarch, shout that you are a spy from the Skydemon Sect,” said the thin youth. “Perhaps you will survive. The Skydemon Sect and the demons are in cahoots. The demons do not kill people from the Skydemon Sect.”

“Will the demon monarchs believe our words?”

The skinny youth scoffed. “There are one million demon monarchs. How would they know of the details? Besides, I’m just suggesting a way to save your life.”

Bam!

The door was suddenly kicked open.

A young man rushed in with several soldiers, causing the people inside to panic. The skinny youth’s expression changed drastically as he angrily shouted, “Ergou, what are you doing!” The youth named Ergou immediately pointed and said, “It’s him. He’s been trying to trick people into joining the Skydemon Sect and has spread the news of a million demon monarchs storming their way into the human world.”

“Take him away.” Several soldiers immediately charged forward.

The people—who had been listening to the commotion just now-did not dare to make a sound or stop them.

“I was just making a suggestion. I have nothing to do with the Skydemon Sect,” shouted the skinny youth immediately.

But the soldiers didn’t hold back at all.

The youth, Ergou, looked at the villagers he was familiar with and said loudly, “Uncles, I’ve served in the military for seven years. I’ve seen the deaths caused by demon monarchs. In the past, haven’t demon monarchs pathetically fled when they attack our hometowns? If the Godfiends can’t stop them, why would they need to work so hard to migrate all of us here? Since there are large cities everywhere in the world, they will definitely be able to fend them off.

“Besides, we humans have a history lasting tens of thousands of years. We have encountered many calamities. If we have survived them, we will survive this calamity. These demons can forget about wiping us out,” said the youth. “Yes. Since they have migrated everybody to the large cities, the Godfiends must be confident.”

“That’s right. Godfiends are more powerful and can easily kill demon monarchs. The construction of the cities is very fast. Marchioness Calmmoon managed to build a mountain-like city wall in less than five minutes. I heard that her husband, Marquis Eastcalm, is even stronger. He is also presiding over Jiang State Capital.”

Right now, the population of Jiang State Capital was close to 20 million. There were all kinds of people in the city. Many people were arrested daily.

Night.

Liu Qiyue returned to Meng Manor’s Lake Heart Pavilion. In the study, Meng Chuan was leisurely painting.

“You’re back?” Meng Chuan looked up and smiled at his wife.

“Yes. The demons have spread the news all over the world as expected. There are too many people discussing this matter in the city.” Liu Qiyue shook her head and said, “Although those who publicize it have been captured and sent to jail, most of it is just hearsay. However, I’ve still arranged for Godfiends to investigate the situation. The Skydemon Sect didn’t send most of the rumormongers; it is too rare to find an actual Skydemon Sect member.”

“Didn’t Archean Mountain already decide on a plan?” Meng Chuan smiled indifferently. “Let these people busy themselves until they are exhausted. They won’t be in the mood to join in such discussions when they are exhausted.”

Liu Qiyue looked at Meng Chuan. “What do you mean?”

“There are still people moving here,” said Meng Chuan. “There are so many people, and they need the corresponding buildings. For example, new Dao Academies and the imperial government’s buildings. All of them are extremely large buildings. Godfiends can build them quickly, but mortals can also build them!

“Firstly, they won’t have the time to chat if they are constructing all these buildings. Under such circumstances, if there are still people spreading the news, it’s likelier for them to be from the Skydemon Sect. Secondly, this will allow those people to earn more money. The migrants here are very anxious. They are probably afraid that the price of food in Jiang State Capital is very high.”

Liu Qiyue nodded slightly.

Those that could reside in prefecture and county cities were not destitute. However, Jiang State Capital was too densely populated. The amount of food consumed every day was astonishing, making the cost of food even higher. High daily expenses naturally worried people.

“By the way, Ah Chuan, have you completely refined the baneful aura?” asked Liu Qiyue.

“It should be done by tonight.” Meng Chuan calmly painted.

Late at night, in a chamber.

Meng Chuan sat cross-legged. A huge bronze calabash laid in front of him. A terrifying aura emanated as the surrounding void seemed to freeze. There were no fluctuations.

It was absolutely cold! Everything had turned still. Meng Chuan’s blood seemed to stop flowing. Even his particles seemed to freeze, but his powerful Undying body was able to withstand the freezing cold.Boom!

After nearly a year of refining Origins Returning baneful aura, his baneful aura domain had finally undergone a qualitative change.

Previously, he had felt like his body had been frozen completely. He had relied on his vitality to support himself. After his transformation, this terrifying ‘cold’ was no longer an enemy but a part of him. Meng Chuan felt a chill from the bottom of his heart. His entire body felt cool-a very comfortable feeling. The baneful aura—that had transformed-freely circulated within his body.

It’s done. Meng Chuan revealed a look of delight. No one has ever refined the Origins Returning baneful aura completely. I can confirm that it’s stronger than Turbid Yin Specter baneful aura and Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura. Among Regis Godfiends in history, my baneful aura domain has to be the strongest.

Not everyone could absorb and refine baneful auras. It depended on one’s Godfiend body.

When one attained a Lightning Devastator Fiend Body and became a Godfiend, baneful aura became a fundamental component of one’s body. That was why they could refine even stronger baneful auras.

In history, all Lightning Devastator Fiend Body Regis Godfiends had terrifying baneful aura domains.

Meng Chuan’s baneful aura domain was among the strongest!

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 274 - Frozen into Nothingness
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Chapter 274 Frozen into Nothingness

After refining Origins Returning baneful aura completely, it was already late at night.

Liu Qiyue leaned on the bed headboard as she read dossiers. She always waited for Meng Chuan before they slept together.

Liu Qiyue looked up. “Ah Chuan.”

Meng Chuan walked into the room, took off his coat, and got on the bed. He leaned towards his wife.

Liu Qiyue couldn’t help but lean against her husband and whispered, “You refined the baneful aura completely?”.

“Yes, it’s just as I expected,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. “The Origins Returning baneful aura I received from Master was just a little more than needed.”

“Master was afraid that you wouldn’t have enough, so he naturally gave you more,” said Liu Qiyue, “How potent is your baneful aura domain after refining Origins returning baneful aura? Let me take a look.”

Meng Chuan extended his finger. A dark-cyan gas appeared on his fingertip. It looked like an ordinary, mysterious dark-cyan gas that did not affect the surroundings at all.

Liu Qiyue’s Darkstar domain was constantly active. Thus, she could sense a horrifying sensation coming from the dark-cyan gas. She couldn’t help but wrap her Quintessential Essence around her body to protect herself. Her instincts told her to be ready to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana at any given moment. She looked at the dark-cyan gas in horror. “Ah Chuan, it clearly doesn’t emit any power, but I can sense how terrifying it is. It’s like I’ll immediately die once it touches me. I wouldn’t even have time to cast Phoenix’s Nirvana.”

“Even Regis Godfiends have to rely on their Seamless domains to protect themselves. They won’t dare to touch it,” said Meng Chuan. “Even so, although they can withstand the baneful aura invading their body, their strength will be greatly reduced.”

“Impressive,” exclaimed Liu Qiyue.

“It’s considered the strongest baneful aura among Regis Godfiends,” said Meng Chuan. “Most of my combat strength now stems from it.”

Liu Qiyue said, “Ah Chuan, you’re a Marquis Godfiend, but you’re already so powerful...” “Firstly, I’m powerful because of my physical body mystic technique. I have an extremely tenacious vitality. In addition, I can refine baneful auras with my Lightning Devastator Fiend Body. Secondly, Master gave this Origins Returning baneful aura to me. This is a mysterious baneful aura obtained from outside this world by our Archean Mountain seniors. It’s now very difficult to find Turbin Yin Specter baneful aura and Extreme Earth Frost baneful aura in this world. Also, Origins Returning baneful aura is stronger than these two baneful auras.”

One needed strength and luck to refine such a powerful baneful aura completely.

“If the Origins Returning baneful aura were to be given to others, they might not be able to refine it completely,” said Liu Qiyue with a smile.

“Yes.” Meng Chuan shook his head gently. “Unfortunately, even after refining the Origins Returning baneful aura completely, I still feel flustered when faced with the upcoming final battle.”

Liu Qiyue nodded. “In the face of war, what we can do is limited. Ah Chuan, at least you can save people across the world.”

“There are so many greater demon monarchs attacking the various parts of the world. No matter how fast I am, how many places can I save?” said Meng Chuan softly. “A million demon monarchs are about to attack; I’m but just one person. What can I do?”

“You aren’t alone. There are still Regis Godfiends and Creation Supremacies in the world,” said Liu Qiyue. “I can’t see the path ahead. I can only kill my way through,” said Meng Chuan.

Liu Qiyue looked at her husband. “I’ll always be by your side.”

Meng Chuan couldn’t help but smile as he looked at his wife. He reached out and hugged her.

Liu Qiyue leaned into Meng Chuan’s embrace. She said softly, “I wonder if we will be able to see the day the human race wins the war.”

“I also wish to see that day,” Meng Chuan said softly.

The couple did not sleep that night and just chatted. They talked about the world, Jiang State Capital, their parents, their children...

Dawn.

Meng Chuan, who had finished practicing his saber art, was having breakfast with his wife. “Chuan’er.” Meng Dajiang arrived at Lake Heart Pavilion. “Dad.” Meng Chuan and Liu Qiyue stood up.

Liu Qiyue asked, “Dad, do you want breakfast? I’ll get you a bowl.”

“I’ve already eaten.” Meng Dajiang chuckled and sat down. He seemed somewhat hesitant.

Meng Chuan smiled. “Dad, what do you have to say?”

Meng Dajiang looked at his son and whispered, “Chuan’er, I also need external materials for my cultivation. However, I don’t have much credit and can’t afford it. Therefore, I wish to borrow some credit from you.”

“You should have said so earlier. It’s such a trivial matter.” Meng Chuan and his wife, Liu Qiyue, exchanged looks. They were caught between laughter and tears.

His underground reconnaissance had to be kept a secret. Therefore, the vast majority of the public didn’t know how fast Meng Chuan earned credits. However, just providing reinforcements across the entire Great Zhou Dynasty allowed him to accumulate credit quickly; his speed at accumulating credit was comparable to a Regis Godfiend. “I want 1,030,000 credits,” said Meng Dajiang. He felt ashamed. Parents typically sacrificed everything for their children and gave them the best. He had never asked for Meng Chuan’s help all these years! However, he had no choice now. He couldn’t obtain more than a million credits elsewhere.

“Is that all? Dad, when your son is out fighting, I might kill a few demon monarchs in a stroke of good luck. The spoils of war are worth more than a million credits,” said Meng Chuan. In fact, he had been carrying out underground reconnaissance every day. He killed about 100 demon monarchs a day. The demon monarch corpses and his spoils of war earned him more than a million credits a day.

“I’ll write a letter to Archean Mountain and transfer five million credits to your name,” said Meng Chuan. “Use it for whatever you want.”

“Five million credits is too much,” said Meng Dajiang immediately. He was quite stressed about making such a request of his son for the first time. How could he accept five million credits?

“It’s not much, not much at all,” said Meng Chuan with a smile. With a flip of his hand, ink and paper appeared. He immediately began writing. The words contained his Quintessential Essence signature.

“Little Gray, quickly send this to Archean Mountain,” shouted Meng Chuan.

Swoosh.

The avian demon monarch, Aunt Hui, appeared and respectfully received the letter. “Yes, Master.” Immediately, she transformed into a gray bird and flew towards Archean Mountain.

Meng Dajiang didn’t oppose his son’s decision. He really did need the credit.

Meng Chuan stood up. “Dad, I’m going out. I have plenty of matters to attend to.”

Liu Qiyue also stood up. “I need to head over to Earth Net headquarters too.”

“You guys deal with your business.” Meng Dajiang knew that his son and daughter-in-law had a lot of things to deal with. Liu Qiyue was very busy with managing 20 million people and the migrations.

After leaving Lake Heart Pavilion, Meng Dajiang returned to his courtyard.

A million demon monarchs wreaking havoc in the world? Is the situation getting worse? Meng Dajiang sat in his yard and began practicing his saber calmly. I, Meng Dajiang, wished to create a miracle in the Body Tempering Godfiend lineage and become the number one Body Tempering Godfiend. I wanted to impress the Bai family so that I would have a chance of being reunited with Nianyun. Now, I’m 80 years old, but I’m still in the Indestructible realm. It’s impossible for the Bai family to look at me in a different light.

But I’m also a Godfiend. I can’t hide behind my son and daughter-in-law forever during this war. Can I? After cultivating for so many years and perusing the many saber art manuals my son got for me, I’ve finally achieved Saber Intent. There’s finally hope for me to become a Great Solar Body Tempering Godfiend.

Let’s give it a try.

Meng Dajiang had wanted to become stronger for many years. When he was young, he had wanted to make history in the Body Tempering Godfiend lineage and become the first Body Tempering Marquis Godfiend. Now, he had completely given up. Even his son couldn’t help him reunite with his wife, Bai Nianyun. All he could do was keep his hope close to his heart.

He still had the heart to fight demon monarchs. He didn’t want to hide behind others.

Meng Chuan spent 12 hours underground every day. How could he have noticed his father’s psychological changes when he was so exhausted?

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan continued his underground reconnaissance.

At a depth of 95 kilometers underground, Meng Chuan maintained his Divine Eye of Lightning and traveled at high speeds. He did his best to probe the area. He would seek out fourth Firmament demon monarchs several times a day, but it was mostly to no avail. However, he still persevered. Only if he persevered would he have hope of finding more fourth Firmament demon monarchs.

Huh? As Meng Chuan flew, he suddenly revealed a look of delight. Found it!

At a depth of 96 kilometers underground, there was a demon monarch lair. It was within Meng Chuan’s electromagnetic domain.

Three days after refining Origins Returning baneful aura completely, I discovered a fourth Firmament demon monarch. This is the fourth greater demon monarch I discovered underground in the past year. Meng Chuan was in an excellent mood. Lightning instantly erupted from his electromagnetic domain.

Meanwhile...

In the demon monarch lair, a fourth Firmament bear demon monarch was sleeping soundly. When electromagnetic waves swept over, his eyes suddenly opened. His huge, bright eyes were filled with shock and anger.

“A Godfiend. Hurry up and flee!” roared the bear demon monarch via voice transmission. His body shot up with a boom. He easily shattered all obstacles above him. To him, even the hard rocks were as fragile as tofu.

Crackle!

The electromagnetic domain generated countless lightning bolts. The lightning bolts flashed, and instantly, most of the mortal demons and demon monarchs in the cave abode were killed. Only three third Firmament demon monarchs survived, but their flesh and skin were burned black. They were severely injured.

Whoosh.

In the distorted void, a dark-cyan gas suddenly surged over.

“Oh?” The bear demon monarch-who was frantically fleeing-flew at high speeds with his two sledgehammers. He held them in his hands and was ready to fight back at any moment. However, he suddenly discovered a dark-cyan gas traveling through the distorted void.

Within the distorted void, the rocks weren’t obstacles to the dark-cyan gas. It was as though it had teleported directly in front of the bear demon monarch. The rock remained intact, but the dark-cyan gas appeared right in front of him.

“What’s that?” The bear demon monarch did not have a Darkstar domain, so his senses were not sharp enough. However, he still carefully struck out with his sledgehammer that was filled with an earthen-yellow demonic power.

Clang!

The sledgehammer reached the dark-cyan gas. However, the dark-cyan gas was really just gas. When it touched the sledgehammer, it naturally dispersed and enveloped the bear demon monarch. The bear demon monarch only felt an unimaginable coldness instantly spread from his chest to his entire body! Following that, he lost consciousness. The bear demon monarch’s body, including the sledgehammers, was frozen by the terrifying dark-cyan gas completely. A layer of frost covered them.

Whoosh.

Silently, the bear demon monarch’s body disintegrated into tiny particles that scattered through the underground cave abode. The two frozen sledgehammers in his hands also shattered into dozens of fragments. His clothes, storage bag, and other items shattered into pieces. Only a small number of objects remained.

Meng Chuan walked over from the other end of the distorted void. When he saw the bear demon monarch disintegrate into nothingness and an Earth-grade divine armament crack from the cold, he couldn’t help but sigh in astonishment.

My senses tell me that its frozen body has shattered into pieces completely. Even its fur and blood had been frozen and shattered. It was directly reduced to nothingness. There’s no need to use it unless necessary. Demon Slayer didn’t even manage to absorb its blood. Even 99% of my spoils of war were destroyed.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 275 - Imperial Lord
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Meng Chuan’s heart ached when he saw 99% of the bear demon monarch’s items destroyed by the baneful aura. There was almost nothing left.

Although these two sledgehammers have been shattered into dozens of pieces, they can still be melted in the furnace. Archean Mountain usually melts demon monarch weapons for their raw materials, even if they are shattered. Meng Chuan waved his hand and stored the fragments of the sledgehammers away. He then looked at the other items. The storage bag had shattered into nothingness. Even the items in the storage bag had been destroyed; only a small portion remained.

Some red and purple residue were left behind, their composition unknown.

Oh? There’s a complete one here. Among the remnants, Meng Chuan discovered the only complete item. With a wave of his hand, the item flew out and landed on his palm. It was a palm-sized bear statue; it was pitch-black, and it stood there quietly. Meng Chuan was in a daze when he saw it.

11

He vaguely saw a towering bear that was hundreds of thousands of feet tall; it looked like the ruler of the world. It calmly walked on the ground. Every step it took caused the earth to tremble and mountains to quake. It had annihilative might.

What’s this? Meng Chuan was puzzled. It must be extraordinary if it can survive my baneful aura. I’ll ask Master when I head back to Archean Mountain.

Meng Chuan returned to the demon monarch lair. Under his electromagnetic domain, the three heavily injured third firmament demon monarchs naturally couldn’t escape. They were all killed by Meng Chuan’s Darkstar Quintessential Essence from afar. The electromagnetic domain naturally produces lightning. Although it’s weaker and unable to kill more than half of the ordinary third Firmament demon monarchs, who do miscellaneous chores, it won’t destroy the spoils of war at the very least. After putting away the demon monarch corpses and spoils of war, Meng Chuan’s heart ached when he thought of the destruction of 99% of the bear demon monarch’s items.

That evening

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan rushed back to Archean Mountain and handed over the demon monarch corpses and spoils of war that he had obtained over the past few days. Archean Mountain Lord was in charge of dealing with such trivial matters.

While they were doing this, Qin Wu was discussing with an illusory Luo Tang in a pavilion in Grotto-Heaven Pavilion.

“Such arrangements aren’t bad.” The illusory Luo Tang looked at the dossier. “But it can still be adjusted.”

Qin Wu suddenly raised his head and looked into the distance.

“What’s wrong?” asked the illusory Luo Tang.

“Meng Chuan is here,” said Qin Wu. “He’s likely here to deliver demon monarch corpses and his spoils of war.” Luo Tang frowned slightly. “Qin Wu, have you thought it through? How are you going to use Meng Chuan during the final battle?”

Qin Wu frowned. “I’m also in a dilemma.”

The illusory Luo Tang said, “In terms of speed, there’s nothing to say. He’s faster than me. However, if he isn’t strong enough, sending him on rescue missions will be sending him to his death. He won’t be rescuing anyone if he has lacking strength.”

Qin Wu stood up. “Follow me.”

“Where to?” The illusory Luo Tang was puzzled.

“We need to test his strength to figure out exactly how strong this disciple of mine is. Only then can I give him a suitable mission during the final battle,” said Qin Wu.

Inside an Archean Mountain grotto-heaven.

Batches of demon monarch corpses and spoils of war flooded out of Meng Chuan’s pocket grotto-heaven. Archean Mountain watched as more and more demon monarch corpses piled up. He couldn’t help but praise Meng Chuan. “Junior brother Meng, I find it such a joy to see you throw out so many demon monarch corpses every time you come back. In the past year, other Archean Mountain Godfiends haven’t killed as many demon monarchs as you.”

“In the past half a month, I’ve killed 1,235 ordinary demon monarchs.” Meng Chuan threw out the last demon monarch corpse before he smiled and said, “The demon monarchs are cunning. It’s harder to kill them above ground. Regardless of how cunning they are, they will be discovered by me when I carry out underground reconnaissance unless they are far from land, Sometimes, stupid methods are the best solutions.”

“This stupid method... can only be employed by you and King White Treasure at the moment.” Qin Wu’s voice sounded.

Meng Chuan and Archean Mountain Lord turned their heads and bowed respectfully.

At that moment, Qin Wu and the illusory Luo Tang walked over.

“Well done.” Qin Wu looked at the pile of demon monarch corpses. “However, the demon monarchs are very cunning. King White Treasure has been killing demon monarchs in Black Sand Dynasty for ten years, causing many of them to flee to the Great Zhou Dynasty and the Great Yue Dynasty. Meng Chuan, if you continue like this... the demon monarchs will probably escape one after another. In the future, there might be fewer to kill.”

“The world is only so big. Where can they hide? At most, I’ll carry out underground reconnaissance throughout the entire world,” said Meng Chuan.

Qin Wu nodded with a smile. “Good.”

“Mountain Lord.” Meng Chuan looked at Archean Mountain Lord and said, “I haven’t handed over my spoils of war. In the past half-month, I killed a fourth Firmament demon monarch.”

“Fourth Firmament demon monarch?” Archean Mountain Lord’s eyes lit up. “Where are its remains?” He knew that Demon Slayer could devour blood, but some remnants of a fourth Firmament demon monarch corpse would typically be left behind.

“I used my baneful aura, and it froze the demon monarch’s corpse before shattering into nothingness,” said Meng Chuan helplessly. “Nothing was left behind! Even its storage bag has completely disintegrated. There are still some weapons and items left.”

With that said, he waved his hand. A large number of the two sledgehammers’ fragments appeared beside them. There were also some remnant materials. Since the baneful aura could not destroy them, the materials definitely had extraordinary origins.

“Even these two sledgehammers have shattered to pieces?” Qin Wu walked over and carefully observed the two sledgehammers’ fragments. He could not help but be astonished. “After refining Origins Returning baneful aura, your baneful aura is indeed impressive.”

Luo Tang nodded in praise. “What a potent baneful aura.”

“After that bear demon monarch died, the only item left intact was this.” Meng Chuan flipped his hand and took out the bear statue.

Qin Wu and Luo Tang’s eyes lit up.

“It’s a rare treasure. It’s worth 30 million credits,” said Qin Wu.

“Master, what’s this?” Meng Chuan was puzzled.

“A demon heritage,” explained Qin Wu. “It’s a heritage left behind by a bear demon that has reached the Imperial Lord realm.”

“Imperial Lord? Above the demon sage realm?” Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up. Of course he knew about Imperial Lords. For example, the most recent human Imperial Lord was Imperial Lord Blacksand. He had nearly unified the world under his banner.

“The Demon Realm is larger than the human world. They have way more experts than us,” said Qin Wu. “Therefore, there are many Imperial Lords. In this era, the demons have three Imperial Lords. In the demons’ long history, more than 1000 Imperial Lords have been born. Therefore, there are quite a number of heritages. This statue only contains one move of an Imperial Lord. It’s something the Imperial Lords bestow to their subordinates.”Meng Chuan nodded.

“This move is more suitable for demons. It’s very helpful for demons’ body cultivation,” said Qin Wu. “Human bodies are completely different from demon bodies. It’s much less useful to us, but it’s still left behind by an Imperial Lord. Even if it’s used as a reference, exchanging it for 30 million credits is still worth it.”

“A bear demon Imperial Lord?” Meng Chuan realized that the towering, terrifying bear demon he saw was an Imperial Lord.

“There are too few human Imperial Lords.” Qin Wu shook his head. “The most recent human Imperial Lord was Imperial Lord Black Sand. Back then, there was an impressive grandmaster named Grandsire Yin Yang. Although Grandsire Yin Yang was a Creation Supremacy, his techniques had already reached the standards of an Imperial Lord. The Two World Divine Body technique he created is one of the 12 transcendent-grade Godfiend Bodies. In terms of contribution to the human race, Grandsire Yin Yang’s contribution is even higher than that of Imperial Lord Black Sand.

“It was because of the Black Sand Grotto-Heaven’s internal conflicts that Grandsire Yin Yang plotted against Imperial Lord Black Sand, which led to Imperial Lord Black Sand’s eventual demise,” said Qin Wu wistfully. “If they were completely united, they would probably have united the world in that era.”

Meng Chuan nodded.

There were only 12 transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies in the human Godfiend cultivation system. Dragon Divine Body and Phoenix Divine Body were both divine bodies that required specific bloodlines. Strictly speaking, humans had only created ten transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies. Every pioneer was outstanding. Their talent was ranked at the top in human history.

“If an Imperial Lord is born in our era, we can end the war completely.” Luo Tang shook her head. “However, it’s just too difficult. Humanity typically produces one Imperial Lord once every 100,000 years. This is only the average time it takes for an Imperial Lord to rise. Sometimes, two or three dazzling figures exist together in the same era. Sometimes, there will be no Imperial Lord for hundreds of thousands of years.”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 276 - Verification
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“As for the demons, they have several Imperial Lords every era. Their foundations are much weaker,” said Luo Tang. “Luckily, we have the geographical advantage. The top demon experts are unable to enter the human world at all. The demons’ powerful treasures... Without the Demon Realm’s powers to rely on, their effects are drastically reduced in the human world. They might even be useless. The protective stone talisman your master gave you can only be used in the human world,” said Luo Tang. “It’s useless once you leave the human world.”

Meng Chuan understood. These single-use treasures didn’t contain their own strength, so they naturally had to have a source of power. After leaving the original world, most of these treasures lost their power sources.

“There are many Imperial Lords in the demons’ history. For this war, they have probably bestowed quite the number of treasures to fourth Firmament demon monarchs.” Luo Tang shook her head gently. “I wonder when we will produce an Imperial Lord.”

Imperial Lord? Meng Chuan sighed inwardly.

The Heart Intent Saber Art—which he learned —came from Senior Guo Ke. Although he was a Regis Godfiend, his strongest saber movewhich he had created when he was old-had also reached the Imperial Lord level. With his saber, he was invincible in his era. However, Guo Ke was much weaker than Grandsire Yin Yang. Guo Ke only had one saber move that had reached the Imperial Lord level! Grandsire Yin Yang had created a complete transcendent-grade Godfiend body formula and several ultimate techniques that formed a whole system. In the past, Black Sand Grotto-Heaven suppressed Two World Island, but all thanks to Grandsire Yin Yang, it remained standing.

“The birth of an Imperial Lord, the appearance of an expert with an eighth-level Essence Soul, or something else...” said Qin Wu. “As long as one appears, we will win the war.”

“But each is very difficult to achieve,” said the illusory Luo Tang.

Qin Wu put away the bear demon statue and said, “Meng Chuan, the final battle will begin any moment now. Luo Tang and I are discussing how you will be deployed.”

Luo Tang explained, “Now, it’s estimated that 700 fourth Firmament demon monarchs will attack together. There are only so many large cities, so it’s impossible for them to act alone. The greatest possibility... is that they will work together in teams. Among the 700 fourth Firmament demon monarchs, there are many peak fourth Firmament demon monarchs. They will choose the most suitable partners to cooperate with them. Then, they will match the treasures that the demon Imperial Lords’ bestowed on them.

“Every fourth Firmament demon monarch team will probably have the strength of an ordinary fifth Firmament demon monarch,” said the illusory Luo Tang, “It’s even possible for a newly-advanced fifth Firmament demon monarch to be hidden amongst them.”

Qin Wu nodded. “If you aren’t strong enough, you will die by the hands of demons if we deploy you as a reinforcement... Thus, Luo Tang and I want to verify your strength before you can be deployed.”

“Alright.” Meng Chuan nodded. He also wanted to test his full strength. Only with a clear understanding of his strength could they decide on how they would deploy him.

“You can fight Archean Mountain Lord,” said Luo Tang

The white-haired Archean Mountain Lord smiled at Meng Chuan. “Junior Brother Meng, you have to be careful.”

“Fight Mountain Lord?” Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up. Archean Mountain Lord was the nominal leader of Archean Mountain. Furthermore, he was more than 400 years old. After living for so long, Archean Mountain Lord’s strength was definitely extraordinary among Regis Godfiends.

“Both of you don’t need to think too much,” instructed Qin Wu. “Use all your strength. With me around, nothing will happen.”

“Yes.” Archean Mountain Lord was deep in thought. He had previously thought of holding back. After all, once a killer move was used, it could kill.

Within this grotto-heaven, Meng Chuan and Archean Mountain Lord looked at each other. Qin Wu and the illusory Luo Tang watched from afar.

“Mountain Lord, try this baneful aura of mine,” said Meng Chuan. A dark-cyan gas emanated from his body. After all, this was a test of strength, not a life-and-death battle. Meng Chuan first used his baneful aura, the ability he was most unsure of. He wanted to let his opponent feel the strength of his baneful aura fully.

Chi! Chi! Chi!

The dark-cyan gaseous baneful aura quickly spread out. The surrounding Heaven and Earth tried to suppress it, but it couldn’t be held back. Frost was left in its wake.

“This baneful aura is truly powerful.” Luo Tang, who was watching by the side, praised. “Even Archean Mountain Lord’s Five Directions World domain can’t suppress it.”

Chi! Chi! Chi!

Archean Mountain Lord was forced to protect himself from the dark-cyan baneful aura once it was within 30 feet of him. He used his black Quintessential Essence and Seamless domain to stop the dark-cyan baneful aura from advancing any further.

“Junior Brother Meng, your baneful aura is indeed impressive. Although I can block it, the surrounding area has been frozen. I only have 50 percent of my normal speed,” said Archean Mountain Lord. “However, I typically don’t need to move when I fight.”

As soon as he finished speaking, a towering illusory black giant appeared. Black light swirled around the illusory giant’s 1000-feet-tall body. Archean Mountain Lord levitated inside the illusory giant’s body.

Meng Chuan’s dark-cyan baneful aura attacked the giant, but it could only affect the giant’s speed. Archean Combat Body? Meng Chuan realized what the illusory giant was.

Among the 12 transcendent-grade Godfiend bodies, the Thirteen Swordbane Fiend Body had the greater long-range offensive power. However, it was a glass cannon. The Samsara Divine Body was the most well-rounded in close combat. The Archean Divine Body was the most well-rounded in long-range attacks.

The two were very similar. This was because both required one to cultivate the five elements. One needed to combine five different elemental Intents. The Samsara Divine Body was slightly more difficult to cultivate because it used the five elements to cultivate one’s physical body. The Archean Divine Body used the five elements to cultivate an illusory combat body. This illusory body didn’t have the limitations of a physical body, so it was naturally very powerful. However, the body was relatively weak. Once the illusory body was destroyed, one wouldn’t be far from death.

If one’s illusory combat body couldn’t withstand an attack, then their Quintessential Essence also wouldn’t withstand the attack either.

Meng Chuan was looking forward to facing an Archean Combat Body.

“Junior Brother Meng, take this.” Archean Mountain Lord waved his palm.

Immediately, the black illusory giant struck out with its palm. When it first struck out, the palm was only about 100 feet wide. As the palm approached Meng Chuan, the giant’s arm extended, and its palm rapidly expanded. The 2,000-foot-long arm and 1000-foot-wide palm approached Meng Chuan.

Meng Chuan looked up. He felt the surrounding void rapidly pressing down on him, but he didn’t dodge the palm. He just raised his head and allowed the huge palm to slam down heavily.Clang!

The ground trembled as a gigantic palm-shaped crater formed.

“What?” Archean Mountain Lord raised his palm and discovered Meng Chuan flying out of the crater as his body glowed. The void around Meng Chuan collapsed and distorted.

Meng Chuan wasn’t injured at all. He raised his head and smiled. “Mountain Lord, this palm strike of yours is quite powerful. It made my ears buzz. However, its power was scattered all over my body. It hasn’t even broken my skin.”

Qin Wu and Luo Tang’s eyes lit up as they watched from afar.

“What’s going on? That palm is definitely a peak Regis Godfiend attack,” said Luo Tang immediately. “Qin Wu, take a careful look. Why is his body so powerful? Is he that powerful at the Undying realm?”

Qin Wu’s true body was present; thus, he could see the secrets of Meng Chuan’s body in a single glance. “Meng Chuan’s body is as tough as a fifth Firmament demon monarch’s. Furthermore, he used a divine power to withstand that palm strike. It’s that glow that’s emitting from his body. This divine power allowed his body’s defense to increase once again. It’s as though his entire body is covered in a layer of armor! The strike was greatly weakened by the armor. When the remaining force reached Meng Chuan’s body, it caused his body to tremble and bleed internally. However, he recovered instantly.”

“An Undying realm expert can instantly recover even if their body is pulverized.” Luo Tang sighed in amazement. “I’ve read the introduction of this cultivation system and know that an Undying Body has extremely tenacious vitality. However, I never expected it to be this tough. This is the first time I’ve seen an Undying realm expert. No wonder Ancestral Master Archean Eon placed this cultivation system which peaks at the Blood Droplet realm in the human world-in Archean Eon Grotto-Heaven.” “Meng Chuan, use your full strength,” shouted Qin Wu, “Don’t just take a beating.” “Yes,” replied Meng Chuan immediately.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 277 - Meng Chuan vs Archean Mountain Lord
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

“Junior Brother, feel free to attack.” Archean Mountain Lord stood in midair. He had been a Regis Godfiend for nearly 300 years, and he cultivated the Archean Divine Body. His mastery over his techniques was immense. Now that he was fighting against someone weaker-akin to a bully-it was naturally easier for him to deal with a Marquis Godfiend. He could tell that his junior brother’s body was extraordinary, but his attacking prowess was limited.

Meng Chuan stood there. Within 1,000 feet, the void around him collapsed and distorted. It was difficult for the void to withstand the combined power of his Undying Body’s countless particles.

“Senior Brother, be careful.” Meng Chuan instantly drew his saber and moved.

It was as though he had teleported as traveled through the void. With a single step, he arrived beside the 1,000-foot-tall illusory giant. The saber beam instantly pierced toward the illusory giant’s chest. This was because Archean Mountain Lord was at the giant’s chest.

Dragon Roar Stance! This was the first time Meng Chuan had used his full strength after reaching the Undying realm. This move contained his naturally-possessed Lightning Devastator Fiend Body speed and his Undying Body’s strength. The Dragon Roar Stance was Meng Chuan’s best penetrating attack.

Pfft.

Layers of black light surrounded the illusory giant’s chest as it caved in, doing their best to withstand the attack.

This saber attack is at the level of a Regis Godfiend. Archean Mountain Lord was astonished. If I were careless and was forced out of my defensive combat body by a Marquis-level junior brother, that would be a joke. He instantly became nervous.

When an Archean Divine Body Godfiend reached a certain cultivation realm, they would cultivate two combat bodies. One was for killing enemies, while the other was for protecting themselves.

“Junior Brother, your saber techniques aren’t bad.” Archean Mountain Lord used a finger technique. The illusory giant’s fingers began moving. The five huge fingers danced as spacetime distorted. It was difficult to see the fingers with the naked eye. The distorted spacetime made Meng Chuan feel extremely uncomfortable when moving. He clearly wanted to advance, but spacetime kept distorting, warping his path.

Black Metal Sutra-Archean Seal Art. Meng Chuan understood what technique Archean Mountain Lord was using. Every Archean Divine Body Godfiend would cultivate it. Despite knowing this, Meng Chuan still felt aggrieved and uncomfortable.

If I want to escape, I have to flee in one direction. However, if I want to storm my way over, I have to break through the obstruction of those two palms. Those two palms are now 1,000 feet wide. They are like two mountains in front of me.

Meng Chuan had a headache. However, he still used Swallow Stance. His figure was ghost-like.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

Fast and unpredictable, Meng Chuan instantly circled the illusory giant as he searched for an opportunity to get closer to Archean Mountain Lord.

“Junior Brother, your movement technique sure is fast.” Archean Mountain Lord smiled as the giant’s arm suddenly extended. A palm instantly appeared in front of Meng Chuan. The giant fingers danced as spacetime distorted. Meng Chuan wanted to dodge the palm, but he failed. His vision blurred as a gigantic finger appeared in front of him.

Not good.

The finger was 500 feet long. The five elements around the finger were chaotic as spacetime distorted. The finger struck Meng Chuan in an exquisite, intricate manner.

Pfft.

Meng Chuan’s body trembled as blood sprayed out from his pores. However, the sprayed blood flew back into his body. Meng Chuan was sent flying hundreds of feet away. With a flash, he arrived behind the illusory giant.

“Junior Brother, your body is in no way inferior to a fifth Firmament demon monarch,” said Archean Mountain Lord with a smile. The illusory giant’s back was clearly facing Meng Chuan, but the head twisted 180°. His palms naturally welcomed Meng Chuan.

Meng Chuan didn’t say a word.

The difference in technique realm is too great. This senior brother of mine has long reached the Dharma Domain realm. His moves are more exquisite than mine. Although my Undying Body and saber arts can influence the void, he can control the Five Elements and affect spacetime.

Meng Chuan sensed that the closer he got to Archean Mountain Lord, the more spacetime distorted. It was very difficult for him to unleash his strength fully. If I don’t use all my strength, I won’t be able to threaten Senior Brother at all.

Clang! Clang! Clang! Suddenly, a bell rang.

A Soul-Buster Bell flew out. Invisible to the naked eye, the bell struck the other party.

Baneful aura domain! Meng Chuan no longer released only a single wisp of baneful aura. Instead, he unleashed his full strength. A majestic dark-cyan baneful aura erupted from Meng Chuan and spread in all directions, enveloping a 1000-foot-wide area.

“Oh?” The pair of huge palms that were about to strike Meng Chuan hadn’t even touched him. Just 1,000 feet away, they were attacked by a large amount of baneful aura. The terrifying frost baneful aura assaulted the giant from every direction. The volume of baneful aura was much greater than before. The terrifying chill made Archean Mountain Lord’s expression change slightly. He could feel his Quintessential Essence—that circulated around his combat body-slowing down due to the chill.

Even my Quintessential Essence has slowed down under this baneful aura domain? Archean Mountain Lord couldn’t believe it. Also, his Essence Soul mystic technique... I’ve cultivated for 400 years, but his Essence Soul is of similar strength to mine? Archean Mountain Lord also had a Soul-Buster in his sea of consciousness. He also had a fourth-level Essence Soul. He resisted Meng Chuan’s Soul-Buster Bell, but it was clear that he didn’t hold an advantage when it came to Essence Souls.

He’s slowed down! Meng Chuan was delighted when he saw the illusory giant’s palms slow down. He had unparalleled speed, so he naturally had a larger advantage now that his opponent had slowed down. This was also the reason why Meng Chuan chose to follow the frost baneful aura path when he was completing his Nine Refinements. It was mainly to complement his speed.

Whoosh.

Once Archean Mountain Lord’s palm attacks slowed down, no matter how exquisite they were, their effectiveness against Meng Chuan would be greatly reduced. Meng Chuanwhose body was glowing-rushed into the area of distorted spacetime and headed toward the illusory giant’s chest. Without any hesitation, he executed saber move after saber move. He executed the Heart Saber Stance every time!

Yin and Yang changed.

A strange force penetrated the illusory giant’s body and was weakened to 20 to 30 percent of its original might. It continued charging towards Archean Mountain Lord’s real body.

When Meng Chuan had previously executed Dragon Roar Stance-his most penetrating move-he hadn’t even managed to break through Archean Mountain Lord’s combat body. After that, he knew the only move that could threaten Archean Mountain Lord was Heart Saber Stance.

“Oh?” Through his Seamless domain, Archean Mountain Lord could clearly sense that the strange force only had 20 to 30 perfect of its original strength left. He smiled slightly. Relying on only his Seamless domain, the strange force weakened as it crossed multiple layers of Quintessential Essence. The strange force dissipated before it even reached his body.

Even that doesn’t work? A sharp glint flashed in Meng Chuan’s eyes. He held his saber with both hands and cleaved down.

Break!The saber slashed at the illusory giant.

Boom!

The entire grotto-heaven suddenly trembled as a terrifying bolt of lightning shot out from Meng Chuan’s hands. It followed Demon Slayer and struck the illusory giant’s chest. The huge bolt of lightning was blinding, startling Qin Wu and Luo Tang. The black light around the illusory giant’s chest tried to block the lightning, but it couldn’t withstand such a terrifying strike due to Archean Mountain Lord’s decreased Quintessential Essence circulation speed—which was a result of Meng Chuan’s frost baneful aura domain.

Bang!

The layers of black light surrounding the giant’s chest were blasted apart. The lightning bolt flew towards the shocked Archean Mountain Lord.

Heaven’s Wrath-one of Meng Chuan’s three divine powers!

Among his three divine powers, this was Meng Chuan’s strongest killer move after reaching the Undying realm. He could release up to 30 percent of the lightning in his body at once. Every particle in his body contained lightning, causing Meng Chuan to have an immense amount of lightning inside his body. Although he had an Essence Soul Thought in each particle space-giving him great control over his particle spaces-his body could only withstand unleashing 30 percent of the lightning in his body.

Meng Chuan could only cast Heaven’s Wrath —his ultimate move—three times in a row.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 278 - The Creation-Realm Corpse
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

This lightning! Archean Mountain Lord didn’t dare to be negligent. The lightning made him feel the threat of death.

“Rise.” With a thought, a ten-foot-tall black figure surrounded Archean Mountain Lord’s body. It was only slightly bigger than Archean Mountain Lord. Black light surrounded it; its long hair draped over its shoulders. Its expressionless appearance was simple and unadorned. However, its weight far exceeded the 1,000-foot-tall illusory giant. It was a protective combat body that was only used for defense. Its defensive capabilities were several times greater than that of the illusory giant.

Boom! Boom! The lightning bolt traveled toward Archean Mountain Lord. Meng Chuan charged through the hole in the illusory giant’s chest. He held his saber and attacked Archean Mountain Lord’s true body.

The lightning broke through the Seamless domain’s Quintessential Essence layers and struck the ten-foot-tall black figure. The black light around the black figure swirled, exuding an incomparably menacing aura.

Chi! Chi! Chi!

Meng Chuan’s baneful aura domain naturally followed as he rushed toward Archean Mountain Lord.

As the baneful aura domain froze the black figure, Meng Chuan slashed again! Open! He cast Heaven’s Wrath again.

The terrifying lightning bolt struck the black figure before Meng Chuan’s dazzling saber beams followed.

Tiger Roar Stance. Meng Chuan cleaved down.

This junior brother of mine is really ruthless. Archean Mountain Lord grinned slightly. He formed a seal with his fingers as the black figure resisted the baneful aura domain, Heaven’s Wrath, and Meng Chuan’s numerous saber beams. None of them destroyed the black figure.

Suppress! The illusory giant shrunk to 100 feet before throwing a punch at Meng Chuan. The illusory giant threw punch after punch at Meng Chuan. In the blink of an eye, the illusory had punched dozens of times. These punches caused the surrounding void to form a void wave—they were like ocean waves.

Boom!

The void distorted with a rumble as it surged in all directions like waves. The waves came from all directions. No matter how brilliant Meng Chuan’s movement technique was, he couldn’t dodge them all.

Boom!

As Meng Chuan sank into the waves, the void waves made his body vibrate, causing his organs to suffer damage. However, these minor injuries instantly vanished, thanks to his Undying Body and astonishing vitality.

Whoosh.

Meng Chuan was unable to resist the attack. He landed on the ground only after he was swept 1.5 kilometers away by the void waves.

Archean Mountain Lord cupped his hands and smiled. “Junior Brother, your lightning saber art is impressive. I can only force you into a retreat, but I can’t injure you at all.” “Senior Brother, your moves and technique realm are indeed far above mine.” Meng Chuan was sincerely convinced of Archean Mountain Lord’s strength. He had used his most powerful technique, but it had only reached his senior brother’s 10-foot-tall protective combat body. He was unable to do anything to the protective combat body and was eventually forced back by his senior brother.

In the distance, Qin Wu and Luo Tang smiled when they saw this.

“He’s much stronger than I expected,” said Luo Tang with a smile. “With his baneful aura domain, he has the strength of a peak Regis Godfiend. His escaping abilities are even stronger. He has an Undying Body, and his baneful aura domain can freeze his surroundings. His speed is unparalleled. Few Regis Godfiends can kill him.”

Qin Wu nodded. “His life-preservation abilities are considered top-notch among Regis Godfiends. Although there are a few rather powerful Archean Mountain Regis Godfiends, only King True Martial can kill Meng Chuan. The other Regis Godfiends, including King White Elephant and King Calm Sea, can’t kill him.”

Among Archean Mountain’s current Regis Godfiends, King True Martial was the strongest! The Regis Godfiends that had entered Archean Eon Grotto-Heaven and were still alive were King True Martial and King Calm Sea. King True Martial was old, but he had unfathomable strength.

“The stronger demons in the human world are mostly fourth Firmament demon monarchs,” said Luo Tang with a smile, “Even if they make a breakthrough, they are only newly-advanced fifth Firmament demon monarchs. They aren’t a threat to Meng Chuan. According to our intelligence, other than Demon Sage Nine Abyss, no demon can threaten Meng Chuan in the human world. As for Demon Sage Nine Abyss... it’s the only demon sage to enter the human world. It won’t risk its life easily.”

“Yes.” Qin Wu nodded with a smile. “During the final battle, Meng Chuan can play a greater role. However, I still have to think of a way to make up for his shortcomings.” “What do you mean?” asked Luo Tang.

After the exchange of blows between Meng Chuan and Archean Mountain Lord, they became even more impressed with each other.

Archean Mountain Lord was shocked by the astonishing potential of his junior brother. Meng Chuan wasn’t far from reaching his current strength. Meng Chuan also realized that there was still a difference in strength between him and his senior brother.

“Master, Supremacy.” Meng Chuan walked over and bowed to Qin Wu and Luo Tang. Archean Mountain Lord also bowed.

Qin Wu and Luo Tang smiled.

“We tested your strength to determine how you will be deployed during the final battle,” said Qin Wu with a smile. “From the looks of it, you barely have the strength of a peak Regis Godfiend with your baneful aura domain aiding you. Although your defensive and escaping abilities are very good, your offensive abilities are still a little weak.”

“Yes,” admitted Meng Chuan. “Most of my strength comes from my baneful aura domain.”

With his baneful aura domain aiding him, he could barely be considered a peak Regis Godfiend. He was lacking in killing moves. His divine power-Heaven’s Wrath-wasn’t bad, but he could only use it three times consecutively.

“You don’t have to be disheartened,” said Qin Wu, “It’s already not bad to have such strength after cultivating for only a few decades.”

“Junior Brother’s talent is impressive. In the future, when he becomes a Regis Godfiend, he will definitely be one of the strongest,” praised Archean Mountain Lord. “Compared to Junior Brother, I feel like I’m much more mediocre.”

Though the position of nominal sect leader seemed to be quite distinguished, this position was typically given to Regis Godfiends with lacking cultivation potential. For example, King Calm Sea was still young, but his strength was above that of Archean Mountain Lord. He had the greatest chance of becoming a Creation Supremacy. Archean Mountain didn’t want him to waste his time dealing with many trivial matters. King True Martial and the other talented Regis Godfiends didn’t have to handle any trivial matters either.

“Hahaha, alright. Let’s go out.” Qin Wu laughed.

The illusory Luo Tang dissipated as Archean Mountain Lord left to do his work.

“I’ll take my leave as well.” Meng Chuan bowed.

“Don’t be in a rush to leave. I still have something to tell you,” said Qin Wu. Meng Chuan immediately followed his master back to Grotto-Heaven Pavilion.

Within Grotto-heaven Pavilion, Qin Wu sat there and leisurely poured himself a cup of tea. The tea was still steaming. He held the cup of tea and smiled at Meng Chuan. “After discussing with Luo Tang, we’ve decided that you will act alone during the final battle. You will be responsible for rescuing various cities.”

Rescue? Meng Chuan’s eyes lit up.

“Your strength is sufficient for you to act alone,” said Qin Wu. “Don’t worry. We have a detailed plan for dealing with the final battle. You only play a tiny role.”

“Yes,” replied Meng Chuan obediently.

“Compared to everything else, your offensive means are a little weak. There’s nothing you can do about that. After all, you haven’t reached the Dharma Domain realm.” Supremacy Qin waved his hand, and a corpse appeared in the garden beside him.

Meng Chuan was stunned by the corpse. It was about 30 feet tall. It had three pairs of black-scaled wings and a curved horn on each side of its head. The size of its palm was larger than that of a human body. Every finger was like a hook.Although the corpse’s aura was restrained, Meng Chuan still felt oppressed. This was a natural pressure brought about by the differences in life’s natural order.

“This is an alien corpse at the Creation realm,” said Qin Wu. “Our Archean Mountain ancestor killed it in an outer realm and brought it back. This alien cultivated its body. It died a long time ago, but its body doesn’t decay. You can take it with you and use your Demon Slayer to devour it for two hours a day. It will probably take half a month for Demon Slayer to devour the corpse completely.” “Let Demon Slayer devour it?” Meng Chuan looked at the corpse in disbelief.

How many credits did a Creation-realm corpse cost?

“It’s just a corpse. It’s nothing to Archean Mountain,” said Qin Wu with a smile. “The powerful Godfiends of Archean Mountain will all be nurtured. You are only one of them.”

This was the truth. Archean Mountain thought of ways to make King True Martial, King Calm Sea, and the others stronger. That way, they could play a larger role in the final battle.

“Go, go. Don’t just stand there.” Qin Wu waved his hand and picked up the dossier beside him.

“Yes, Master.” Meng Chuan didn’t think too much about it. He immediately put away the Creation-realm alien corpse into the Grotto-Heaven Magic Bead before quickly leaving

Only then did Qin Wu put down the dossier. As he watched Meng Chuan disappear into the horizon, he muttered to himself, “There’s still too little time. Meng Chuan’s talent is high, but he still needs time to grow slowly. I hope that by holding out longer, there will be a miracle!”

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Chapter 279 - Demon Monarch Mo Nan’s Arrival
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

The night was hazy, and the crescent moon hung high in the sky.

Meng Chuan flew high in the sky and looked down at the vast land. He could see the people who lived in the wilderness with his vision. Most of them hid when it was light outside and worked at night. As the adults worked, the children played by the side. Some practiced their fighting moves seriously.

“Hide when it’s light outside and work at night?” Meng Chuan muttered softly. “At night, the demon monarchs have reduced visibility. The night has become a form of protection. What a joke. All the cities have been abandoned.”

As Meng Chuan flew, he passed by county and prefecture cities. They were all completely dark; this darkness left Meng Chuan feeling stifled.

There are only a few large cities left in the Great Zhou Dynasty. Meng Chuan finally saw a large city. There were more than ten million people in the bustling city, but everyone in the city was equally worried. The news of a million demon monarchs invading the human world had long spread.

The Great Zhou Dynasty, including the seven large city passes, has a total of 61 large cities. The seven large city passes—Luo Tang Pass included-had populations of over 20 million. Ever since the migration began, large city passes—Calm Sea Pass, Swallow Mountain Pass, White Elephant Pass, etc.—had taken in over ten million people. Countless people in the wilderness live around the Great Zhou Dynasty’s 61 large cities. With large cities, there is hope. If they earn enough money, they can migrate to the city. If their children are talented enough, they can be sent to a Dao Academy for free. Even if their talent is average, they can spend money and send their children to a Dao Academy. The large cities are our hope. We have to protect them.

Meng Chuan looked down as he flew.

Down below, in an empty area, a child and a man sparred with each other.

Boom! A saber collided with another saber.

The child was sent flying backward and landed on the ground. A fierce look appeared in his eyes as he charged towards his father again.

“I’m stronger than you, so you shouldn’t have fought me head-on. In combat, you should use your strengths to attack the enemy’s weaknesses!” The man berated as he brandished his saber to suppress his son.

Pfft.

The child fell to the ground again. His forehead was full of sweat, and his face was bleeding.

The man shouted as he watched, “Again, as long as you master your basic saber techniques this year, you will be able to pass the Dao Academy’s assessment. I will sell everything I have and risk my life to send you to the city’s Dao Academy. If you can’t do it, you can spend the rest of your life in the wilderness with me. Don’t blame me for not giving you any hope in life.”

“Humph.” The child gritted his teeth and charged forward again.

High in the sky, Meng Chuan continued flying after watching this scene. He saw many similar scenes every day, but he was touched every time. He wanted to fulfill his dream of slaying all the demons in the world. If he succeeded, he would be extremely satisfied even if he lost his life. However, it was very difficult to achieve such a goal! The higher his cultivation was, the more he realized how difficult it was to kill all the demons in the world.

This is just a time of darkness. Dawn will arrive eventually.

Meng Chuan arrived back at Jiang State Capital. He ate dinner with his wife, Liu Qiyue, before entering seclusion.

Dong!

The Creation-realm alien corpse was directly placed in a chamber. Godfiends cultivated in similar chambers. It was rather large, so the 30-foot-long corpse was easily accommodated.

A Creation-realm alien that mainly cultivates the body? Meng Chuan looked at the corpse carefully. The alien was covered in layers of black scales. Even its face was covered in black scales. However, a large portion of its chest had been sliced open. There were no scales at the chest; bits of flesh had been lopped off, and no blood could be seen.

At the alien’s cultivation realm, any injuries should have healed instantly. Meng Chuan inspected the corpse carefully. This chest has been sliced open. It’s like the scales were removed after the alien died. Perhaps Archean Mountain seniors were trying to refine something out of the alien’s corpse?

The scales of a Creation-realm alien—that mainly cultivated the body-were definitely extraordinary. Just a piece of armor made up of the alien’s scales would have a shocking value.

Buzz!

An invisible aura fluctuation emanated from the corpse. However, it was ultimately a dead object. Meng Chuan’s Darkstar domain could easily restrain the aura fluctuations.

Clang. Meng Chuan pulled out Demon Slayer.

Oh? Meng Chuan looked at Demon Slayer in shock. The moment Demon Slayer was unsheathed, it began to tremble as it attempted to lunge toward the corpse.

“No rush.” Meng Chuan smiled as he swung his saber firmly. His saber was as fast as lightning as it cleaved down toward the alien’s scales.

When it was about an inch away from the scales, an invisible repulsive force repelled Demon Slayer.

Thankfully, Archean Mountain’s predecessors have already cut a portion of its corpse. Otherwise, I wouldn’t be able to damage the corpse at all. Meng Chuan laughed self-deprecatingly and extended Demon Slayer towards the huge wound on the alien corpse’s chest. He kept Demon Slayer close to the wound, and Demon Slayer trembled as it tried its best to absorb the blood. Finally, a drop of golden blood slowly flew out of the wound. The golden blood seemed extremely heavy; Demon Slayer barely absorbed it.
